subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze7p6mtjfkj32s0vqi4kblfhlmdnebcv9l7gcoqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9ie1o72cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6b8vh3kkvrod3q2fd754mu9bsq7d9skbp1t3vlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9ie1o72cdh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6dde73bjmjf8c8acotuj3bc0ofjhb1phps5c1do_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9ie1o72cdh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5om8jmcegkcrrtbqebdrmmi4dipi5qv59m69vvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9ie1o72cdh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbq4tg9j4fa0q51eurrpea4lg8aq6g0ml4tf5se8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9ie1o72cdh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdkkf47itvb4e7cofchuous0utjb00qm677fuhl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9ie1o72cdh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztirc7vmsq6k3scpjfv2sfjrums930pt6vjkhpr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9ie1o72cdh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze3irtkstnbo9get90o467tt91l3tgnsgl0hga88_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9ie1o72cdh2bs)

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Ron DeSantis Alerts (via State GOP)
subject: 1 missed message from Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231048:J2Sg0KGNj:m:1:3331421248:66E920459EC34D1C35BCBE1F78A6A84C:r)
---

This is critical, Peter. Ron DeSantis reached out the other day, did you get his message?

Biden's border crisis is out of control, and State GOP Leaders need your help to do what Biden won't: **_[SECURE OUR BORDERS!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231048:J2Sg0KGNj:m:1:3331421248:66E920459EC34D1C35BCBE1F78A6A84C:r "SECURE OUR BORDERS!")_**

---
| | [5X TO SECURE THE BORDER ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231048:J2Sg0KGNj:m:1:3331421248:66E920459EC34D1C35BCBE1F78A6A84C:r)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhmpq5ass56a1tdgn54kk6g45ran7girmou9r210_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg66o34cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo4gbqogjfv02io6v17896bekolatkg63cvd1vb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg66o34cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg45i7ltlggrv3t89ohp5ni1r1fsqe4co027enko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg66o34cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator –
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg9g7vivhhf6o4aofqvg7f8ea3f5oqj81a4n6umo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg66o32cph2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1l96opg90benh9ui2gkpk4ee9f43211j6spvabg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg66o32cph2bs)**

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Week 2: What Happened this Week in the General Assembly?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
From the Desk of Senator Chase
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vpMOpd3Gv3tIhq709DQlh0Vir5VGDGMgJUQTynwtXWFNKTbj8CRJiTOybALixKHyFhCynpAy8UibvbxeQU5rIolIfRBs4KAkuotXR9KbT98GB246aq8nN5Y=&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==)
---
| CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Session Newsletter Week 2
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK?
---
| WEEK 2: GENERAL ASSEMBLY UPDATE
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years.
She has been rated as the most conservative Senator in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom and help for our veterans.
---
| 2023 SESSION WEEK 2 OVERVIEW
Dear Friends, In this week's newsletter, I provide an overview of the second week of the 2023 General Assembly Session and give you the inside scoop on what really happened this week. Look for a weekly update each Saturday morning.
In each weekly newsletter, we'll discuss the most notable General Assembly news of the week. I'll give you an update on bills I've sponsored along with how they fared our Democrat controlled Senate, which is now 22 to 18, and highlight other bills that might be of interest to you.
I also want to teach you how to participate in the process. You'll learn how to identify where to find the bills that are before the General Assembly and learn how to track them. You'll learn how to comment or speak on bills so that you can engage in the legislative process.
With only 46 days to review roughly 2,000 bills, legislation moves very quickly through the process and can be difficult to track and follow even for the most experienced legislative watchdog.
I will also let you know about upcoming events, with exciting news about my re-election campaign, which is already well under way this year. Find out how you can help my campaign while I'm busy doing the work of the people. We have plenty of opportunities to volunteer.
---
| EVENTS AT THE CAPITOL
---
| ANNUAL VCDL RALLY AT THE BELL TOWER
---
|
Monday was Lobby Day at the State Capital. While many Virginians are off of work and school for Martin Luther King Jr. Day, the General Assembly is hard at work.
My day was filled with constituent meetings, session and two rallies at the capitol.
It's actually the busiest day of the legislative session as many Virginians visit our legislative offices on their day off to share their concerns.
I was honored to speak at both the Annual VCDL Rally held Monday morning, and the Stop the Shots Virginia Rally for Medical Freedom Monday afternoon. Both rallies were held at the State Capitol by the Bell Tower.
A huge thanks to VCDL President Philip Van Cleave for planning and organizing Monday's rally, which attracted many 2nd Amendment supporters from across the state.
It was great to be in person and on Capitol grounds for the first time in two years since Covid-19.
VCDL is the most active and effective pro-2A citizen's group in the state. Philip Van Cleve personally speaks on every bill that effects your ability to protect and carry a firearm. If you're not already a member, I encourage you to join.
If you'd like the latest on gun bills, please click here to join VCDL and receive their newsletter. I highly recommend it. [https://vcdl.org/](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vhx4gsXVoGYEP7zeC9U8fWH4pxG8ZGTDaZtTUMVb8ggaYEmdquuBxDykrSY5uVgTR9SYLpsLfkKe_GohTmrlrFg=&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==)
I'm proud to say a have a lifetime perfect 100 percent voting record since first being elected to the Virginia Senate almost 8 years ago. My VCDL voting record is here: [https://vcdl.org/page/voting-records](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vhGXdOxuGpZ8N2EX4ktW51p5j6Udv2W78fi2_ysx4G63DJI55pQI7OVCa7DB6ddVvrb5_Eg-_mUgfuOSsc4FW4ye_42x75qtCEsZefOmuU5U&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==) 2022 Chase 100 2021 Chase 100 2020 Chase 100 2019 Chase 100 2018 Chase 100 2017 Chase 100 2016 Chase 100
My opponent former State Senator Glen Sturtevant can't say that. In his first and only term in the State Senate, he was the only Republican who voted for un-American unconstitutional "red flag laws." You can check his voting record here: [https://vcdl.org/page/voting-records](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vhGXdOxuGpZ8N2EX4ktW51p5j6Udv2W78fi2_ysx4G63DJI55pQI7OVCa7DB6ddVvrb5_Eg-_mUgfuOSsc4FW4ye_42x75qtCEsZefOmuU5U&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==)

My other opponent, Tina Ramirez has no voting record on gun rights, nor does she have a voting record you can trust. She has run a number of times for Congress, but to date has yet to secure the Republican nomination. She finished third.
NOT ELECTED TO PUBLIC OFFICE Ramirez NO RECORD
You can trust my 8 year voting record. As a conceal carry holder who carries everyday, I understand how many proposed gun control bills hurt law abiding citizens. We simply want to protect ourselves not only at home, but when we're out in the community. And we don't need a bunch of confusing gun regulations to trip us up.
I oppose all gun control legislation. The criminals don't follow the law. We're only disenfranchising law abiding citizens when we pass more gun control. There is no such thing as "common sense" gun control. It doesn't exist. Any Republican proposing gun control should be voted out. Restrictions only affect law abiding citizens, not criminals.
I'm working to reverse the unconstitutional gun control passed by the Democrat controlled legislature.
This year I will be carrying 2 pro-2A gun bills, [SB1488](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vhx4gsXVoGYEPEeRK7eQg4bJNgjHvnmWmni2b7REwObSALae9Z-7D40qOMlojjTU2wGH57_X8Nf01ke-YB3uq6XBGTIVOY-QafSyNumBP5yBsKfC6ZUYv8txu9y3ramjfvDdNO2_fZA4hFGXuuJ7sd0=&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==) a bill to repeal un-American red flag laws, and [SB805](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vhx4gsXVoGYEYlFQpkcVrNIKFL0LUo7pYc1I6dX7qfDbJPW3kUpCHRJamnxXYZbzSCCXiScMrFUxgF0vxi7_-ua-mEKTIfh8uG53n__NV8eW4RH_iTLZzUdOYOCl83w8dBhQcSUv23oDQUwH7ijvbt8=&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==), a bill to repeal localities ability to create gun free zones. I will be presenting both bills this Monday at 8am to the Senate Judiciary Committee, located in the Pocahontas Building on the Ground Floor in Senate Room A .
There are many more gun control laws that were passed from 2020 through 2o21 that I would like to reverse. Unfortunately, I am limited to just 20 bills for the entire 2023 session. The Senate Rules Committee makes the decision each year on the number of bills we can draft and carry.
We need to reverse both gun control measures to ensure law abiding citizens don't inadvertently break the law trying to follow a patchwork of confusing restrictions that change by locality. For those who travel across the state, it's almost impossible to comply with current Virginia law.
Red Flag Laws allow the government to take your guns away without due process.
My opponent, former State Senator Glenn Sturtevant voted for and passed red flag laws in Virginia. Voting records matter.

| Stop the Shot Mandates Let Doctors Be Doctors Give the People Access to Ivermectin & Hydroxychloroquine
---
A huge thanks to Dr. Sheila Furey for not only saving the lives of hundreds of Virginians who would have died from Covid-19, but for her tireless efforts in educating legislators as to her successful treatment of Covid-19 patients within her practice.
She has fearlessly and courageously gone toe to toe challenging the protocol and "best practices" for treating Covid-19 with hospitals, doctors, agencies, the Virginia Department of Health and legislators to open the eyes to her successful treatment of Covid-19 patients who were close to death. She's a hero.
Many of her patients came to committee to speak in favor of my medical freedom bills.
It is through her expertise and experience that I've been able to put forward medical freedom legislation for the past 3 sessions to advance the necessity to protect the patient-doctor relationship, especially when it comes to prescribing known therapeutics like Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine for the successful treatment of Covid-19. This is an issue of upmost importance to Virginians.
This is my 3rd legislative session introducing bills that reinforce the prescriptive ability that doctors already have.
Government should not mandate experimental shots and simultaneously threaten doctors through letters or regulations written by the Virginia Department of Health, the CDC and the WHO, when treating an epidemic that has no conclusive cures or treatments that are 100 percent effective.
We must allow doctors to be doctors and allow them to continue to prescribe Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine. After all, we are in a Right to Try State.
This week I introduced and presented [SB793](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vn-r0J4WEHou-RHQ76EvWQvU8-sqdvKn4zKKvinz8xwvPBOmNB0Faf4GwLoSWpmP_rnMiZ9frK5rew1Dw9GKHWdxT-R1TWD6hos7vb2KF4Ra0KhNMcI-_Oausdi9fmMwviZgl-PTlu82S9WSf8hrx0A=&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==), which would have reinforced and recognized that doctors already have this authority. Unfortunately, it was killed by a Democrat controlled Senate subcommittee.
A huge thanks to Senator and Doctor Siobhan Dunnavant for speaking in favor of the bill this year.
Please watch the video with her excellent comments before the full Senate Health and Education Committee.
I had already presented the bill in the Senate Health Professions Subcommittee and the bill was referred to the full Senate Health and Education Committee with the recommendation to be killed by a Democrat controlled Senate Health and Education Committee.
Senate bills [SB792](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vhx4gsXVoGYE6TeUFwt9WvG8VsaliunR5DoGxtCCYDVCHNHo13UZg6FanTHCzajK9otvVQ4wXq5Myaf087kNkZv3__CCiRa746khp94tyJagB8hNl4tSS_VD49t-Iv34X9sBZonDjWg-Sz1RijMuoDY=&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==) and [SB833](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vhx4gsXVoGYECSO9OAAzcF1yYpjvbFKUPPcIt-nvmqFhDKNkHfkOWNFpBpericcJuzaHyhF6WpS8EWNROzA17KLx3-Zv19Nvg4OUbWIePaedQNNGKZi6VJiT1EtCmdsJka83HuGFUUibNzeK_-8IGjk=&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==) would prohibit employers, educators and places of business from being able to discriminate against people who chose not to get the shot or wear the mask. This bills will be presented in the next 2 weeks.

| SB 793 COVID-19; prescriptions for hydroxychloroquine and ivermectin for treatment.
Prescriptions for hydroxychloroquine and ivermectin for treatment of COVID-19. Provides that licensed health care providers with prescriptive authority may prescribe, administer, or dispense hydroxychloroquine and ivermectin to a patient with a clinical diagnosis of COVID-19. The bill prohibits the Board of Medicine from initiating a disciplinary action against a licensed health care provider solely for prescribing, administering, or dispensing hydroxychloroquine or ivermectin to a patient with a clinical diagnosis of COVID-19, provided such clinical diagnosis and treatment has been documented in the patient's medical record by such licensed health care provider.
[01/19/23 Senate: Passed by indefinitely in Education and Health (8-Y 6-N)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VmBmWxf1XAhP07mUidQsxk9KBJadDBzsbzT8Bz_yvMl_jbCecsb4vhx4gsXVoGYEZ97RgyvZZMtRiaJByOqtul5rY-kBi-V6nJn7nTDY4cyVx2c76Ue-gywyUSS0rPGJpZItRJcqIOujykw8Q1t-RK-sGpbyeGVKqHpj74C4zgDvbcPadFMMejaqfiudc2DRtLXTCknRh4m3IxuLTSGFrA==&c=gzfLHWL-hjj12_YSCz6h9zV7kTQ4ajHad6gNe_3N5MQqQrnBK7ubxQ==&ch=tcf_nEg2_pv88D-Eky45z0vt1YvCpbatc5-Xbu2gsgJnAOIynzO-_Q==) YEAS--Lucas, Saslaw, Howell, Locke, Barker, Petersen, Edwards, Hashmi--8. NAYS--Newman, Cosgrove, Dunnavant, Suetterlein, Peake, Pillion--6. ABSTENTIONS--0.
Those who voted "yea" voted to kill the bill. This bill died 8 to 6 on a party line vote.

| Senator Chase presented SB832 The Parental Rights to Educational Transparency, before a 3 to 2 Democrat controlled Senate Subcommittee on Public Education and was granted a second additional week to work with stakeholders on their objections.
CHESTERFIELD, VA - Virginia Senator Amanda Chase presented SB832 Parental Rights to Educational Transparency last week before a Democrat controlled Senate Subcommittee, which consists of 3 Democrats and 2 Republicans. Instead of allowing the subcommittee to kill the bill, based on opposition led by Mr. Shane Riddle with the Virginia Department of Education and the Virginia School Boards Association, Senator Chase asked for and was granted an additional week to meet with stakeholders and address concerns. Senator Chase has asked for an additional week to meet with Mr. Riddle.
"Parents have a fundamental right to make decisions concerning the upbringing, education, and care of their child. This is the law as stated in Code of Virginia § 1-240.1, and must be honored by all educators and administrators," stated Senator Chase.
SB832 is expected to be heard again in the Subcommittee on Public Education on Wednesday, January 25, 30 minutes after session and before Health and Education Committee on Thursday, January 26 at 8:00am in Senate Room A, Pocahontas Building. The Subcommittee Chair usually provides a recommendation to the full Health and Education committee.

| SB793 Prescription for Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin for treatment left a Democrat Controlled Senate Subcommittee on Health Professions with the recommendation to "kill" SB793.
The only doctor in the room, Republican Senator Siobhan Dunnavant spoke in favor of the bill. All Republicans on this committee have indicated they support this bill, despite all not being present. Even with all Republicans present, this bill would not have had the votes.
VOTES: This bill failed to report in the full Senate Health and Education on Thursday, on a party line 8 to 6 vote. All Republicans on the committees supported the bill.
YEAS--Lucas, Saslaw, Howell, Locke, Barker, Petersen, Edwards, Hashmi--8. NAYS--Newman, Cosgrove, Dunnavant, Suetterlein, Peake, Pillion--6. Not voting- McPike
"Thousands of Virginians have already died from Covid-19, and yet many lives could have been saved had these patients had immediate access to Ivermectin early, when they were experiencing symptoms. Unfortunately, these 2 known cost effective therapeutics, which have been widely available and considered as safe were politicized and demonized.
Hundred of doctors across the Commonwealth who support using known therapeutics believe that doctors not politicians should be determining medical treatment.
A huge thanks to Republican Senator Dr. Siobhan Dunnavant for speaking in favor of this life saving bill which prohibits doctors from being penalized for prescribing Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine for the treatment of Covid. It is perplexing that Democrats who overtly express their support of "being pro-choice" would deny practicing board certified doctors from exercising their right along with their patient's right to choice." Senator Amanda Chase.

SB793 Prescription for Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin for treatment declares that licensed healthcare providers with prescriptive authority have the fundamental right to:

1. Prescribe Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin to Covid-19 patients
2. Administer Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin to Covid-19 patients
3. Dispense Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin to Covid-19 patients

This bill prohibits the Board of Medicine from initiating a disciplinary action against a licensed healthcare provider solely for prescribing, administering or dispensing Hydroxychloroquine or Ivermectin to any patient who has been clinically diagnosed with Covid-19, providing the diagnosis and treatment has been documented in the patients medical record by a licensed healthcare provider.
"No patient who has been diagnosed with COVID-19 should ever be denied treatment with medications proven effective and licensed providers should never be in fear of penalty for prescribing such medications," stated Senator Chase.

| SB0884 Voter Confidence Restoration Act
---
Repeals provisions of law permitting registration on election day; requires an excuse to vote absentee; removes the option to vote absentee in person; requires absentee ballots to either be accompanied by a copy of an approved form of identification or be notarized; requires absentee ballots returned to drop boxes to be returned by the voter; requires absentee ballots to be received by the general registrar by the close of polls on election day in order to be counted; requires presentation of a form of identification containing a photograph in order to vote; repeals the provisions of law permitting a voter who does not have one of the required forms of identification to vote after signing a statement that he is the named registered voter he claims to be; eliminates the use of electronic poll books and voting machines while polls are open; and requires that ballots be manually tabulated in order to determine the results of an election.

| SB1316 Elections; conduct of election; election results; post-election forensic audits.
---
Provides for the conduct of a forensic audit of an election in a county or city upon the request of certain officials or upon the petition of a group of residents of the locality in question. The purpose of an audit is to determine the accuracy and legality of the election in question.
The bill provides that an audit includes a review of all materials, equipment, and procedures used during any part of the election, including ballots, pollbooks, voting machines, and routers. The bill requires that the audit be open to the public and states that the auditing process may include participation by residents.
The results of the audit are to be presented to a jury of local residents who have the power to declare the election valid or invalid. The bill also gives the State Inspector General the power and duty to conduct an audit of the 2020 general election and requires him to produce a report of his findings. Bill failed on party line vote 9 to 6

clean_body: From the Desk of Senator Chase | | | | | | == | CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Session Newsletter Week 2 | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK? | WEEK 2: GENERAL ASSEMBLY UPDATE | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She has been rated as the most conservative Senator in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom and help for our veterans. | 2023 SESSION WEEK 2 OVERVIEW Dear Friends, In this week's newsletter, I provide an overview of the second week of the 2023 General Assembly Session and give you the inside scoop on what really happened this week. Look for a weekly update each Saturday morning. In each weekly newsletter, we'll discuss the most notable General Assembly news of the week. I'll give you an update on bills I've sponsored along with how they fared our Democrat controlled Senate, which is now 22 to 18, and highlight other bills that might be of interest to you. I also want to teach you how to participate in the process. You'll learn how to identify where to find the bills that are before the General Assembly and learn how to track them. You'll learn how to comment or speak on bills so that you can engage in the legislative process. With only 46 days to review roughly 2,000 bills, legislation moves very quickly through the process and can be difficult to track and follow even for the most experienced legislative watchdog. I will also let you know about upcoming events, with exciting news about my re-election campaign, which is already well under way this year. Find out how you can help my campaign while I'm busy doing the work of the people. We have plenty of opportunities to volunteer. | EVENTS AT THE CAPITOL | ANNUAL VCDL RALLY AT THE BELL TOWER | Monday was Lobby Day at the State Capital. While many Virginians are off of work and school for Martin Luther King Jr. Day, the General Assembly is hard at work. My day was filled with constituent meetings, session and two rallies at the capitol. It's actually the busiest day of the legislative session as many Virginians visit our legislative offices on their day off to share their concerns. I was honored to speak at both the Annual VCDL Rally held Monday morning, and the Stop the Shots Virginia Rally for Medical Freedom Monday afternoon. Both rallies were held at the State Capitol by the Bell Tower. A huge thanks to VCDL President Philip Van Cleave for planning and organizing Monday's rally, which attracted many 2nd Amendment supporters from across the state. It was great to be in person and on Capitol grounds for the first time in two years since Covid-19. VCDL is the most active and effective pro-2A citizen's group in the state. Philip Van Cleve personally speaks on every bill that effects your ability to protect and carry a firearm. If you're not already a member, I encourage you to join. If you'd like the latest on gun bills, please click here to join VCDL and receive their newsletter. I highly recommend it. == I'm proud to say a have a lifetime perfect 100 percent voting record since first being elected to the Virginia Senate almost 8 years ago. My VCDL voting record is here: == 2022 Chase 100 2021 Chase 100 2020 Chase 100 2019 Chase 100 2018 Chase 100 2017 Chase 100 2016 Chase 100 My opponent former State Senator Glen Sturtevant can't say that. In his first and only term in the State Senate, he was the only Republican who voted for un-American unconstitutional "red flag laws." You can check his voting record here: == 2019 Sturtevant 88 2018 Sturtevant 80 2017 Sturtevant 96 2016 Sturtevant 96 My other opponent, Tina Ramirez has no voting record on gun rights, nor does she have a voting record you can trust. She has run a number of times for Congress, but to date has yet to secure the Republican nomination. She finished third. NOT ELECTED TO PUBLIC OFFICE Ramirez NO RECORD You can trust my 8 year voting record. As a conceal carry holder who carries everyday, I understand how many proposed gun control bills hurt law abiding citizens. We simply want to protect ourselves not only at home, but when we're out in the community. And we don't need a bunch of confusing gun regulations to trip us up. I oppose all gun control legislation. The criminals don't follow the law. We're only disenfranchising law abiding citizens when we pass more gun control. There is no such thing as "common sense" gun control. It doesn't exist. Any Republican proposing gun control should be voted out. Restrictions only affect law abiding citizens, not criminals. I'm working to reverse the unconstitutional gun control passed by the Democrat controlled legislature. This year I will be carrying 2 pro-2A gun bills, == a bill to repeal un-American red flag laws, and ==, a bill to repeal localities ability to create gun free zones. I will be presenting both bills this Monday at 8am to the Senate Judiciary Committee, located in the Pocahontas Building on the Ground Floor in Senate Room A . There are many more gun control laws that were passed from 2020 through 2o21 that I would like to reverse. Unfortunately, I am limited to just 20 bills for the entire 2023 session. The Senate Rules Committee makes the decision each year on the number of bills we can draft and carry. We need to reverse both gun control measures to ensure law abiding citizens don't inadvertently break the law trying to follow a patchwork of confusing restrictions that change by locality. For those who travel across the state, it's almost impossible to comply with current Virginia law. Red Flag Laws allow the government to take your guns away without due process. My opponent, former State Senator Glenn Sturtevant voted for and passed red flag laws in Virginia. Voting records matter. | | | IN CASE YOU MISSED IT...my speech at the VCDL Rally | == | Medical Freedom Rally Stop the Shots Virginia | | | == | Stop the Shot Mandates Let Doctors Be Doctors Give the People Access to Ivermectin & Hydroxychloroquine A huge thanks to Dr. Sheila Furey for not only saving the lives of hundreds of Virginians who would have died from Covid-19, but for her tireless efforts in educating legislators as to her successful treatment of Covid-19 patients within her practice. She has fearlessly and courageously gone toe to toe challenging the protocol and "best practices" for treating Covid-19 with hospitals, doctors, agencies, the Virginia Department of Health and legislators to open the eyes to her successful treatment of Covid-19 patients who were close to death. She's a hero. Many of her patients came to committee to speak in favor of my medical freedom bills. It is through her expertise and experience that I've been able to put forward medical freedom legislation for the past 3 sessions to advance the necessity to protect the patient-doctor relationship, especially when it comes to prescribing known therapeutics like Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine for the successful treatment of Covid-19. This is an issue of upmost importance to Virginians. This is my 3rd legislative session introducing bills that reinforce the prescriptive ability that doctors already have. Government should not mandate experimental shots and simultaneously threaten doctors through letters or regulations written by the Virginia Department of Health, the CDC and the WHO, when treating an epidemic that has no conclusive cures or treatments that are 100 percent effective. We must allow doctors to be doctors and allow them to continue to prescribe Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine. After all, we are in a Right to Try State. This week I introduced and presented ==, which would have reinforced and recognized that doctors already have this authority. Unfortunately, it was killed by a Democrat controlled Senate subcommittee. A huge thanks to Senator and Doctor Siobhan Dunnavant for speaking in favor of the bill this year. Please watch the video with her excellent comments before the full Senate Health and Education Committee. I had already presented the bill in the Senate Health Professions Subcommittee and the bill was referred to the full Senate Health and Education Committee with the recommendation to be killed by a Democrat controlled Senate Health and Education Committee. Senate bills == and == would prohibit employers, educators and places of business from being able to discriminate against people who chose not to get the shot or wear the mask. This bills will be presented in the next 2 weeks. == | My Speech at the Stop the Shots Rally | == | Virginians Want Medical Freedom | Senate Democrats say they are pro-choice EXCEPT when it comes to alternatives for Covid Treatment. | Senate Democrats Kill Our Ivermectin Bill | == | SB 793 COVID-19; prescriptions for hydroxychloroquine and ivermectin for treatment. Prescriptions for hydroxychloroquine and ivermectin for treatment of COVID-19. Provides that licensed health care providers with prescriptive authority may prescribe, administer, or dispense hydroxychloroquine and ivermectin to a patient with a clinical diagnosis of COVID-19. The bill prohibits the Board of Medicine from initiating a disciplinary action against a licensed health care provider solely for prescribing, administering, or dispensing hydroxychloroquine or ivermectin to a patient with a clinical diagnosis of COVID-19, provided such clinical diagnosis and treatment has been documented in the patient's medical record by such licensed health care provider. == YEAS--Lucas, Saslaw, Howell, Locke, Barker, Petersen, Edwards, Hashmi--8. NAYS--Newman, Cosgrove, Dunnavant, Suetterlein, Peake, Pillion--6. ABSTENTIONS--0. Those who voted "yea" voted to kill the bill. This bill died 8 to 6 on a party line vote. | Minority Communities are More Vulnerable to Dying from the Covid-19 Vaccine | == | Please watch and listen to Dr. Sheila Furey who explains why minority communities are more vulnerable to adverse reactions from the Covid-19 vaccine. They have a higher rate of underlying medical conditions. Those same populations have an increased risk of clotting. This is why we are seeing people suddenly dying. There is an increased risk of clotting with the booster. The Covid-19 vaccine is killing people. Meanwhile they are being denied access to known therapeutics that work like ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine. | Why is it so difficult to get Ivermectin & Hydroxychloroquine? | == | We need to give Virginians greater access to all treatments for Covid-19. Why did doctors and pharmacists who use to prescribe known therapeutics like Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine stop prescribing these well known treatments for Covid-19? Here's what we've done so far to try to reverse this trend with the current administration. Please watch this short video. | A Call for Action | == | Please watch this video and then reach out to the Governor's office and ask them to encourage Commissioner Colin Green to write a letter to reverse the former administration's prohibitive policy on administering and prescribing known therapeutics like Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine for the treatment of Covid-19. We must stop the practice of the prior administration. Give people Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine. Office of the Secretary of Health and Human Resources Secretary John Littel mailto:HealthAndHumanResources@governor.virginia.gov mailto:HealthAndHumanResources@governor.virginia.gov P.O. Box 1475. Richmond, VA 23218 (804) 786-7765 Colin Greene, MD, MPH colin.greene@vdh.virginia.gov (804) 864-7009 Governor Glenn Youngkin Constituent Services Phone: 804-786-2211 Email: glenn.youngkin@governor.virginia.gov | Senator Chase Continues the Fight for True Election Integrity | SB1319 Let's Get Rid of Dropboxes | == | SB1317 Call for a Full Forensic Audit of 2020 | == | SB1317 We need a FULL forensic audit NOT a RISK limiting audit | == | SB834 Did you know LIVE ballots are being mailed out every election if the voter signs up on the permanent absentee voter list? 250,000 Virginians are currently signed up My bill would eliminate this program. | == | SB1317 If the State Won't Conduct A Full Forensic Audit, Let the People Canvas the Vote | == | SPECIAL GUESTS | | On Martin Luther King Jr Day, I was honored to be able to invite my Life Coach & Friend Pastor Calvin Duncan to lead the Senate of Virginia in prayer. | | | | | | Pastor Calvin Duncan is a legendary basketball Hall of Famer for VCU who was drafted by Chicago Bulls in 1985, now Pastor of Faith and Family Church in Chesterfield County. He also gave the invocation for Governor Glenn Youngkin's Inauguration. | SPECIAL GUESTS WHO VISITED THE CAPITOL and My Office | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Honored to receive a visit from the 4th Congressional District Nominee Republican Nominee Leon Benjamin | | | | SB832 The Parental Rights to Educational Transparency | Senator Chase is currently working with stakeholders to find common ground. Senator will report on the bill next week. | | Senator Chase presented SB832 The Parental Rights to Educational Transparency, before a 3 to 2 Democrat controlled Senate Subcommittee on Public Education and was granted a second additional week to work with stakeholders on their objections. CHESTERFIELD, VA - Virginia Senator Amanda Chase presented SB832 Parental Rights to Educational Transparency last week before a Democrat controlled Senate Subcommittee, which consists of 3 Democrats and 2 Republicans. Instead of allowing the subcommittee to kill the bill, based on opposition led by Mr. Shane Riddle with the Virginia Department of Education and the Virginia School Boards Association, Senator Chase asked for and was granted an additional week to meet with stakeholders and address concerns. Senator Chase has asked for an additional week to meet with Mr. Riddle. "Parents have a fundamental right to make decisions concerning the upbringing, education, and care of their child. This is the law as stated in Code of Virginia § 1-240.1, and must be honored by all educators and administrators," stated Senator Chase. SB832 is expected to be heard again in the Subcommittee on Public Education on Wednesday, January 25, 30 minutes after session and before Health and Education Committee on Thursday, January 26 at 8:00am in Senate Room A, Pocahontas Building. The Subcommittee Chair usually provides a recommendation to the full Health and Education committee. | | | == | Day 3 Senator Chase Presents SB793 Prescription for Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin | Senator Chase's SB793 Prescription for Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin for treatment, left a Senate Subcommittee with a recommendation to kill SB793 today in a Democrat Controlled Senate Subcommittee on Health Professions which consists of 5 Democrats and 4 Republicans. The bill seeks to ensure doctors are not penalized when they chose to prescribe Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin for the treatment of Covid-19. WATCH THE VIDEO | | | | == | | | == | SB793 Prescription for Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin for treatment left a Democrat Controlled Senate Subcommittee on Health Professions with the recommendation to "kill" SB793. The only doctor in the room, Republican Senator Siobhan Dunnavant spoke in favor of the bill. All Republicans on this committee have indicated they support this bill, despite all not being present. Even with all Republicans present, this bill would not have had the votes. VOTES: This bill failed to report in the full Senate Health and Education on Thursday, on a party line 8 to 6 vote. All Republicans on the committees supported the bill. YEAS--Lucas, Saslaw, Howell, Locke, Barker, Petersen, Edwards, Hashmi--8. NAYS--Newman, Cosgrove, Dunnavant, Suetterlein, Peake, Pillion--6. Not voting- McPike "Thousands of Virginians have already died from Covid-19, and yet many lives could have been saved had these patients had immediate access to Ivermectin early, when they were experiencing symptoms. Unfortunately, these 2 known cost effective therapeutics, which have been widely available and considered as safe were politicized and demonized. Hundred of doctors across the Commonwealth who support using known therapeutics believe that doctors not politicians should be determining medical treatment. A huge thanks to Republican Senator Dr. Siobhan Dunnavant for speaking in favor of this life saving bill which prohibits doctors from being penalized for prescribing Ivermectin and Hydroxychloroquine for the treatment of Covid. It is perplexing that Democrats who overtly express their support of "being pro-choice" would deny practicing board certified doctors from exercising their right along with their patient's right to choice." Senator Amanda Chase. SB793 Prescription for Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin for treatment declares that licensed healthcare providers with prescriptive authority have the fundamental right to: 1. Prescribe Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin to Covid-19 patients 2. Administer Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin to Covid-19 patients 3. Dispense Hydroxychloroquine and Ivermectin to Covid-19 patients This bill prohibits the Board of Medicine from initiating a disciplinary action against a licensed healthcare provider solely for prescribing, administering or dispensing Hydroxychloroquine or Ivermectin to any patient who has been clinically diagnosed with Covid-19, providing the diagnosis and treatment has been documented in the patients medical record by a licensed healthcare provider. "No patient who has been diagnosed with COVID-19 should ever be denied treatment with medications proven effective and licensed providers should never be in fear of penalty for prescribing such medications," stated Senator Chase. | CHASE ELECTION INTEGRITY BILLS | PRESENTED TUESDAY, JAN 24 COMMITTEE: SENATE PRIVILEGES AND ELECTIONS SUBCOMMITTEE: WHERE: POCOHANTAS BUILDING, 5TH FLOOR, ROOM E523 TIME: 15 MINUTES AFTER SESSION. APPROX 1PM | VOTER INTEGRITY BILLS | | SB0834 Absentee voting; permanent absentee voter list repealed Repeals the provisions of law by which any registered voter may apply to receive absentee ballots for all elections in which he is eligible to vote and remain on the absentee voter list until the voter requests in writing to be removed from the list, the voter's registration is canceled or placed on inactive status pursuant to law, or the voter moves to a different address not in the same county or city of his registration | | == Bill failed on a party line vote 9 to 6 | == | One Day. Paper Ballot. Hand Count. Photo ID. | | Bill is up next Tuesday Where? Senate Privileges and Elections Committee The Capitol. Senate Room 3 When? Tuesday, January 24 15 minutes after session (Approximately 1pm) | SB0884 Voter Confidence Restoration Act Repeals provisions of law permitting registration on election day; requires an excuse to vote absentee; removes the option to vote absentee in person; requires absentee ballots to either be accompanied by a copy of an approved form of identification or be notarized; requires absentee ballots returned to drop boxes to be returned by the voter; requires absentee ballots to be received by the general registrar by the close of polls on election day in order to be counted; requires presentation of a form of identification containing a photograph in order to vote; repeals the provisions of law permitting a voter who does not have one of the required forms of identification to vote after signing a statement that he is the named registered voter he claims to be; eliminates the use of electronic poll books and voting machines while polls are open; and requires that ballots be manually tabulated in order to determine the results of an election. | | == | SB0834 Absentee voting; permanent absentee voter list repealed Prohibits any locality, school board, division superintendent, school principal, private school, institution of higher education, or employer from adopting, implementing, or enforcing any policy, rule, or order related to COVID-19 that requires individuals to wear a face covering. == | | == Bill failed on a party line vote 9 to 6 | SB1316 Elections; conduct of election; election results; post-election forensic audits. Provides for the conduct of a forensic audit of an election in a county or city upon the request of certain officials or upon the petition of a group of residents of the locality in question. The purpose of an audit is to determine the accuracy and legality of the election in question. The bill provides that an audit includes a review of all materials, equipment, and procedures used during any part of the election, including ballots, pollbooks, voting machines, and routers. The bill requires that the audit be open to the public and states that the auditing process may include participation by residents. The results of the audit are to be presented to a jury of local residents who have the power to declare the election valid or invalid. The bill also gives the State Inspector General the power and duty to conduct an audit of the 2020 general election and requires him to produce a report of his findings. Bill failed on party line vote 9 to 6 | | == | == | == | SB1317 Elections; voter registration; lists of registered voters; provided at cost to registered voters Provides that the Department of Elections must provide the list of registered voters for any district in which he resides to any registered voter of the Commonwealth for a reasonable charge not to exceed its actual cost incurred in supplying the requested list. == Bill failed on party line vote 9 to 6 | SB1319 NO DROPBOXES. Absentee voting; return of absentee ballots; drop-off locations. Repeals the provisions of law providing for the establishment of drop-off locations for the return of absentee ballots. | | == == Bill failed to report on party line vote 9 to 6 | UPCOMING EVENTS: | | | | JAN 23 NEXT CHESTERFIELD GOP BUSINESS MEETING | | | | | | Chesterfield VA Tea Party Next Meeting: February 6 | | WITH YOUR GREAT HELP WE DID IT! FIRST PLACE IN FUNDRAISING | | Earlier this week the Virginia State Board of Elections Released the Latest Fundraising Numbers from July 1 to December 31 And here are the results for Senate District 12: WE WON IN MOST DOLLARS RAISED Chase $147,543.99 Sturtevant $132,454.18 Ramirez $61,417.05 WE WON IN MOST NUMBER OF DONATIONS Chase 183 Sturtevant 159 Ramirez 128 . And we did not solicit money from lobbyists or Political Action Committees. While I'm in session for the next 46 days I cannot raise money. Please save your donations until after we gavel out on Saturday, February 25. Meanwhile both of my opponents can continue to raise money while I'm busy working for you. Please hold your future donations until after adjournment on SATURDAY FEBRUARY 25 Know that I can't thank you enough and look forward to sending out personal thank you notes to each of you. Currently, I'm in session and focused on presenting bills and voting on bills. Our numbers came in and I wanted to let you know we finished in first place and had to let you know. I know who gave. And I thank you. I checked my account several times a day to see how close we were to meeting our goal and I saw the names of those who gave. Please know that your personal handwritten note is coming, along with those who will receive a Chase Freedom hat. Know that I see your name and that I am so thankful for every donation you made and know that I could not do this without you. It will be 46 days before I can ask for donations again. So please don't send money right now. You will have to wait until Saturday, February 25 after we adjourn. I am in session from January 11 to February 25. Our next report will cover from January 1 to March 31, 2023. We will have from February 25 until March 31, 2023 or 35 days to raise money before our next report. | Please Sign My Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get 250 people to sign a petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. If you'd like to sign my petition, please see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. Please reach out to Jody at jody@chaseforva.com or call 804 912 6007. | SETTING THE RECORD STRAIGHT Desperate Tina Ramirez | My desperate opponent Tina Ramirez falsely mentioned this week on The John Reid Show on WRVA that I was "kicked out of the Republican Senate Caucus" when in fact that is NOT true. I WAS NOT KICKED OUT OF THE REPUBLICAN SENATE CAUCUS. 3 years ago, after being re-elected to the Virginia Senate for a 2nd four year term we had a private caucus meeting to vote in leadership. Prior to the meeting I privately expressed my concerns to leadership right before a vote to select Republican Senate leadership, expressing I could not sit under the current leader who had a history of introducing and supporting tax increases and a gun control bill. I expressed I would sit under any leader except the current leader and expressed if that leader was chosen again I would have to leave the Republican Senate Caucus on principle. Leadership did not address my concerns before the caucus and they chose the same leader. I MADE THE CHOICE to leave the caucus NOT because I couldn't get along with my colleagues but because on principle I refused to sit under a Republican leader who introduced a gun control bill and continued to introduce bills to increase taxes. This decision was not made because of personalities or because I didn't like the leader personally, but based on principle. I could no longer in good conscience sit under a leader that I felt did not introduce bills consistent with the Republican Creed. So true to my word, I left the caucus. I continue to interact and work with my colleagues, including the leader, to successfully represent my district even under a Democrat controlled Senate. Just this past year, I worked with my colleagues to pass a bill that exempts veterans retirement benefits from state income tax up to $40,000. The leader and many other of my colleagues signed on as copatrons of the bill, which was signed into law by Governor Youngkin. The Senate has been controlled by Senate Democrats 21 to 19 since 2020 and we just lost another seat in Virginia Beach after Jen Kiggans was elected to Congress. We're now 22 to 18. Most good legislation is killed in subcommittee to include any good legislation that passes the House. Most of my colleagues have the same issues I do with getting good bills out of Democrat Controlled Senate committees and subcommittees even with complete Republican support. Tina Ramirez doesn't understand how the Senate works because she's never been in the Senate. She's inexperienced and worse yet doesn't verify the truth before she speaks. That will certainly get you in trouble not just in the Senate but at life in general. This is why you need experienced leadership who has successfully served and represented the citizens of Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia for almost 8 years. You need a representative with the backbone to stand up to leadership when they go off the rails, not another status quo politician who does what they're told and doesn't stand up for our principles when they are being infringed upon. I texted Tina Ramirez with the truth yesterday to set the record straight. Hopefully she decides to run her campaign on the truth. I've also texted her a chart with committee assignments so that she understands that each committee is disproportionately stacked in favor of Democrats. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeol0ueiu2qgb53rt84ch0rchemk5r6cfg17454o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg62oj6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi6stgfck5u0pc7bkpnhac5li4979vgh5m87bprg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg62oj6clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9sq9tsr4a49r435i4u215fe8nggi4gmloub14lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg62oj6clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7899%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ixyM6Lj3GgWKgI9cQanMHA&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92481%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RuLoXFh6YzZ27D9WAUa4Yg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92481%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RuLoXFh6YzZ27D9WAUa4Yg&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92482%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L%2b3mGMyRB0n7QNphvG6vQg&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92483%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NyATwOhgbkFeqy%2bMlu7BAg&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92481%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RuLoXFh6YzZ27D9WAUa4Yg&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92484%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IqWtzCsne1bD2dsh5Ab6MQ&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92495%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vePdqIoyUancAg7JN31aJA&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92496%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ACCENzYGroMzM2pKkYR1Vw&sysid=1)
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92497%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AusMS5vXAJ%2bwuzDV8vTxvA&sysid=1)

name: Virginia Charitable Bingo Association
subject: This is critical to the future success of nonprofit organizations
body:
Virginia Charitable Bingo Association

Sign our petition.

For years, Virginia charities have
been under attack with crippling charitable gaming regulations.
For many nonprofits throughout the Commonwealth, charitable
gaming is the number one way to garner enough donations to
sustain their organization.

Sign the petition below to show your support for charitable
gaming. This legislation will allow for nonprofit organizations
to operate under the same regulations as for-profit gambling
organizations.

SIGN HERE

With your help, we will make gaming
regulation in Virginia equitable across all economic sectors.
This is critical to the future success of nonprofit organizations
throughout the Commonwealth.

SIGN HERE

Virginia Charitable Bingo Association

Our mailing address is:
Virginia Charitable Bingo Association
P.O. Box 7 Midlothian, VA 23113

name: John Pierce
subject: A historic J6 case!
body:
I’ve been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case!
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5qmjhooambl3c92r6i5vj6cg6vqffs8vmnspd18_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg69or1clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u6omatpl69r3ecbjmdp74s3361gmed1keerr7d1mmaqj0ohkm8ob0o3kcoqefdpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhesqrcdtmc5j72dplmgrr1db5e8iv0)
I've been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case! | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9otou4ual94a4od7eso7659ishkoj9klagvifb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg69or1clh2bs)
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3mhuaqqn6ac00ldhsq654i5unkjtaej1ui3i3k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg69or1clh2bs) Friend,

[**Please donate $25, $50, $100, or more today to help cover the legal costs for the DOZENS of January 6th peaceful protesters who I 'm fighting for in the courts!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkljt6h2vpbhdnlir0dfmtv71lef3hd97rvdfum8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg69or1clh2bs)

**I 've been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case! **

Lloyd Cruz is a loving husband and father of 5 children, including his nephew who has been welcomed into the Cruz family with open arms. Let me tell you, Lloyd is a great man who has an unfortunate story like so many others.

On January 6, 2020, Lloyd went to our nation's capital to support President Trump. He didn't riot, break anything, or hurt anyone. He was actually getting lunch at a nearby food truck when he heard loud noises from the Capitol building, so he left his friends to see what was going on.

**Lloyd simply walked into the Capitol building, saw everything was fine, and walked back out without touching a single thing. There were no signs stating not to trespass, no barriers, and not even a single Capitol police officer discouraged him from entering - but now he's facing TWO years in prison.**

I've seen case after case like this... Leftist politicians went on their witch hunt, vilifying peaceful men and women and "making an example" out of them, just to prove their political point.

**But here is where Lloyd 's case is different. In Lloyd's historic hearing last week, we challenged the unconstitutional warrant that allowed the FBI to conspire with Big Tech to gather the location data of every cell phone around the Capitol building.**

**This is huge! We 've entered a stipulated trial agreement so we can pursue this historic appeal, which could impact HUNDREDS of other J6 cases!**

The rights and liberties our Constitution bestows are rapidly being trampled, violated, and rescinded by the socialist Left, and I'm done watching our corrupt government destroy the lives of good Americans.

I'm representing dozens of January 6th peaceful protesters in court - more than any other legal team! But legal costs are mounting...

[**Will you donate $25, $50, $100, or more today to help cover the legal defense for Lloyd and the dozens of other January 6 peaceful patriots I 'm fighting for in the courts?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zujjfv6gjb0iks9cht5k4sm77aij88aa7ic8saho_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpg69or1clh2bs)

Every dollar makes a difference in the lives of these persecuted patriots, but also for the future of our democracy and freedoms.

Thank you for your support and for standing with me in the defense of our beloved Constitution and our great country!

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Founder and General Counsel

clean_body: I’ve been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case! I've been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case! | | | Friend, I 've been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case! Lloyd Cruz is a loving husband and father of 5 children, including his nephew who has been welcomed into the Cruz family with open arms. Let me tell you, Lloyd is a great man who has an unfortunate story like so many others. On January 6, 2020, Lloyd went to our nation's capital to support President Trump. He didn't riot, break anything, or hurt anyone. He was actually getting lunch at a nearby food truck when he heard loud noises from the Capitol building, so he left his friends to see what was going on. Lloyd simply walked into the Capitol building, saw everything was fine, and walked back out without touching a single thing. There were no signs stating not to trespass, no barriers, and not even a single Capitol police officer discouraged him from entering - but now he's facing TWO years in prison. I've seen case after case like this... Leftist politicians went on their witch hunt, vilifying peaceful men and women and "making an example" out of them, just to prove their political point. But here is where Lloyd 's case is different. In Lloyd's historic hearing last week, we challenged the unconstitutional warrant that allowed the FBI to conspire with Big Tech to gather the location data of every cell phone around the Capitol building. This is huge! We 've entered a stipulated trial agreement so we can pursue this historic appeal, which could impact HUNDREDS of other J6 cases! The rights and liberties our Constitution bestows are rapidly being trampled, violated, and rescinded by the socialist Left, and I'm done watching our corrupt government destroy the lives of good Americans. I'm representing dozens of January 6th peaceful protesters in court - more than any other legal team! But legal costs are mounting... Every dollar makes a difference in the lives of these persecuted patriots, but also for the future of our democracy and freedoms. Thank you for your support and for standing with me in the defense of our beloved Constitution and our great country! In Vigilance, John M.
