name: American Update
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and governmentincluding an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0408%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=11bk1eVqCBn6qSyr%2fBKbmA&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656324%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0RoOrGCqD15%2bHlm3OFaDoQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656335%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mA1B9cW6DvzSD0uOOasIDg&sysid=1) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656336%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AHdfOJCgQILmog0P1RFdVQ&sysid=1) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0408%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=11bk1eVqCBn6qSyr%2fBKbmA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0408%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=11bk1eVqCBn6qSyr%2fBKbmA&sysid=1)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Inauguration Day
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57602825/388497885/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTU4ZTM2MC05Yzk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbIMB3RAd4rVz0OdD42goxF3h5qJwAJZV4pzc91_KSM=&emci=f306fdd8-b396-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7958e360-9c99-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
Friends, Wednesday's inauguration was a moment in time in which we, as a state, respectfully honored the will of the people and embraced a collective vision for the future. It is a human moment in which we as Marylanders all shared — the peaceful transition of power, a hallmark of our democracy. And our opportunity to ensure our prosperity is shared and collectively earned. No matter our differences, what we share is far greater — we share Maryland. We share a place to call home, a place I know each and every one of us care deeply about. And a place whose potential is endless if we all work towards that future collectively. At Wednesday's swearing in, we celebrated this magnificent state. Its past, its present, and its future. The Lieutenant Governor and I, as well as our families, could not be more humbled to be here with each and every one of you. We also mark this day with remembrance of who we are as a people and how far we have traveled. Wednesday’s celebration would not have been possible without the generations of Marylanders before us who fought for justice and equality. Their bravery blazed a trail leading us to this historic moment. As we embark together on our state’s next chapter, we commit to our shared mission to leave no one behind. Thank you, Maryland. Let's get to work. Elevate, Wes Moore
---

name: Your America
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and governmentincluding an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7896%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=1A1zveqocHOqDs5%2bynXOMQ&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92491%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HUHkEAd8LMNH%2fueiwvt63g&sysid=1)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92492%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=svlOy1r4ymrJThm%2fMxzU%2bA&sysid=1) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92493%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IdaQ8NZcngJlCfQwX4QnfQ&sysid=1) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I have to ask, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
It may seem like we’re a long way away from the elections, but the next few months will be critically important.
| | |
---
Friend,

We’re facing a tough road ahead: **_FiveThirtyEight_ reports that Republicans have a clear path to retake Senate control, and _The Hill_ is calling me one of their top targets for defeat.**
To defend our Democratic Senate majority and continue making positive change for families in Nevada and across the country, I’m going to need grassroots supporters like you in it for the long haul.
**That's why I have to ask:**[**Will you give $5 or more now to kickstart a monthly donation to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57603967/388502330/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2308-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTYxOTVjNi05ZDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8a4WR0rwkCN6A6DxEuClR_XHRIzhco7kBuoUWCDhrEw=)
My friend Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto just won in Nevada by _less than 1 point_ in the race that decided Senate control. The GOP spent millions trying to defeat her, and you can bet they'll spend millions more trying to defeat me.
It might seem like we’re a long way off from the next election – but here's the truth: **It simply won't be _possible_ to keep Nevada and the Senate blue unless we start putting in the hard work NOW. **

We need to fully fuel our reelection campaign so that we're able to fight back against GOP attacks, fund TV ads, and lead strategic voter outreach. Monthly donations from grassroots supporters like you help us do exactly that.
**Friend: Becoming a monthly donor is the best way to help us strategically plan our budget – and ultimately win this race.[So please, if you care about defending both Nevada's battleground seat AND the Senate, will you begin a monthly donation of $5 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57603968/388502331/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2308-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTYxOTVjNi05ZDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8a4WR0rwkCN6A6DxEuClR_XHRIzhco7kBuoUWCDhrEw=)**
Thank you – so much.

– Jacky Rosen

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Press Release McGuire Resolution CTE Signing Day 2023
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 21st, 2023
McGuire Introduces Resolution to make the fourth Wednesday in April "Career and Technical Education Letter of Intent Signing Day". RICHMOND, VA - Delegate John McGuire has introduced HB 475, which designates the fourth Wednesday in April as "Career and Technical Education (CTE) Letter of Intent Signing Day". "It's important that students are provided every opportunity to succeed, as they leave our school system into higher education, the military, or entering their career. These students are future leaders in their communities, and our job is to help them transition from school to the workplace. "CTE Day", in partnership with local businesses, gives them an excellent opportunity to learn about the options they have." - Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10
"The Letter of Intent Signing Day"celebrates the accomplishments of students in CTE programs, and is a unique way to highlight the "value" CTE education provides. It also highlights the role and value that business partners add. This event has changed the perception of the value of CTE, not only to our students and parents, but the community at large. This event has added excitement and recognition to the students who are a high paying, high skilled workforce." -Mac Beaton Director of Henrico County CTE
"I am pleased that our delegates have proposed this legislation that supports a state-wide "CTE Signing Day". This will enhance continuity across the Commonwealth, showcasing young adults and employers who value hiring our talent from all school divisions." -Bo Bundrick Director of Louisa County CTE
"Goochland County Public Schools is proud to recognize our graduates, who choose to enter the workforce and the military directly after graduation, and begin a successful career, without incurring any college debt. Our business partners enthusiastically embrace our graduates, and they are honored to be an integral component of the student's new career, by participating in our Signing Day. CTE provides students with the skills that are needed in order to have a successful career, and to be a contributing member of our community." -Bruce Watson Director of Goochland County CTE
"We have had the pleasure of holding a Signing Day event in Hanover County Public Schools since the Spring of 2019. This event is always a wonderful opportunity to recognize and highlight our students, who are successfully entering careers related to their Career and Technical Education (CTE) program, upon graduation. It also allows us to recognize our many business partners, who are hiring our students and supporting our CTE programs. We are excited to celebrate the wide array of what success looks like for the students in our school division, and this event certainly affords us the opportunity to shine a light on students, who may not have been previously recognized for this path, and celebrate their many accomplishments. "
-Justin Roerink
Principal, The Hanover Center for Trades and Technology Coordinator of Career and Technical Education and Workforce Development, Hanover County Public Schools
You can find the legislation online and read the resolution text [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00174bCBALLcZpYSDTzLsM8ZEG-BwhAYM-K-UiHYnuUfwkf1jtvnCmZtyzbWGmErWjvcCBa5aByn1cxMlmximukRfA6qEmQmUqbgVSwrGovSyOEoy0JjkZCQMRjWA51hXvfsv4aS-cCh7iqhy5PjJMLUqN-yhI5OGjpq7HHDX8DwVJmBjhi3LmHj3lbG6H-CmCfJcErf0KXUcc=&c=7ncpJAtevUwHeYai5GbiQQrw_KhwVchaEm8Rfgq6Sha8ED1ZBTGxrQ==&ch=7plki9n7WXIqGS5XZSNNVuTm9_-VYQWlxX-XZ5MIELMC1XCkp_tPKA==). ### Contact: [Press@mcguireforvirginia.com](mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com)

name: HER Time Petition Alert
subject: It’s time to get dark $$$ out of politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57604971/388506316/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2I2ODdmYjctYTA5OS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EEtqxO5OVyvJhCpc0NoT1DT1OmibNgpes5hUiknA2qI=)
---
Today marks 13 years since the disastrous _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision. Ever since that day, our elections have been flooded with dark money. The result has made politicians in Washington more beholden to their corporate donors than the will of the people. Congress has been unable to take action on the issues we care about the most. It‘s time we root out dark money and fix our broken campaign finance system. Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They'll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That's why I'm sending you this email today.

| | Inside this important resource, you'll not only learn the 5 lies Progressives have employed in their campaign to push Critical Race Theory, but you'll also discover that:
* None of CRT's policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl2a8hd6oiahl5s1fkatdgkr78p852eo42i0hsc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpi6ao34cth2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkvo1r41sahig6poigcde4jhloei972esdbss420_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpi6ao34cth2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeav8ptvt7l5kvgenth7luo4t7jihdi6ak79rjio_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpi6ao34cth2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Team Bennet
subject: Ending Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
The damage of Citizens United is clear, and we can’t wait until another election to overturn this terrible decision. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57605328/388507193/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWQwN2Q4Zi1hMTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tV34EskU_YTDy68DIuyetHwfZsgCWKRMv9aACggXOJ4=)
Folks — Thirteen years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled on _Citizens United_ and gave billionaires an unfair advantage in American politics. Since that disastrous decision, our elections have been flooded with ungodly amounts of cash and inaction on the issues that matter most to Americans. Billionaires spent around $880 million on political campaigns in the 2022 midterms, most of it favoring Republicans who will gladly do their bidding. The dark money pouring into our elections is drowning out the voices of hardworking Americans like you. Many have lost faith and confidence in the democratic institutions that make up our government. [**It’s time to overturn this disastrous decision and restore the voice of the people in our democracy.** **Will you add your name next to Michael’s and call on Congress to overturn _Citizens United_?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57605329/388507194/1674797218?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWQwN2Q4Zi1hMTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tV34EskU_YTDy68DIuyetHwfZsgCWKRMv9aACggXOJ4=&emci=d8777289-a199-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a5d07d8f-a199-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57605330/388507195/1674797218?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWQwN2Q4Zi1hMTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tV34EskU_YTDy68DIuyetHwfZsgCWKRMv9aACggXOJ4=&emci=d8777289-a199-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a5d07d8f-a199-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**
---
Last year, Michael reintroduced the _Democracy for All Amendment_. This constitutional amendment would overturn _Citizens United_ and:
* Allow Congress to set reasonable campaign finance rules and limit corporate spending on politics;
* Strengthen transparency and ethics in our government;
* Put the power of elections back in the hands of the American people and out of special interests.

In short, Michael’s amendment will undo the damage of the _Citizens United_ decision and give everyone equal voice in our elections.
[**So friend, if you’re with us, show your support for the Democracy for All Amendment by adding your name to our petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57605331/388507196/1674797218?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWQwN2Q4Zi1hMTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tV34EskU_YTDy68DIuyetHwfZsgCWKRMv9aACggXOJ4=&emci=d8777289-a199-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a5d07d8f-a199-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)

clean_body: The damage of Citizens United is clear, and we can’t wait until another election to overturn this terrible decision. | = Folks — Thirteen years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled on Citizens United and gave billionaires an unfair advantage in American politics. Since that disastrous decision, our elections have been flooded with ungodly amounts of cash and inaction on the issues that matter most to Americans. Billionaires spent around $880 million on political campaigns in the 2022 midterms, most of it favoring Republicans who will gladly do their bidding. The dark money pouring into our elections is drowning out the voices of hardworking Americans like you. Many have lost faith and confidence in the democratic institutions that make up our government. | Last year, Michael reintroduced the Democracy for All Amendment. This constitutional amendment would overturn Citizens United and: Allow Congress to set reasonable campaign finance rules and limit corporate spending on politics; Strengthen transparency and ethics in our government; Put the power of elections back in the hands of the American people and out of special interests. In short, Michael’s amendment will undo the damage of the Citizens United decision and give everyone equal voice in our elections. Let’s get to work! — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

**The Fake News Media is painting me as a villain because the establishment has directed them to crush our movement. They want to make asking questions a crime.**

**[It doesn 't matter who's against us.

As long as I'm still breathing, I will not stop uncovering the truth.

Every day more light is shed on the simple fact that **the Arizona election was RIGGED.** Americans are waking up to this undeniable truth.

Unfortunately -- the fact is we've got a tight timetable.

clean_body: It's a disgrace. | Patriot, No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election -- even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election. So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election. The Fake News Media is painting me as a villain because the establishment has directed them to crush our movement. They want to make asking questions a crime. | Every day more light is shed on the simple fact that the Arizona election was RIGGED. Americans are waking up to this undeniable truth. Unfortunately -- the fact is we've got a tight timetable. At MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, we're going to be dangerously close to running out of funds. If we lose our cash flow, we lose the ability to fight -- that's the sad reality. Best, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2441e3bdb804fb8a25cf387095fe711&_e=I2fRIfyi8Lrep365GuFNZQJ7XKMUkgpN5EuJRDx4wp1X0OKTtcXWbwiwlm1iH5ztcFrWgf-uwvlN4BbSBJytrAe4mAxdS1e5sNYqQpkLhxmYwU0myYC28Hhp54FKahR4QZRoX_5p1pGXNIMjhX_vpNFOpHcA5h--xx1T_mpTaRxe0it_U2RX30edcnMxp3h2qmpIRr4bkdNqjuKJxO41JBlM_e1obxpURorYdzrVuIMzIQkktN8gL_WKphZFKGzQmREH9enBgqjYFen54KlH3pamLONiGxynnVsZfWpzlVboIonA51uzWpFaNJo7tbl-mKHGVbqK2AXMnh4_tMLyPBRFe4evoLFn9rqhs5-8aqVHNeD0pSOvWpV7xLaLtzjCrvuDmA4HYfy8XAU7rpImQw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2441e3bdb804fb8a25cf387095fe711&_e=I2fRIfyi8Lrep365GuFNZQJ7XKMUkgpN5EuJRDx4wp1X0OKTtcXWbwiwlm1iH5ztcFrWgf-uwvlN4BbSBJytrAe4mAxdS1e5sNYqQpkLhxmYwU0myYC28Hhp54FKahR4QZRoX_5p1pGXNIMjhX_vpNFOpHcA5h--xx1T_mpTaRxe0it_U2RX30edcnMxp3h2qmpIRr4bkdNqjuKJxO41JBlM_e1obxpURorYdzrVuIOLZoaU_m6LobgNWsnjv20Ny3GiZuaijAZTGXOW0g5p0y1YiikMCweCavVos4OY9s89_wbDzCehDqxzlqNIkMFGSeZzrmu8qxOUQR6L_metSi2RuKSfaWoXI7LRMPmXHAgbrBVXsHZV-kaB3Y-MiIVZUyZAFH2LO07Wyg-oEt4aDw%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2441e3bdb804fb8a25cf387095fe711&_e=I2fRIfyi8Lrep365GuFNZQJ7XKMUkgpN5EuJRDx4wp1X0OKTtcXWbwiwlm1iH5ztcFrWgf-uwvlN4BbSBJytrAe4mAxdS1e5sNYqQpkLhxmYwU0myYC28Hhp54FKahR4QZRoX_5p1pGXNIMjhX_vpNFOpHcA5h--xx1T_mpTaRxe0it_U2RX30edcnMxp3h2qmpIRr4bkdNqjuKJxO41JBlM_e1obxpURorYdzrVuIM262KLVE_aXz2bRVVnts_85fTI5jaSbZDln1TVRwvsZSxEgblsSfTDLY2hMB9QoEU265PS_SnWCv2439845dVDI6WzwGPfOfvBxDj9x1Fb4KDf0a5AAJD3yEDgoYeINFx2yQuqT_hly7TOEDj1HSlZvmJQn1VRiqLyOLkAy5-zaA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=993851f55c1544a0a3604a825c5ca571&_e=RFhXCHdmK_KOyj1nCW75VnPoNVX4VnLcasgZYEX0kZHbVBDqx2r1XiODDw62Lr697wWb8qZ-UDEhdqtMKz1ttbPK5PwJwOAlHOL64tXJ9sZVsrsU8sd_Mg_GpGo5UxFiAS_33CXEJq3RntQt4QXX42YNDIkuQUKBqIcfcUppeTmxGPSjURlWj_AL_10eCmBDwj5uCQw7j0PVmz1PtpAvT5baqeg5lVGC-W6CUTE5ShnsNgXq073rGV_3LFe01ZIUxnIFbXNPEtiyNC31dBY99AT2GEjnn96C_mNN9UYC_XY9706LYNYkjrMOtuY-hXODrMzZfvDRlOPkdA371nibldk_OOGY1t1w4I0uJJ2KlwwNCoNLhr0AL_jI_FIuRa7Mof8PYRb6QZc93pkaaCb3jQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=993851f55c1544a0a3604a825c5ca571&_e=RFhXCHdmK_KOyj1nCW75VnPoNVX4VnLcasgZYEX0kZHbVBDqx2r1XiODDw62Lr697wWb8qZ-UDEhdqtMKz1ttbPK5PwJwOAlHOL64tXJ9sZVsrsU8sd_Mg_GpGo5UxFiAS_33CXEJq3RntQt4QXX42YNDIkuQUKBqIcfcUppeTmxGPSjURlWj_AL_10eCmBDwj5uCQw7j0PVmz1PtpAvT5baqeg5lVGC-W6CUTE5ShniU9s1SWIz9Ch_Th0orLSWjJE6Md8dvUNNuKji2YifpCnJAJYTVeS21Pb0gNqpB4rlR8h_IBLuX-BijvAEi763ROWTR8oJGQQFGTFY2IZrOx0tOP_R_FdH2UuzzoyxYTnoFq2yFdp8Ujt7lhMDnvMrNmQd3cFJcPDxSDDfcB6PdA%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=993851f55c1544a0a3604a825c5ca571&_e=RFhXCHdmK_KOyj1nCW75VnPoNVX4VnLcasgZYEX0kZHbVBDqx2r1XiODDw62Lr697wWb8qZ-UDEhdqtMKz1ttbPK5PwJwOAlHOL64tXJ9sZVsrsU8sd_Mg_GpGo5UxFiAS_33CXEJq3RntQt4QXX42YNDIkuQUKBqIcfcUppeTmxGPSjURlWj_AL_10eCmBDwj5uCQw7j0PVmz1PtpAvT5baqeg5lVGC-W6CUTE5Shnl576pXe1RlPfqraMtp_i3yYX2jZP8pCT8k2cSneDfJyRg20JDKN95II0NwELoW3UViXoSvKoK-JLIPYNn7rWoYFK0bWqMZKjVer_BDGlabYkCz5NE5GpVVTSRQCFxAFh_isPSPEp3SGqDe8D-djURl_mKP_hJp_QCcVoxHTdeTg%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1b3c908e412f4607864156e8e9724abe&_e=1sZ4ZUc4UYjEaDDZfBMqIvVTr6FldxPvWoouCLPA90GT4K3aZhlpJV2WwihC82IAPJqqzDTKZ-3DduhyJaAjO-F4mqpXk4whG4QhHTqJmoXznXEmORJSppC9yYAB7P13rqw0v6_00-0HSD3fSODrSrsuxc6vr253TkHzw7DFR2zAwQvGOfntFFE0_GEW-hyNx7C-WrQSeJ-hN07hwWW4oipNL6TKjac7o5M046CutRKYHQWgOvEsa3SUakYlGitRzBLPuX8PxKuYMDoNjjyKCbrq53qooQP-QGYLPIwoiXH_OQBpTgah9N_5v1yVUVlyYJlFLcOHWM7HmAbuQdDSq1ghFFx98B_NTwMhNyl8x_tgR7cPSRJ7z8pxDh_qiU_jrEMMgiMEOTtss9IzCI-enRZQyNRFWuQdOlJ63uhboU4%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1b3c908e412f4607864156e8e9724abe&_e=1sZ4ZUc4UYjEaDDZfBMqIvVTr6FldxPvWoouCLPA90GT4K3aZhlpJV2WwihC82IAPJqqzDTKZ-3DduhyJaAjO-F4mqpXk4whG4QhHTqJmoXznXEmORJSppC9yYAB7P13rqw0v6_00-0HSD3fSODrSrsuxc6vr253TkHzw7DFR2zAwQvGOfntFFE0_GEW-hyNx7C-WrQSeJ-hN07hwWW4oipNL6TKjac7o5M046CutRKYHQWgOvEsa3SUakYlGitR5nfJPRYvlg-aNmRcPSdDjImOyj9qKK4echO_fksjJknJINE_y5Mp942fpb5mWG8JCzSh92m9okCe8NTKN2MzS9iJ3d_rkHXx3RzGGwAfymOy6JOuLmJvWAmys0Ejh6JBHLbPBitnEEQP5CU5wNRopqZysFq3s4gJ97iksmEcmO4%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1b3c908e412f4607864156e8e9724abe&_e=1sZ4ZUc4UYjEaDDZfBMqIvVTr6FldxPvWoouCLPA90GT4K3aZhlpJV2WwihC82IAPJqqzDTKZ-3DduhyJaAjO-F4mqpXk4whG4QhHTqJmoXznXEmORJSppC9yYAB7P13rqw0v6_00-0HSD3fSODrSrsuxc6vr253TkHzw7DFR2zAwQvGOfntFFE0_GEW-hyNx7C-WrQSeJ-hN07hwWW4oipNL6TKjac7o5M046CutRKYHQWgOvEsa3SUakYlGitRQYV66qcL_IQteeIl2g24YqUeoV-n8p5TWayIptqXD1UFnwOLX7P5SKM2gMFN2ZOD4a_kTw08V9cUZjeaWKLCXKN1sClUaSob56ZNFrAbqr8o2pUH1KxzWEuDZPnaB7Z21yM76U2KDMmnVQg15mvQZvdR1P5qToLSAWhDG_VBBmM%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

This is not the time for fake B.S. messaging bills, failing to use leverage, and letting the Biden Regime off the hook!
And I don't know about you, Peter - but I DEFINITELY don't want to relive the Benghazi experience, where we got theater that was PRETENDING to be oversight.
No... I believe it's time for REAL oversight. name: Alex Mooney
subject: Kamala just swore in her majority-clinching vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mooney for Senate, Inc
body:
Now saving Joe Manchin is her top priority.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231060:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---
Peter,
---
Kamala Harris just swore in John Fetterman, her majority-clinching vote in the Senate.
---
_**Meanwhile, the rest of America is left wondering how a crazy far-Left radical like Fetterman got elected in a key battleground state like Pennsylvania.**_
---
_The answer is money: with MILLIONS from Democrat megadonors and dark money groups, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris were able to BUY Pennsylvania 's Senate seat for Fetterman. _
---
Now, they're gearing up to do the same thing here in West Virginia, where saving vulnerable Democrat Senator Joe Manchin is their top priority.
---
**[Please make a contribution to help me compete with Biden and Kamala's millions so I can defeat Joe Manchin and END the Democrats' radical Senate majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231060:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231060:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $20](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231061:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $45](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231062:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231063:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231064:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231065:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231060:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---

With the addition of John Fetterman, we're now dealing with what is by far the most radical left-wing Senate majority in American history.
---
They're only one vote away from abolishing the filibuster. If they succeed, it will have devastating consequences for our Republic.
---
_
* They'll pack the Supreme Court full of liberal justices
* They'll make Washington D.C. a state
* They'll federalize control over our elections
* They'll abolish the electoral college
* They'll completely open our borders
* They'll further destroy America's domestic energy industry
* They'll strip away our Second Amendment Rights
_

---
America as we know it would cease to exist in a few short years.
---
_Unfortunately, that 's not an exaggeration._
---
_Peter, I 've spent my whole career fighting for conservative values, first at the state level and then in the House of Representatives._
---
In the Senate, I'll put faith, family, and liberty first - and I'm not afraid to stand up to the woke mob as they try to take away our God-given and constitutional freedoms.
---
**Joe Manchin had a choice to make, and he chose to side with John Fetterman, Chuck Schumer, and the rest of the radical Democrats.**
---
He chose to throw you under the bus and enable their ruinous, freedom-crushing agenda.
---
When I'm in the Senate, I'll choose you, Peter. The American people will be my first and only priority, and I'll take the fight to Washington until we've completely drained the swamp.
---
Now let's win this seat, take back the Senate majority, and Make America Great Again!
---
**[So please, make a contribution to help me compete with Biden and Kamala's millions so I can defeat Joe Manchin and END the Democrats' radical Senate majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231060:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)**
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62231060:J7ElgKG6N:m:1:3331421248:6F041CC7B26C4D9294EEE371A89DE08B:r)
---
Rep. Alex Mooney
Candidate for U.S. Senate (West Virginia)
---
Paid for by Mooney for Senate, Inc.
---
P.O. Box 1863, Martinsburg, WV 25402
---

name: Mia Bonta
subject: Peter, can you vote tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC #1456426
body:
Hi Peter,
Time’s running out, have you made a plan to vote in the CA Democratic Party ADEM Election? Didn’t receive a mail-in ballot and still haven’t voted yet? This weekend is your last chance to vote in-person for Progressive & Labor Unity Slate [http://ad18unity.com] candidates – fighting for climate justice, housing affordability, and working class people.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/slate.png]
It’s time to Get Out The Vote! [http://gotv.ad18unity.com] Voting in-person is efficient, and an opportunity for voters to shape the future of the CA Democratic Party. Below are two of the nearest locations to AD-18 where you can cast your vote this Saturday, January 21st! A full list of in-person voting locations can be found here. [https://www.adem.cadem.org/where-to-vote]
Hayward, CA
When: 1/21, 10am-2pm
Where: 29475 Mission Blvd Hayward, California 94544
LiUNA Laborers Local 304
Albany, CA
When: 1/21, 1pm-5pm
Where: 1259 Brighton Ave Albany, California 94706
Albany Middle School Lunchroom
Peter, can we count on you to show up and vote this weekend? [http://gotv.ad18unity.com]
As a reminder, there are no names on your ballot. To vote for the Unity Slate candidates, bubble in their respective numbers. Here’s a shortcut with their number placements on the ballot:
#1 – Zac Bowling
#5 – Mayra Alvarado
#6 – Carlotta Brown
#7 – Victor Flores
#8 – Doug Bloch
#9 – Courtney Welch
#10 – Fay Eastman
#13 – Jada Taylor Folse
#14 – Renia Webb
#19 – Ivan Garcia
#21 – Rowena Brown
#22 – Alex Randolph
#23 – Seth Steward
#28 – Kevin Jenkins
If you received a mail-in ballot and have yet to return it, please make sure to attach a postage stamp to the envelope and drop it in the mail by January 25th. If you need help navigating how to fill out your ballot, here’s a guide on how to fill it out. [http://gotv.ad18unity.com] You can also return your ballot at any in-person voting location this weekend.
The ADEM Election is decided by only a few thousand votes, so every vote counts. Let’s show up and elect champions for working class people, diverse representation, and unity across our East Bay community!
If you have any questions about the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate, need a postage stamp, or need assistance with navigating the voting process, email ad18unity@gmail.com [ad18unity@gmail.com] .

Wade’s decision, and the GOP’s full-scale assault on reproductive freedom has only intensified. **Republicans in Washington recently passed an extreme anti-choice bill aimed to restrict abortion access.** **Safe, legal abortions are currently banned in 13 states.** **And Republican-controlled state legislatures across the country are threatening to limit or completely ban reproductive freedom in 2023, including here in North Carolina.** But this is only the beginning of their assault. Make no mistake: Roy is our last line of defense against this radical anti-choice agenda here in North Carolina, and the GOP knows it. Roy has already vetoed anti-choice legislation passed by the Republican-controlled legislature. **[And he is committed to doing everything possible to continue protecting reproductive rights for North Carolinians, but he can’t do it alone. name: ICYMI News
subject: Higher Education Opinion Survey
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze2i2j21681l5jtn3842k4nmecp2tn5nbdhh288o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cph60ob4cdh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z99d97oe1crm9n7l1uh1i37hluo8dfgq5h0adg0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cph60ob4cdh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z97rvk2t7hgsidrhrt27ss0na28r1caji8d34qi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cph60ob4cdh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f55ab7e30654895b6ae3f8068e0f3b3&_e=H--3vPSO2RAbG1b8tKiSYS6MeQsHgbzbDS63v6D6Ehew3qSqmluSgpfP_UWhrVOPmF2pnbnr83IirGv-9a1UUsyaykX-5YHh-Z7gKV7UawPNpzoyn8jMtRRl1LdLgKDnYgjtKExmI6dEc-veVkT4sk6dsiDbaXLbw4xsmUKVsOIyXMM05f8Q5fOlob66Ce4grM9Tfkn0habi7yZQ99TU5NWnhsjaFf6rdsH5HVoYSrebDD20TJkVrP2O5tfKFHvWnFVaIW8uXTJBureIFfGEMDPkdOgAdmtn3pxzmedoKcDdd-aUvfWtrJW2d-hp3c10lWf8nEbEIC-0yVn-X9dniDFtu8dg9H1-WuAILveC4vSXvq4AT_e_gKb1TLJA5IA6)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f55ab7e30654895b6ae3f8068e0f3b3&_e=H--3vPSO2RAbG1b8tKiSYS6MeQsHgbzbDS63v6D6Ehew3qSqmluSgpfP_UWhrVOPmF2pnbnr83IirGv-9a1UUsyaykX-5YHh-Z7gKV7UawPNpzoyn8jMtRRl1LdLgKDnYgjtKExmI6dEc-veVkT4sk6dsiDbaXLbw4xsmUKVsOIyXMM05f8Q5fOlob66Ce4grM9Tfkn0habi7yZQ99TU5NWnhsjaFf6rdsH5HVoYSref_A7kFyJI9ksweu1SSqHU4V6lP-3lfw4a7_GNgmKor6tdv-kF7pmlJscEEkIPYaFESB8kPhzU-0E5m8g9O8SCvwaJ4cxpTzPBP_jDFpixCvwCK9Y0j42TGoTXVknHmz7BtHVQ3Nwk_15Bc1RX187a) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f55ab7e30654895b6ae3f8068e0f3b3&_e=H--3vPSO2RAbG1b8tKiSYS6MeQsHgbzbDS63v6D6Ehew3qSqmluSgpfP_UWhrVOPmF2pnbnr83IirGv-9a1UUsyaykX-5YHh-Z7gKV7UawPNpzoyn8jMtRRl1LdLgKDnYgjtKExmI6dEc-veVkT4sk6dsiDbaXLbw4xsmUKVsOIyXMM05f8Q5fOlob66Ce4grM9Tfkn0habi7yZQ99TU5NWnhsjaFf6rdsH5HVoYSrcrew2P2DPB5ZV43oREM5AfTMyK9Jo8IiqxtSkM8VORW-cvge4nsWSpkdfhRO5IDbEp08bSG_i2i1Ju45YSMhm2a4cr1bSjFt8BuALiPrpo-nbEWcjGQY7q4IPn691nRxTew3E6uBnOwuoF80C09Zot) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

| Hi Friend! My name is Marshall Bush and I’m emailing you on behalf of the Working Warriors Foundation.
My grandfather, the late President George H.W. Bush, taught me how to “Be a Point of Light.” To me, this means doing whatever we can to help others, help our communities, give back, and leave the world a better place than it was when we got here. | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUcuO3CAQ_Bp8s8VjBiYHH5KM9qFVkr3uCTHQ9rDLw8OYsWa_PthBiRQJtURVU11UQ0-42DG8E5w3pldcDWAa21NMGSaUEErFnnSsVKUY1oyDGLBCOwxeWdcpsqiUYvSdjr459wSbYX_aDfvDSZjBcPUFqDkQwigYrE-kcf15nqcrYl8RfShnienDhrFdZWxM7RBzMGq2MXQJbrciuzYtgzQxyOjlkqQLLdzkKclqEiP2oHx5NyN2ZBhRnkDnIhfGAswpQ4Hy7KUHY7Mv2Oa9gteYk4YCBu2k8pOzw71SulyVHUMh_wxqq5HNn4zu7ierV1UlawzSqRz0WcIN0pgAQvEZPyCpEf7ZreoxzLB5LpPb16eDHzO_3FOhZXDWFOI_8GxNCe74-evz2U8_YpN6My3WOXvlomxk3Day7qF-o0fiG6J0e0bpFjm9vC0-5Xf_8tiKF9Ne-E-_X0n6vdT5PsHfzirS1bAoEsffmyC3HQ)
---
| I’m working with the Working Warrior Foundation to extend my grandfather’s legacy and support our veterans and transitioning service members.
**Right now, over 350,000 of our veterans are unemployed and almost 10% are homeless.** We owe them a debt of gratitude that can never be repaid, and that’s why the Working Warrior Foundation is helping fund efforts to create new opportunities in the civilian world.
**Our 2023 fundraising drive has just begun and we’re counting on the generosity from citizens like you to support our nation’s heroes.** | | | | [HELP US SUPPORT OUR VETERANS](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxVUctO5DAQ_BrnliixJ7ZyyAF2xGo1AiQQB06WY3cyXvwInjw0fD1OsEBIVkuualeXq6GtKDuQ8sAozVQrqOhBZbrFJSZlhasKY1ZXBYlVCFJKQoH1pUCHEqzQphDVKkLw3hbS2-zc9kw0oqubusEKH5SEjnRN3zQ9dBTqqs5Me56m8YLIDcJ38aw-vGk35JuM9iHv_eyUmLR3RYBlibJb09pz5R33lq-BG5fDwrvAk8kSkTth47sJkSMpEaYB5Bzl3BCBKcwQoXmy3ILSs43Y7j2BFz8HCRF00nBhR6P7a6JkvAo9uEh-DcqTkd0f9-ZqRy03VcFTDNyI2ckzhwXCEABc9OnfIIgBfuwmde8m2D3HyTlQdnp6el5eniPNndFq8_kbPGsVgzt-PH78s-O9z0KrxlUboy-UxY0M-0a2PaRvtIjdIoz3ZxjvkeP319WG-b89_c3ZSeXv9MHWG4n_xDpdR_juTCJFCgsjdvwESQW2Sw)
---
This year, we are partnering with a number of organizations that specialize in creating jobs, housing, and other opportunities for our service members and their families.

With a donation of just $30, you can help us create a brighter future for our veterans across our country. **[Please click here to place your secure donation or click the button below!](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUU2P3CAM_TXkloiYWWgOOWy72qpatT33hBhwEnb4yDDJRLO_viRFrVQJWfJ79vPDxr7l4sToSXBemV5xNaCpbA8UGG2hbQHEU9uwHJViVDOOYqCKnCh6ZV2j2k2lFKNvdPTV1HeiHeiZdgxadtagP5kz6I7mVHQdAlSun5ZlvhH2TOA1vy2miw1jvcvYmOohrsGoxcbQJLzfs-xetA3SxCCjl1uSLtR4l-cki0lK2KvyuW8h7IVRAjyhXrNcGDOwpBUztC5eejR29Rk7vBfwFtekMYNBO6n87OzwKJTOqbJjyOSfQXUxcviT0T38bPWuqmRZg3RqDXqSeMc0JsSQfcYLJjXiP7tFPYYFD895cv0xXd8vGvkpZFoGZ00m_gMna247-vPjm5-_xyr1Zt6sc_bGRb7IeFxkv0P5Rk_EZwJwtAEcK4frr82n9d2_fa3Fm6mv_Id_2kn4kuPymPFvZRFpyrKAiJffu2C2Nw)**
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUcuO3CAQ_Bp8s4VhBnYPPiQZ7Spa5XGKkhNioO1hl4eHwbZmvz5tx0qkSKglqprqohq6VsgDpwcpRGU7LXQPtnIdo4zTlrUtY_LYNhyr1pwaLkD2VJMDhaCdb3S76JxTCo1Jobp0ZwrCSCl62_dCC3t8eDg_MsaoFVQeqK58dyllvBH-gbAnPEvKby4O9SrjUq77NEWri0uxyTDPKLs2Lb2yKaoU1JKVjzXM6pzVbpIS_qQDviuEnzglTGQwE8rFAYGSJ0BoKkEFsG4KiG3ed_CWpmwAwWi80mH0rr_vlMGrdkNE8s-gejey-VPJ38PozKqq1R6D8nqK5qJghjxkgIg-0xtkPcA_u7t6igU2zzi5vpb5-_nn4_JDIq2idxaJ_8CLsxjc6f3b--cwfklV7uy4OO_dTUjcyLBtZN3D_o2OyI-Ese0ZY1vk7PprCXl6DS_PtXyx9VV8DceVZJ-wlvsIfzt3kWYPixF5-g2zPraJ)

I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56bd275ad5e2407bbf65f0488905a97e&_e=aih1zSc_N23E-egFCI6HVYVca6qaLlH0q8cnYEGOpjs92T0YIb6dYeIMASl7Sud4sZ64w9_5t5tm8tNaCrhGknZboPxh6iGK0cz74Ki3_eGFgiQaBsgCGgNAVK98cCOplINMyi7ZaHgO9pcz-GazVq8byqg8MVysYvj2FGsMcHF-l9xLCxs4Ol2JFN6RwnReAFcvgio1W_1gOfbMD-vha8YZHiuhVPAY5vtCglsOAyQtubU5eBRQaMZaTVr39N4cSZ6JC-TzG6n-gCQMPKEAY80G5Ondz2E2Jw3vWRB2BG4%3D)

Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56bd275ad5e2407bbf65f0488905a97e&_e=aih1zSc_N23E-egFCI6HVYVca6qaLlH0q8cnYEGOpjs92T0YIb6dYeIMASl7Sud4sZ64w9_5t5tm8tNaCrhGknZboPxh6iGK0cz74Ki3_eGFgiQaBsgCGgNAVK98cCOplINMyi7ZaHgO9pcz-GazVlaAOLVf56uHF0Cq3TYmyi934qEsWIqHHPY0mR2DHpXduxO67n-d_22tavQf9wU9HQiijf3PaCBSff0SdgEtlA6FplOxuzvfzLf8-sadQAM7ipt33nnrSi7ZmfcoduSWYp6LbdR4t15lx2mMlzF0Ixg%3D)

[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56bd275ad5e2407bbf65f0488905a97e&_e=aih1zSc_N23E-egFCI6HVYVca6qaLlH0q8cnYEGOpjs92T0YIb6dYeIMASl7Sud4sZ64w9_5t5tm8tNaCrhGknZboPxh6iGK0cz74Ki3_eGFgiQaBsgCGgNAVK98cCOplINMyi7ZaHgO9pcz-GazVvh6za_lj4D0Yk2ZQWiZugae1qn2j9iMt-_c2gxUTxr9igxVAO120aVePyIAR_a1AdORcV6A3Sz8NbKoqNFZDeaF4x9U581s_lab4wEXYqVqlNhYvDpdEbyf-tUMRqrRtLcSUUcnk_W39nem3soWMLc%3D)
---
[Get my book](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56bd275ad5e2407bbf65f0488905a97e&_e=aih1zSc_N23E-egFCI6HVYVca6qaLlH0q8cnYEGOpjs92T0YIb6dYeIMASl7Sud4sZ64w9_5t5tm8tNaCrhGknZboPxh6iGK0cz74Ki3_eGFgiQaBsgCGgNAVK98cCOplINMyi7ZaHgO9pcz-GazVgoHcKqaHk6tScC0b4HkHBJN4DUnqgWsJ1kar-r8vT89hQomhv89rcLiUhNVMi2SmTXaHXCSW960VkNzUM-SZKW0saiVvmGeNsn-vQ4OX1v50IGY09-tlF-AWHZHqmtWGzr1YgQvHbLuclNYksKe2TA%3D)

Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56bd275ad5e2407bbf65f0488905a97e&_e=aih1zSc_N23E-egFCI6HVYVca6qaLlH0q8cnYEGOpjs92T0YIb6dYeIMASl7Sud4sZ64w9_5t5tm8tNaCrhGknZboPxh6iGK0cz74Ki3_eGFgiQaBsgCGgNAVK98cCOplINMyi7ZaHgO9pcz-GazVi3bge81iJsK6S5_lkavABoB2Q_h4_lV2YZpNt6ZpRNZPf4oaZVCceYTjWxp8haM3QM3CmCGIIbI_HghjHJEsePfw3MmS2lODmP5VH19IzLNW6xb4CtWMVSKVa5xeL58BnBPktMpsIWFl3BGg0i4A04%3D) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56bd275ad5e2407bbf65f0488905a97e&_e=aih1zSc_N23E-egFCI6HVYVca6qaLlH0q8cnYEGOpjs92T0YIb6dYeIMASl7Sud4sZ64w9_5t5tm8tNaCrhGknZboPxh6iGK0cz74Ki3_eGFgiQaBsgCGgNAVK98cCOplINMyi7ZaHgO9pcz-GazVrdAIad2M2mmHhuvQ_aTMMPPhuUfTd7A5lIvRaNj2FEWD2CH3zUSD30OYBgmxBw9xKlEOtZYAfKGFV8zHfm9_xP54zsHf0hyWm--kd2NwpHtX3givkAPrqAiHaHsS5A535TauT1jZNjsb_xS1-1TiMc%3D)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4732b794ddb4326bd52abfeae99fdf0&_e=K1zZ5FmgMDsy1p2mmyE0Ji-fPNpBCLmFijHf_zDb2sv4EvVHXeK66qf98oM0yOg1fPvk0YnNHCDpYlHjSuQHuaoxUK48QDJFU8EQgR_-nKrNV8RfY_MrKIsERxZrkdGCpKKVksSUWi_LChsoz8SvFGeOCTZAdRMscLxSo37BxWXzNt4_fL-QnmtwYV23glHOuM120Wsd7yhYXxf3zRFQZH4GxZt94a-DJzcdKA9lDnFqc1X6G3OZtrL_gyTsrQjgA8RVR5x3esnUG7y_SMCP2rknFQ75LOHSSLGxpCtNZyA%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4732b794ddb4326bd52abfeae99fdf0&_e=K1zZ5FmgMDsy1p2mmyE0Ji-fPNpBCLmFijHf_zDb2sv4EvVHXeK66qf98oM0yOg1fPvk0YnNHCDpYlHjSuQHuaoxUK48QDJFU8EQgR_-nKrNV8RfY_MrKIsERxZrkdGCpKKVksSUWi_LChsoz8SvFFn3WhgjlrVHT-gJyqxm_jF6BBsvhZAt3A8AZZKxgmEPyPuNHMchbdO7H0DVbVxZHhl-5TY_B0DMdCr9hrNLhdUcm5CHZfsSc9lV5FIIk-Zb9w9y0V7tLbL-hC8DNiT2urwGMuj1MXYmOkmsQ2H4Fys%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4732b794ddb4326bd52abfeae99fdf0&_e=K1zZ5FmgMDsy1p2mmyE0Ji-fPNpBCLmFijHf_zDb2sv4EvVHXeK66qf98oM0yOg1fPvk0YnNHCDpYlHjSuQHuaoxUK48QDJFU8EQgR_-nKrNV8RfY_MrKIsERxZrkdGCpKKVksSUWi_LChsoz8SvFCiM9gR5sMODY6iXQFEC4_sIeDjLD_vhcyHsEhYEE2uYVgmuNSCAPASm50BeyEnn0QmDuoLi2PI5ClkohcpZysaKmI9oIaxyj5dO3qdsMn--nkQSOcEa8YGturtKhAA8rxn4KWjATPvR2y5pf0NAHx4%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4732b794ddb4326bd52abfeae99fdf0&_e=K1zZ5FmgMDsy1p2mmyE0Ji-fPNpBCLmFijHf_zDb2sv4EvVHXeK66qf98oM0yOg1fPvk0YnNHCDpYlHjSuQHuaoxUK48QDJFU8EQgR_-nKrNV8RfY_MrKIsERxZrkdGCpKKVksSUWi_LChsoz8SvFH5DN9-GOwOrwwkZNN2ulboofccDuvytQqndwUeTCusd7x50QjZ762E3FnGHaIysRjHuK_5NOLS59eHpGu8RUl_1bT-gI-qF6lZVeVAuDsAr1xr21G2EfAVBnp44lfAeHKQkJo8b6Il0L3dcLZLHrdQ%3D)

[**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4732b794ddb4326bd52abfeae99fdf0&_e=K1zZ5FmgMDsy1p2mmyE0Ji-fPNpBCLmFijHf_zDb2sv4EvVHXeK66qf98oM0yOg1fPvk0YnNHCDpYlHjSuQHuaoxUK48QDJFU8EQgR_-nKrNV8RfY_MrKIsERxZrkdGCpKKVksSUWi_LChsoz8SvFCXQ29G7q1LteCIxx8HRiPHuarEKVuM9OU6IKMCO05LwaVIIipxWRpD-pWO9Q6Qma4QY6w6l7Bl_N-YUno9RCsVSaYkKy0HJsDYAYJUnsfFpCtSXF8wjQ_4yu4B8FiREXy_71jKeMUdARL7dzeTlCM8%3D) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

name: Team NPP
subject: Pennsylvania’s minimum wage crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
This is the truth about our real minimum wage crisis.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57611475/388530970/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230121Wage_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2OTQ5Y2M4LWI2OTktZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUYvNeLugSpik8VggUIhELHf08qF96LyVs1M7qYcAps=)
| Fellow activist, it’s time for Harrisburg to get real about our real minimum wage crisis: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57611476/388530971/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230121Wage_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_A_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2OTQ5Y2M4LWI2OTktZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUYvNeLugSpik8VggUIhELHf08qF96LyVs1M7qYcAps=) Philadelphia has been at the current federal minimum wage of $7.25 since it was raised **just ten cents in 2009**. Adjusted for the cost of living to the “real minimum wage,” that comes out to $6.69, **making it the fourth worst city in the nation**. And Philadelphia isn’t alone in this. Our Commonwealth hasn’t raised the minimum wage in over a decade, with all of the surrounding states far above $7.25 – like New Jersey just raising it to $14.13 this year.

**[Pennsylvanians deserve a _living wage_ , not just the minimum. Our youth, immigrants, Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color especially know this all too well, and it is time we win a living wage that works for all Pennsylvanians. Will you pitch in $10 today to help us empower the voices of those who have suffered under this crisis for far too long?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57611477/388530972/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230121Wage_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2OTQ5Y2M4LWI2OTktZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUYvNeLugSpik8VggUIhELHf08qF96LyVs1M7qYcAps=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57611478/388530973/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230121Wage_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2OTQ5Y2M4LWI2OTktZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUYvNeLugSpik8VggUIhELHf08qF96LyVs1M7qYcAps=) Where other cities have established citywide minimum wages to tackle such crises, state law actually prevents Philly from taking action, leaving its citizens up to the mercy of the politicians in Harrisburg.

Despite repeated efforts to raise the minimum wage, the PA GOP continues to push back against any efforts. clean_body: This is the truth about our real minimum wage crisis. = | Fellow activist, it’s time for Harrisburg to get real about our real minimum wage crisis: = Philadelphia has been at the current federal minimum wage of $7.25 since it was raised just ten cents in 2009. Adjusted for the cost of living to the “real minimum wage,” that comes out to $6.69, making it the fourth worst city in the nation. And Philadelphia isn’t alone in this. Our Commonwealth hasn’t raised the minimum wage in over a decade, with all of the surrounding states far above $7.25 – like New Jersey just raising it to $14.13 this year. = = Where other cities have established citywide minimum wages to tackle such crises, state law actually prevents Philly from taking action, leaving its citizens up to the mercy of the politicians in Harrisburg. Despite repeated efforts to raise the minimum wage, the PA GOP continues to push back against any efforts. That is why it is so important that we continue expanding our voter outreach so we can win over Republican seats in every election to come. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us.
