I am so excited to introduce myself as Josh Harder’s new Finance Director. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57611570/388531170/-1943703552?refcode=E20071-20230121-MartinIntro-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U2MTQ1M2EtYjc5OS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zogdevs-xz5_k8z5qrqCz8qmW8QWLzM52GLiKefdUsc=) Hi Peter, My name is Martin Glusker, and I am so excited to introduce myself as Josh Harder’s new Finance Director. **[I’d love to tell you about my new role on the campaign - and if you can please donate as much as you can to help Josh have the best fundraising day so far in January, that would help me get off to an amazing start!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57611571/388531171/-1943703552?refcode=E20071-20230121-MartinIntro-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U2MTQ1M2EtYjc5OS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zogdevs-xz5_k8z5qrqCz8qmW8QWLzM52GLiKefdUsc=)** I’ve been working on Josh’s campaign for the past year and it really is a dream come true to be running his finance operation during such an important time. Josh is one of the leading national voices standing up against MAGA extremism, and it’s my job to make sure he has the support he needs to keep fighting. We know Trump and his allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene already have their sights set on taking down Josh. They hate the idea that a young democrat like Josh isn’t scared to call out their lies. And Josh is particularly vulnerable to their attacks since he’s in such a purple district. So as the new Finance Director, I’m building a plan for how we’re going to raise enough money to fight back - while staying true to Josh’s promise to never take a dime of corporate PAC money. **It’s going to take supporters like you to achieve our goals, and thankfully Josh has this amazing grassroots team!** **[That’s why I’m reaching out and asking you to please send in a founding donation to help us keep Josh fighting back! It’s going to require a team effort, that’s for sure.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57611572/388531172/-1943703552?refcode=E20071-20230121-MartinIntro-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U2MTQ1M2EtYjc5OS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zogdevs-xz5_k8z5qrqCz8qmW8QWLzM52GLiKefdUsc=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately_ | [**DONATE $10 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57611573/388531173/-1943703552?express_lane=true&refcode=E20071-20230121-MartinIntro-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U2MTQ1M2EtYjc5OS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zogdevs-xz5_k8z5qrqCz8qmW8QWLzM52GLiKefdUsc=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57611574/388531174/-1943703552?express_lane=true&refcode=E20071-20230121-MartinIntro-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U2MTQ1M2EtYjc5OS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zogdevs-xz5_k8z5qrqCz8qmW8QWLzM52GLiKefdUsc=)

name: Extended deadline for you (via VPP)
subject: last chance to congratulate Leader Hakeem Jeffries!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we need your signature by midnight >>
| **We noticed your signature was missing from our letter to Hakeem Jeffries — _so we’re extending our deadline for just 10 more hours!_** Rep. Hakeem Jeffries made HISTORY this month as the first Black American to lead a major political party in Congress.

So we’re reaching out to top Democrats one last time to congratulate him on this outstanding achievement! [**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM tomorrow – so we need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38678?t=6&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38678?t=7&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38678?t=8&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn)
---
TO: Representative Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the pride and joy we had when we found out that you had been selected to lead the House Democrats!**

While House Republicans are in complete shambles and struggling to govern, you have Democrats ready to begin delivering on their promises to voters.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremists in the new GOP controlled House won’t be easy, but you’re already showing impressive poise and leadership.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding accomplishment and to continue to elect incredible Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38678?t=9&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38678?t=10&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38678?t=11&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6081%2E878179%2E2FIrXn)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA

Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32ccdabdbf0c435e80ec102c2da31a70&_e=R-lzHXBLeqSi6TWXE0dmmZwnyr-fcO_39gHKOBCBnOf91n7C7BLJRPRjJpR89UqF86P28xWMt5FPOmAChESfYpDYQ9Aw4mEMVzcDun9BJFYZIXaPawbA7uR79CXwJh4e__bmPgHNPS5l4NMFg_nv0nzBlFcK_7COdKWUetWJ1GhZIYueKN8C9Jmt3lBVYcXgcpe1v3WXqk91SPfQRHmF-sw133Mdefl5G7H2GIqgxNLsBLP3VH7GFaUmxveEdav-WtcWidWg1u-PvmAOb6yOGdrn12OWZ_m2fKX7b97-WId3AgoFmy8g4YlSQTQhSnnX) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32ccdabdbf0c435e80ec102c2da31a70&_e=R-lzHXBLeqSi6TWXE0dmmZwnyr-fcO_39gHKOBCBnOf91n7C7BLJRPRjJpR89UqF86P28xWMt5FPOmAChESfYpDYQ9Aw4mEMVzcDun9BJFYZIXaPawbA7uR79CXwJh4e__bmPgHNPS5l4NMFg_nv0vrI-WQsyTodtRWJMZAQ_LuoMXf5UpIHVUz2tJR0_G8XFjdZ7G7A8DlIDuEVZ9Xi24MRa9J1HxVC5-kUPu48M-ldevu63aL0S4CQR6VtXG7UTtPLDkMKTE_D8t7Hq_tumCCu669t1Bsv8EAOCRFEwlyn0sv4Y6cC5wPyG0C4XoWs)

Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Worse Than Housing Crisis of ‘08?
body:
| | | | | Dear Subscriber, The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through. But today's housing crisis could be far, far worse ... It's not just real estate, but stocks, bonds ... even the money you have sitting in banks. Most people don't realize how bad it already is. The stock market has seen trillions in value disappear ... Bonds have seen several yield curve inversions ... And real estate has seen the fastest price drops since just before the 2008 housing crisis. But unlike 2008, the government isn't coming to the rescue. In fact, their actions may make things worse. I'm writing today to give you immediate guidance on what steps you can take to protect your real estate portfolio ... **without selling a single property!** All the details are in this **[free video from Dr. Martin Weiss](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b767db4e544ea0a6aaa2c99a29fceb&_e=4MCDoQz70URIKei9tQtzUS3x5w6yTCja7PPYqO9J3hsuMz5O-3TqLIFxr6gIhCWo7joFS3Py-LKJvhCgOMdd_N1k__Y3WYEd7LpWwgCPVWWpXzAnJHLHrBugBTL43TH49Wj2X333J9ZMMdvyi2j05E3bw_NGTwm1VYAVFDoWlcb01orPJLYzGGaopasKGSAtBjdjP_seq8Cjna75ocpRPZXZ1rB0vrrU4bBilzwn3I43NVS5j80jlW5lRXgrnoJHMPybGvSLJTEbppUpoleCIpwPVi6I4paXA4Cl9-iKlCk%3D)**. The free video:
* Gives you six simple steps you can take immediately to find safety in an unsafe world ...
* Names the land-mine stocks to dump with urgency ...
* Gives you immediate guidance on what kind of assets to buy to protect your stock portfolio and protect your real estate portfolio ...
* Guides you to special kinds of trades that have a consistent track record of unusual success precisely when nearly everything else is crashing -- they're called Crash Profit Trades, and, as you'll see, there are many to choose from.

**[Click here](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b767db4e544ea0a6aaa2c99a29fceb&_e=4MCDoQz70URIKei9tQtzUS3x5w6yTCja7PPYqO9J3hsuMz5O-3TqLIFxr6gIhCWo7joFS3Py-LKJvhCgOMdd_N1k__Y3WYEd7LpWwgCPVWWpXzAnJHLHrBugBTL43TH49Wj2X333J9ZMMdvyi2j05AB8EDVDc0H_WtRalVoiYP1OfwZuwLJY6ZbwtDmWCv2Y8VNjcxxis9zJNBbQaSdLlfSkjYHM1MRQZ5yH0ci4v18gxSf_ldgoXqgtqqtX6gxRfbX1bTGzfIOw9lxDMdkIu6oUGUsz5hmPSyTDV7AlFsY%3D)** to watch this urgent briefing now. If you own a home, have a portfolio of investment properties or rental units ... it's critical you take action now. Watch Dr. Weiss' video immediately, before the bottom truly falls out of this market. **[Watch the free video now.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70b767db4e544ea0a6aaa2c99a29fceb&_e=4MCDoQz70URIKei9tQtzUS3x5w6yTCja7PPYqO9J3hsuMz5O-3TqLIFxr6gIhCWo7joFS3Py-LKJvhCgOMdd_N1k__Y3WYEd7LpWwgCPVWWpXzAnJHLHrBugBTL43TH49Wj2X333J9ZMMdvyi2j05FBaY1dPV1qLXETIJO1LK8pWC_R5lHx4TOrEciF1jNASx9_TN4ZV8RO4NuxS4gzqwJQs39DSroh59FfGL4pq2bnN_zDwNG4IFY5ECEQONxZHY-Y7MnpfSWaw7GAgSjqMQlQ5L-vzKiv4WM0yKNb3MKA%3D)** Sincerely, |

name: Team Swalwell
subject: FWD: it’s purely vengeance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Kevin McCarthy continues to abuse his position as Speaker of the House to advance his personal vendetta against Eric. All because Eric refuses to give up the fight to learn the truth about January 6th. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57613305/388532174/-427451994?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQ0OGNiMS1iYTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLlPHCtlBe8HCFpfer_vfBohq7BT9eMLDksGTWgrRns=)
Hey team, did you see Eric’s recent email? Kevin McCarthy continues to abuse his position as Speaker of the House to advance his _personal vendetta_ against Eric. All because Eric refuses to give up the fight to learn the truth about January 6th. **Eric will never stop fighting for truth and accountability, so neither should we.[That’s why we have to push back against this anti-democratic, unjust behavior. name: 1600 Daily
subject: Is your alma mater staying true to their original mission?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1eh97arapmc3ml5a1jc86aum11tqsl30lrqh9og_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cph6ao74c3h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zod4bdceggshuq8sk6b7l1u8as5nj02uepkn69lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cph6ao74c3h2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3iua9lpj79njppuchec3rq4n3nj0f4lnvqq52ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cph6ao74c3h2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Medicaid expansion - a solution looking for a problem
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132764?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Rural hospitals in Mississippi are in crisis, we are told.** Unless they receive more money, some may close, apparently.
**According to those keen to expand Medicaid, there’s an easy answer; more Medicaid. **Rural hospitals, we are invited to believe, lose money because of the costs of caring for all those without health insurance. If only we would expand Medicaid, rural hospitals would be secure.
Unfortunately there are many in the state legislature – including some who call themselves ‘conservatives’ – who subscribe to this nonsense. **It's worth taking a few moments to understand why Medicaid expansion will not safeguard rural hospitals. **
Rural hospitals face a financial squeeze not because of a lack of Medicaid, but because Medicaid does not pay. Medicaid reimburses hospitals significantly less than the actual cost of providing treatment.
**Every time a rural hospital treats someone on Medicaid, the hospital normally loses money. How would expanding such a loss-making system improve the financial position of rural hospitals? It wouldn’t.**
The problem is not too little Medicaid, but too much of it. **Drawing more people and health care providers into this loss-making system solves nothing – and might make matters worse.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=67b506ed64&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket_
| Those that run rural hospitals have to walk a financial tightrope. On one side, they need to take patients on Medicaid, but they do so in the knowledge that they will seldom be reimbursed enough to make any money from it. To balance the likely loss, they must also find and charge enough from insured patients to recoup what they lose on the Medicaid side.
**Expanding the number of Medicaid patients would mean that they need to recoup more from insured patients, through higher premiums and charges.** If rural hospitals were forced to this, they would discover that there simply aren’t enough insured patients to cross-subsidize the cost of treating those on Medicaid.

**To a certain sort of lawmaker in the legislature, Medicaid expansion has become the answer to every question.** What should we do about cash-strapped hospitals? More Medicaid! Or poor postpartum care? More Medicaid! Health inequality? More Medicaid!
**It never seems to cross their minds that Medicaid might be the cause of these shortcomings. Anyone who questions Medicaid expansion is treated as if they actively want worse outcomes.**
**The demand to expand Medicaid has drowned out the case for making the kinds of changes our health system in Mississippi actually needs.**
**Did you know, for example, that the Mississippi Code explicitly prohibits any freestanding Emergency Room in rural areas, except in very limited circumstances?** Having freestanding ER facilities in rural areas might make good sense. Insisting that there can only be an ER facility if there is a fully-fledged hospital attached necessarily limits ER provision in rural areas.
**Across Mississippi, anyone looking to expand healthcare provision needs to get a permit – known in the businesses as a Certificate of Need.** It is hardly surprising that after four decades of this protectionist red tape, the healthcare facilities in many parts of our state no longer match the actual demands of those that live there.
“Okay, Carswell” some will say. “These arguments are all very interesting, but what do I say to someone that only earns $40,000 a year and can’t get the healthcare that their family needs? **We need to have practical solutions that will help them today** ”.
I agree. **Change is needed to ensure that primary health care is available at a price that someone on a low income can afford. Other states show how this might be done, without expanding Medicaid.**
**That is why Dr Lee Gross, a brilliant physician from Florida is coming to Mississippi to explain how he provides affordable health care to ordinary families.** Instead of asking for insurance or Medicaid, Dr Gross provides families with care using an affordable subscription model. It is low-cost, reliable and wildly popular.
Why not come along to listen to Dr Gross spell out the practical alternatives so that we might actually improve health care for low-income Mississippians?

**Click on the image below to reserve a ticket!**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=309fa91f71&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket._
| I hope you will join us!

Have a wonderful weekend.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7e6784bcb4&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, Rural hospitals in Mississippi are in crisis, we are told. Unless they receive more money, some may close, apparently. According to those keen to expand Medicaid, there’s an easy answer; more Medicaid. Rural hospitals, we are invited to believe, lose money because of the costs of caring for all those without health insurance. If only we would expand Medicaid, rural hospitals would be secure. Unfortunately there are many in the state legislature – including some who call themselves ‘conservatives’ – who subscribe to this nonsense. It's worth taking a few moments to understand why Medicaid expansion will not safeguard rural hospitals. Rural hospitals face a financial squeeze not because of a lack of Medicaid, but because Medicaid does not pay. Medicaid reimburses hospitals significantly less than the actual cost of providing treatment. Every time a rural hospital treats someone on Medicaid, the hospital normally loses money. How would expanding such a loss-making system improve the financial position of rural hospitals? It wouldn’t. The problem is not too little Medicaid, but too much of it. Drawing more people and health care providers into this loss-making system solves nothing – and might make matters worse. | Click on the image above to reserve a ticket | Those that run rural hospitals have to walk a financial tightrope. On one side, they need to take patients on Medicaid, but they do so in the knowledge that they will seldom be reimbursed enough to make any money from it. To balance the likely loss, they must also find and charge enough from insured patients to recoup what they lose on the Medicaid side. Expanding the number of Medicaid patients would mean that they need to recoup more from insured patients, through higher premiums and charges. If rural hospitals were forced to this, they would discover that there simply aren’t enough insured patients to cross-subsidize the cost of treating those on Medicaid. To a certain sort of lawmaker in the legislature, Medicaid expansion has become the answer to every question. What should we do about cash-strapped hospitals? More Medicaid! Or poor postpartum care? More Medicaid! Health inequality? More Medicaid! It never seems to cross their minds that Medicaid might be the cause of these shortcomings. Anyone who questions Medicaid expansion is treated as if they actively want worse outcomes. The demand to expand Medicaid has drowned out the case for making the kinds of changes our health system in Mississippi actually needs. Did you know, for example, that the Mississippi Code explicitly prohibits any freestanding Emergency Room in rural areas, except in very limited circumstances? Having freestanding ER facilities in rural areas might make good sense. Insisting that there can only be an ER facility if there is a fully-fledged hospital attached necessarily limits ER provision in rural areas. Across Mississippi, anyone looking to expand healthcare provision needs to get a permit – known in the businesses as a Certificate of Need. It is hardly surprising that after four decades of this protectionist red tape, the healthcare facilities in many parts of our state no longer match the actual demands of those that live there. “Okay, Carswell” some will say. “These arguments are all very interesting, but what do I say to someone that only earns $40,000 a year and can’t get the healthcare that their family needs? We need to have practical solutions that will help them today ”. I agree. Change is needed to ensure that primary health care is available at a price that someone on a low income can afford. Other states show how this might be done, without expanding Medicaid. That is why Dr Lee Gross, a brilliant physician from Florida is coming to Mississippi to explain how he provides affordable health care to ordinary families. Instead of asking for insurance or Medicaid, Dr Gross provides families with care using an affordable subscription model. It is low-cost, reliable and wildly popular. Why not come along to listen to Dr Gross spell out the practical alternatives so that we might actually improve health care for low-income Mississippians? Click on the image below to reserve a ticket! | Click on the image above to reserve a ticket. | I hope you will join us! Have a wonderful weekend. | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18868?t=1001&akid=2911%2E346206%2ErtcOeQ ][IMG]

Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little
bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the
year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just
$20 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my
energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the
link: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18868?t=1002&akid=2911%2E346206%2ErtcOeQ ]https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18862?t=1003&akid=2911%2E346206%2ErtcOeQ

Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP
spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were
doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising
investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were
making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might
that the funding will come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign
has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton
of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important
supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18868?t=1004&akid=2911%2E346206%2ErtcOeQ ]Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to help us retire our
debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker,
and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now,
we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230121-2911-footer&t=1005&refcode2=2911_346206_rtcOeQ&akid=2911%2E346206%2ErtcOeQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2911%2E346206%2ErtcOeQ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Patriot,

No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election -- even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What do you think about higher education today?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and govern
| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f67f66aaa3334f81bd87d357bf8e749c&_e=knVGtWukq5Gg6H6-TWt3tLtGyRCVeQJyOmy8g5p2mhtPVDjq8MGGi34hXnBPwToMB7LVy8PXCLBBmmdrDExJDh0BuLEvFpp-Cx38vB2TGlbgABJLCCEGP0i4oYFe1CFyBVKRtqbMd3tPldX3ACXRfSS0fBzlVmgg1mWIFbROg1_znQ-Nu6qp6U3J8z7eT10zWw7PhqVzYR16SEwY-J-doBl3LeqIBRTJ7NPexkN7OtQB9vlZ3nWocxyh4oCyAuIpyGcWX6JbRuQs46O1QqRnn4IKEu6U1nkgiob6kJbD8MXW9CIXJCFaxUmR997lypvgvm5owzLcmnM7alSpk3Led_Qaabt6AZ0Hqp_7zT_WTmsNFh9ZgvbTN91riHO_w6Xf)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f67f66aaa3334f81bd87d357bf8e749c&_e=knVGtWukq5Gg6H6-TWt3tLtGyRCVeQJyOmy8g5p2mhtPVDjq8MGGi34hXnBPwToMB7LVy8PXCLBBmmdrDExJDh0BuLEvFpp-Cx38vB2TGlbgABJLCCEGP0i4oYFe1CFyBVKRtqbMd3tPldX3ACXRfSS0fBzlVmgg1mWIFbROg1_znQ-Nu6qp6U3J8z7eT10zWw7PhqVzYR16SEwY-J-doBl3LeqIBRTJ7NPexkN7OtS7bxZyzfNFcWVCPNUiGmr9bF94BbrTyAlsw85j1HTabaPSxzlQNduwx1YUDlGeqsivdATuNbkGPoMe0qkWWwEjZ0pscF_z1CDeIvXZH-e6TsLFhR5S14-3NS7UwGViCFrJh0amznw8PofDEWF5Trwg) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding—even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f67f66aaa3334f81bd87d357bf8e749c&_e=knVGtWukq5Gg6H6-TWt3tLtGyRCVeQJyOmy8g5p2mhtPVDjq8MGGi34hXnBPwToMB7LVy8PXCLBBmmdrDExJDh0BuLEvFpp-Cx38vB2TGlbgABJLCCEGP0i4oYFe1CFyBVKRtqbMd3tPldX3ACXRfSS0fBzlVmgg1mWIFbROg1_znQ-Nu6qp6U3J8z7eT10zWw7PhqVzYR16SEwY-J-doBl3LeqIBRTJ7NPexkN7OtSnteEUNftKnW_UYRO5yl5tBJpWXhYPEsFbYAKVTdPT7LfQfyg8tOcqr_Rrm8PUTGCuHN66qTksVBlw40jQ2gguaU7xuD38V_QHd0-27WG5cveZJYz5QPtrg44QhmhmU6GnAeATpzHpf_LMXlI2IeK6) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

[**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zopqauodcvne690a58slerm70d872dugm82s5jo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cph6eor6cph2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

clean_body: Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri | | | | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? I am deeply grateful for your friendship. Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0a41031-a0bb-4aed-899e-2df2a1c8a1de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Pete Sepp
subject: Are we losing our economic freedom?
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83ce924ad04441d49f101fb08c54af59&_e=1C3Dscnif5oyc373xXn-cAwlL32kwoCKzm83D3MXGnmNqm2Fv-BgSwaMHh4ptSV8rtQ4v9uLTBuxfdLgXCvZ1CcICNISF2yVgzULCxt_sXbv5iwc54YbNKRf4pK1LjptiKiP-HpWh90ZjkPBR7VkZSA7vsPLh9GBYGGPIaWM7SD7iIS0-tkCsd4UVkQiB7VlcIyZVme5c0Muu44t3orGqWkT8RZuIL9YgIKB9iNSAb9_qWp3Po0_E7BbiY0Mvk6ZqWHf4t5yCfHqKeSQBlHWNUM0ZDPdBhdSdCWfC1H5Z5U%3D)

Friend,

Estonia, Taiwan, Cyprus, Chile, and the Czech Republic.

All five of these countries have something in common -- **they are all more economically free than the United States. Worse, the list is actually much longer than these five.**

Why is that?

Many people will say this is too complex to explain, but it's actually quite simple.

**Big government, and reckless fiscal policy, is taking a toll on our economy.**

And instead of cutting spending and sticking to a budget, the plan is to shake taxpayers down for every penny by empowering the IRS with an aggressive $80 BILLION strategy centered on heavier-handed enforcement.

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union (NTU), and we are the voice for taxpayers in D.C.

Special interests have their lobbyists. But who is working for you, the taxpayer? We are -- the National Taxpayers Union.

NTU is lobbying lawmakers to change this course of aggressive IRS action, and we need to strike now before Congress becomes further bogged down in political games.

That's why I've set a goal to connect with 250 new supporters right now to join thousands of others who are ready to fight for economic freedom in America.

[_**Friend, can you join the fight by sending in $5, $25, $50, or any generous amount today? Click here to become an NTU Supporter >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83ce924ad04441d49f101fb08c54af59&_e=1C3Dscnif5oyc373xXn-cAwlL32kwoCKzm83D3MXGnmNqm2Fv-BgSwaMHh4ptSV8rtQ4v9uLTBuxfdLgXCvZ1CcICNISF2yVgzULCxt_sXbv5iwc54YbNKRf4pK1LjptiKiP-HpWh90ZjkPBR7VkZTZFOQhntKqzgYAmnEL24lwgJ6rLw_cUkCcaq65tB5myAlHuXwFcqFHSm4Oe9tIz-Jpf9cTKTiMEYouUl9xiAwTwOIvnxBSG3T3TvKeAdqDzyluIoHkLYByUyOhpyJI1zFlrWX0zWN2_yjwO_fHEJWQ%3D)

**Here 's why the $80 BILLION IRS strategy won't work:**

For months, NTU warned lawmakers that the IRS wasn't prepared for the $80 billion influx in funding provided by the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA).

And, to no surprise, we were right.

Intended more to hit a revenue score than anything else, it is unsurprising but disappointing that this provision of the IRA. . .

. . . gave little to no structural guidance on how the agency should use its new funds ...

. . . and failed to contain necessary taxpayer protections that have accompanied other landmark IRS reform bills.

[_**Become an NTU Supporter to fight for economic freedom and tax reform today >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83ce924ad04441d49f101fb08c54af59&_e=1C3Dscnif5oyc373xXn-cAwlL32kwoCKzm83D3MXGnmNqm2Fv-BgSwaMHh4ptSV8rtQ4v9uLTBuxfdLgXCvZ1CcICNISF2yVgzULCxt_sXbv5iwc54YbNKRf4pK1LjptiKiP-HpWh90ZjkPBR7VkZawp_OoUUILi-6u6Nk4lO9PtsyzUmXHMs8mSYGnC8vNR8BI0Jc2ns2G1BJFttCrdjFrSfy0EYK6pNZqaS6bni2JnU060iuN7O0spj_d1a5n75pkJq3Pmt-YkgvPZ4FayaeRrRrwXOQyroM0QI662OYM%3D)

That's why NTU is working with members of Congress to support the _**Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act. **_

This act, which has passed the House of Representatives, aims to _revoke some of the additional IRS funding that Democrats passed_ as part of their Inflation Reduction Act, and which the agency plans to use for tax enforcement.

The _**Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act**_ represents a step in the right direction by rescinding misguided, excessive appropriations that currently go to enforcement and operations support accounts of the IRS.

[_**I hope I can count on your support, Friend, to help us work with Congress NOW to keep the IRS from targeting hard-working Americans. Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83ce924ad04441d49f101fb08c54af59&_e=1C3Dscnif5oyc373xXn-cAwlL32kwoCKzm83D3MXGnmNqm2Fv-BgSwaMHh4ptSV8rtQ4v9uLTBuxfdLgXCvZ1CcICNISF2yVgzULCxt_sXbv5iwc54YbNKRf4pK1LjptiKiP-HpWh90ZjkPBR7VkZVfJ_P6zKm5lOB-s4bIe-_2RagwuXXS9p2p620-5QLCmWNHVWqhnpS_yjckoByVqQ4YCDYYQg8PhoZTjCCtO8hViGSRMcQVhlWPouPJ0mhvo4UJdbBSfpqvGdni5UDotaMSya8qQJht0Lwkv_Z_RoTU%3D)

Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades:
* We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986.
* We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act.
* In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform.
* In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court.

But this all happened because of people like you who supported our mission.

Your donation will help us keep the government's hand from reaching even further into the taxpayers' pocket and work towards making America more economically free.

clean_body: Friend, Estonia, Taiwan, Cyprus, Chile, and the Czech Republic. All five of these countries have something in common -- they are all more economically free than the United States. Worse, the list is actually much longer than these five. Why is that? Many people will say this is too complex to explain, but it's actually quite simple. Big government, and reckless fiscal policy, is taking a toll on our economy. And instead of cutting spending and sticking to a budget, the plan is to shake taxpayers down for every penny by empowering the IRS with an aggressive $80 BILLION strategy centered on heavier-handed enforcement. My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union (NTU), and we are the voice for taxpayers in D.C. Special interests have their lobbyists. But who is working for you, the taxpayer? We are -- the National Taxpayers Union. NTU is lobbying lawmakers to change this course of aggressive IRS action, and we need to strike now before Congress becomes further bogged down in political games. That's why I've set a goal to connect with 250 new supporters right now to join thousands of others who are ready to fight for economic freedom in America. Here 's why the $80 BILLION IRS strategy won't work: For months, NTU warned lawmakers that the IRS wasn't prepared for the $80 billion influx in funding provided by the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). And, to no surprise, we were right. Intended more to hit a revenue score than anything else, it is unsurprising but disappointing that this provision of the IRA. . . . . . gave little to no structural guidance on how the agency should use its new funds ... . . . and failed to contain necessary taxpayer protections that have accompanied other landmark IRS reform bills. That's why NTU is working with members of Congress to support the Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act. This act, which has passed the House of Representatives, aims to revoke some of the additional IRS funding that Democrats passed as part of their Inflation Reduction Act, and which the agency plans to use for tax enforcement. The Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act represents a step in the right direction by rescinding misguided, excessive appropriations that currently go to enforcement and operations support accounts of the IRS. Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades: We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform. In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court. But this all happened because of people like you who supported our mission. Your donation will help us keep the government's hand from reaching even further into the taxpayers' pocket and work towards making America more economically free. Friend, can you help me reach my goal of connecting with 250 new supporters by clicking any link below? Thank you, Pete Sepp President National Taxpayers Union NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

* Passed onerous voter suppression legislation that disproportionately targets voters of color.
* Approved gerrymandered maps that ensured Republicans would pick up an additional congressional seat and take control of the House of Representatives.
* Passed an extreme ban on abortion after 6 weeks — before many women even know they are pregnant!

Approved gerrymandered maps that ensured Republicans would pick up an additional congressional seat and take control of the House of Representatives. * Passed an extreme ban on abortion after 6 weeks — before many women even know they are pregnant! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We’re counting on you! — GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Ted Lieu
subject: I am writing to ask you to contribute $3 to VoteVets to help them elevate the voices of Veterans and military family members during the coming debt ceiling fight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
One of the most important lessons I learned during the Trump administration is that Veterans are some of the most effective voices in the fight against the far-right's agenda.
#
Derek -
One of the most important lessons I learned during the Trump administration is that Veterans are some of the most effective voices in the fight against the far-right's agenda.
That’s true of some of my Veteran colleagues in Congress, but it’s especially true of Veterans and Military Families across the country who are making their voices heard.
VoteVets has a critical role to play with both.
When I first ran for Congress in 2014, there were seventeen other candidates on the ballot. VoteVets supported me in the primary and it was definitely one of my keys to victory.
Last year, VoteVets helped elect a number of Veteran candidates who might have otherwise lost. Their ads elevating the voices of Veterans were key in many of those races.
Now we have a number of important fights ahead — including the far-right effort to hold our country hostage over the debt ceiling — and VoteVets needs our help to be ready.
They are ready to work their hearts out, but need our help to get it done. So please:
[**Can you please contribute $3 to VoteVets today? They will put your donation right to work elevating the voices of Veterans and Military Families in the critical fights ahead.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230121-1-15&t=1&akid=7296%2E3013755%2Ey9UiNH)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: My hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57620068/388542418/1840278928?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTA1MzcxMi1jOTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6016Zix43KZBCei4NotjlZUOuG-cHwh4cJ_GLGnY7s=) She might not realize it yet, but the little girl in this photo is learning from her grandmother that her voice _matters_ — and that her advocacy can make a difference. In a world full of people telling young girls to be quiet and wait their turn, seeing my grandmother be a fiery and outspoken advocate for women changed everything for me. She is who inspired me to be bold and raise my voice. That’s the reason I ran for office: to be a voice for those who don’t have one and to take on the toughest fights in Washington and stand up for what’s right. Today, we have lots of tough fights ahead in the Senate: for reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, affordable health care, national paid leave and access to child care. I will be fearless in the fight to get the job done — just like my grandmother taught me. But I need _your_ help. With so much at stake, Democrats are hanging onto our Senate majority by a thread. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats to retake control — and after New York Republicans secured historic victories across the state during the midterm elections, the GOP is targeting me for defeat. **My fight is fueled by you and for you. That means I can’t take on the GOP’s megadonor machine and keep this seat blue without your grassroots support.** **So please, will you donate $10 or more right now — split between my campaign and Martin Heinrich’s — to help me defeat the GOP in New York, defend our narrow Democratic majority and continue fearlessly fighting for you in the Senate?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Kirsten Gillibrand and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57620069/388542420/1840278928?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTA1MzcxMi1jOTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6016Zix43KZBCei4NotjlZUOuG-cHwh4cJ_GLGnY7s=)

clean_body: = She might not realize it yet, but the little girl in this photo is learning from her grandmother that her voice matters — and that her advocacy can make a difference. In a world full of people telling young girls to be quiet and wait their turn, seeing my grandmother be a fiery and outspoken advocate for women changed everything for me. She is who inspired me to be bold and raise my voice. That’s the reason I ran for office: to be a voice for those who don’t have one and to take on the toughest fights in Washington and stand up for what’s right. Today, we have lots of tough fights ahead in the Senate: for reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, affordable health care, national paid leave and access to child care. I will be fearless in the fight to get the job done — just like my grandmother taught me. But I need your help. With so much at stake, Democrats are hanging onto our Senate majority by a thread. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats to retake control — and after New York Republicans secured historic victories across the state during the midterm elections, the GOP is targeting me for defeat. My fight is fueled by you and for you. That means I can’t take on the GOP’s megadonor machine and keep this seat blue without your grassroots support. So please, will you donate $10 or more right now — split between my campaign and Martin Heinrich’s — to help me defeat the GOP in New York, defend our narrow Democratic majority and continue fearlessly fighting for you in the Senate? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Kirsten Gillibrand and Martin Heinrich: | | = = | = = | = = Together, I know there isn’t a single thing we can’t accomplish. Thank you for being by my side. Kirsten Gillibrand | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Special Election Update (via DLCC)
subject: 3 special election battles in Pennsylvania
body:
In just two weeks, there will be three special elections in Pennsylvania that could determine the control of the chamber. | | |
---
| | **In just over two weeks, there will be three special elections in Pennsylvania that could _determine_ the control of the chamber this year – so Democrats must hold every single seat. Here’s what we’re up against:**
* In House District 32, this previously Democratic-held seat is being contested by an anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ+ Republican.
* In House Districts 34 and 35, our Democrats won – but also won elections for the US House and Lieutenant Governor. In HD-35, we’re up against an anti-abortion, pro-gun extremist who’s been seen rubbing shoulders with known insurrectionist Doug Mastriano.

Our candidates, Joe McAndrew, Abigail Salisbury, and Matt Gergely MUST win to ensure that these Republican extremists are kept out of office and that Pennsylvania Democrats can get to work fighting for working families. Unfortunately, these special elections are even _more_ expensive than anticipated because they could determine continued control of this critical chamber – Republicans are pouring money into these races, and we can't fall behind. That’s why we’re asking: [Can you chip in $7 or whatever you can afford to help Democrats win special elections in Pennsylvania and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PGWBH3oX5i5E46_BYV0jaKxjgbwfX9yNAxzYREaDDA7MY_juSUZ-ImDpEHr8_rGhM9rMHCDBeUmcgHCtPdDS2VBuQrPmTv8HfLuPoL2-5ul7WnD4T9v0t_gUyYu_Fqnat7yeUNdH6YteSt30fhLphzujSGuma1Yqu-pP8X6FdAYn2O3HnLczUiTOMwCyFeAxjQdF_Re0YwrNh9_x1LbPHcPRPIXRaGKGAaZGmfE9q5ctjB5NWJ2qMukxkKoahNqXHP5NAmAzGqQBBA5EOyIU8UlFUy6mYpWwbLypc8NZAp-_XGRdtGXOsWQmRObSTY4ADZ7WsUgJTaPxVyiTO252C6LP-i4QOg66FrixMeivgtESvOKgYtA-LVhwxMhQEDpoh0dJTR79nlTAsXDhRVL-qff-lfOTJIxhhavyLCTRfJNE/3t1/NH6AjaIsRACngcpgKHpUiA/h0/CUDroVRas4aJymneJlqBInfW02oHqOsaqV2UgFMXZtc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Our candidates, Joe McAndrew, Abigail Salisbury, and Matt Gergely MUST win to ensure that these Republican extremists are kept out of office and that Pennsylvania Democrats can get to work fighting for working families. Unfortunately, these special elections are even more expensive than anticipated because they could determine continued control of this critical chamber – Republicans are pouring money into these races, and we can't fall behind. That’s why we’re asking: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Here’s the truth: State Republicans consistently outraised us last cycle, and they're fired up to do everything they can to win these races. And, with the special elections being more costly than ever, we can’t afford to lose momentum now. We’ll be blunt: If Pennsylvania Republicans control the House, there will be dire consequences. So we need every one of our grassroots donors supporting us in these special election fights. Can we count on you? Thanks for all you do – your support has a huge impact in this moment. Team, House Republicans just officially took control, and they're _already_ threatening MASSIVE cuts to Social Security!

President Obama says Social Security is a promise -- one this nation has kept to _**generations**_ of American seniors -- and we can't let far-right, ultra-MAGA Republicans destroy it!

**We need to prove that we'll NEVER let House Republicans cut millions of Americans' Social Security benefits.** We’ve launched an urgent Democratic petition to demand that Republicans uphold this CRITICAL obligation -- _but we’re still short 48 signatures in Pennsylvania!_

**Please, sign on before midnight:**
[**Add your name now to defend Social Security from House Republican threats >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11602?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230121-BreakingNews-HouseSocialSecuritySignOnV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230121-BreakingNews-HouseSocialSecuritySignOnV2-Pros-sl1&akid=9550%2E9716520%2E0fJtju)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Getting dark money out of politics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter, The Supreme Court made its fateful decision in _Citizens United v. FEC_ on this day 13 years ago. Ever since, I’ve been fighting to put an end to this disastrous decision and the harm it’s done to our democracy. The unfortunate reality of our political landscape these days is that shady outside interests often have an outsized influence on elections because they have the most money. Millionaires, billionaires, and special interests can spend practically whatever they want to influence voters. **And in doing so, they can tip the scales in favor of their allies, undermining our democracy and the will of voters.** Outside groups run by billionaires have spent outrageous sums of dark money to influence elections and our government — spending whatever it takes to drown out the voices of the middle class, so they can make decisions behind closed doors in Washington alongside the elected officials they supported with dark money donations. Peter, I’m no stranger to taking on special interests. And I strongly support overturning _Citizens United_ to end the flood of dark money in our elections. **Heck, I was the #1 target of outside money when I ran for re-election.** That’s why our campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you — because people should decide elections, not shady special interests. [**Dark money groups have been undermining American democracy for well over a decade now, and our communities have paid the price. Add your name to join me in calling for a constitutional amendment to end _Citizens United_.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57605489/388507921/-1775558013?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_AM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTY4NThhYS1hMjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CofPTxF1_AOMCyyQSc4iUa0QKPuNu5TRvDMlQzz6pwc=&emci=32af68de-0d99-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=1e6858aa-a299-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57605490/388507922/-1775558013?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_AM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTY4NThhYS1hMjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CofPTxF1_AOMCyyQSc4iUa0QKPuNu5TRvDMlQzz6pwc=&emci=32af68de-0d99-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=1e6858aa-a299-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)
---
Thanks for your support on this important issue. Together, we’re going to show that our grassroots team has what it takes to stand up to these special interest groups — _and win_.
— Tammy

China admitted to knowing the COVID genetic sequence to develop a vaccine in __early January 2020._ __

_ Our tax dollars funded a Chinese Military Research Institute, where a coronavirus scientist **_developed a COVID vaccine_** _**_in February 2020_**_** _, well before COVID became a pandemic._****_

_**[_**> > HELP RAND UNCOVER THE TRUTH ABOUT COVID <<**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2336c054b1&e=fdefed58de)**
** U.S. intelligence agencies refuse to name the “scientific experts” used to oversee China’s gain-of-function research.

One of the “scientific experts” taking part in these gain-of-function experiments brought NIH funding directly to the Wuhan Institute of Virology, where the COVID lab leak took place. **Friend, the intelligence community can try to cover up what REALLY took place throughout the COVID pandemic, but we’re not letting this go.** **_We’re going to uncover the truth because the_**** _millions_**** _of Americans who died during the pandemic deserve better._**[ _**I AGREE >>**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2f35e060c0&e=fdefed58de) [_**Stand with Rand: Chip in to pull funding from the intel community for their COVID cover-up. >>**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fec4a0e41f&e=fdefed58de)

name: Team Crow
subject: Become a citizen co-sponsor: It’s time for Congress to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —

Tomorrow would’ve marked 50 years since the Supreme Court’s decision on Roe v. Wade.

For 49 years, Roe affirmed that every woman not only had autonomy of her own body, but also access to safe, reproductive health care was a constitutional right.

By overturning Roe, the Supreme Court erased decades of progress and is endangering the health, freedom, and opportunity for millions of Americans.

It’s clear overturning Roe is just the beginning. Now, extremist lawmakers are pushing draconian abortion bans in states across the country — some at the point of conception.

Personal health care decisions should be made between a woman and her doctor — not politicians. We need to fight like hell so everybody has access to the care they need.

Here’s how Congress can take action: The Women’s Health Protection Act (WHPA) would protect the right to reproductive health care throughout the United States — free from restrictions and bans. As an early co-sponsor of the WHPA, Jason has been on the frontlines to defend reproductive rights. We must get this legislation passed.

Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of the Women’s Health Protection Act >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2021-01-whpa]

ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2021-01-whpa]

Thank you,

Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Hi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends, you know the expression, “New year, new me”? Well, I wouldn’t go that far exactly, but I will say: New year, new email program! That’s right - we’re changing things up around here.

You know the political emails you get flooding your inbox pretending like the sky is falling, or like someone’s dog wrote the email?

We’re going to be doing the opposite. No pretending, no pretenses, just me.

Here it goes: We’re nearly three weeks into things, and while we got off to a slow start when it took the GOP five days and 15 votes to elect a Speaker of the House, I’m so excited to represent my hometown and my generation in the 118th Congress! As we kick off this new year and get down to work in Washington, here’s what I’m going to be focused on:

Investing in children and families. Millions of kids experience poverty in the U.S., and the fact is that childhood poverty is a policy choice. We know how to address this issue and we have data to back it up - the American Rescue Plan and the expansion of the Child Tax Credit started to lift millions of kids out of poverty. But those solutions were only temporary, and everyone with the ability to impact policy - whether that’s me in the halls of Congress or you reaching out to your elected officials up and down the ballot to advocate on their behalf - should be pushing to find and enact long-term solutions to support our kids. We need to rethink our social safety net and address the child poverty and child care crises in this country — and that will continue to be a big focus of mine in 2023.

Foreign policy for the future. We are at an inflection point for the world, and to make sure the United States continues to lead, we need to rethink how we engage with the rest of the world. We need to work to prevent conflict and not just wait for a crisis to respond, we need to lead with our values, and we need to invest in what will help us solve the challenges of the future, not continue fighting the wars of the past.

Innovation and emerging technologies. As our world evolves, I also want to make sure our government is evolving too – both in how it operates and in the challenges it addresses. Last year, I introduced the My Body My Data Act to create a new national standard to protect personal reproductive health data. We know our privacy laws are way behind the times, and as a digital native who uses apps for my reproductive health, I’m grateful to be able to lead in this space. We also need to make sure that new technologies are helping create the society we want to live in, not exacerbate existing inequalities.
There’s plenty more of course, but hopefully that gives you an idea of some of the things I spend my time thinking about. In addition to these policy areas, I hope to use 2023 - and beyond - to focus on restoring faith and trust in government. I ran for office because I believe - very strongly - that our government has the power to improve people’s lives in ways both big and small. But the reality is that far too many people have lost trust in our institutions. Until we figure out how to rebuild that trust, we won’t be able to be as effective as we need to be – to hear from our communities and to deliver on our promises. I’m committed to doing everything I can on this front, and I hope you’ll join me.

With that being said, here’s a bit more about what you can expect from my emails this year:

I’m only going to email you when I have something to say. Sounds simple, but I know we all get plenty of emails that say basically nothing at all - so I’m going to avoid that here!

Second, I’m telling you upfront that I will be asking for your support this year. Building up grassroots power in the form of petition signatures, survey responses, and yes, donations, is a critical part of being a successful public servant, and I will be relying on you as the cycle continues and as we get closer to re-election in 2024.

Finally, I really hope that these missives add some value to your inbox. Whether it’s filling you in on what’s happening on the House floor or updating you on events or initiatives at home in San Diego, I want you to actually enjoy reading these! If all this doesn’t sound like it’s your speed, I totally get it and I welcome you to unsubscribe if you prefer. You can do so by clicking this link, and we’ll take you right off the list.

This was a pretty long email, so if you’ve made it this far, I offer this pic of my family dog Winston as a reward. Winston is currently being spoiled by my mom at home in San Diego, and I love seeing him whenever I’m there.

Thanks for reading. More to come soon.

Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

San Diego, CA 92112

clean_body: Friends, you know the expression, “New year, new me”? Well, I wouldn’t go that far exactly, but I will say: New year, new email program! That’s right - we’re changing things up around here. You know the political emails you get flooding your inbox pretending like the sky is falling, or like someone’s dog wrote the email? We’re going to be doing the opposite. No pretending, no pretenses, just me. Here it goes: We’re nearly three weeks into things, and while we got off to a slow start when it took the GOP five days and 15 votes to elect a Speaker of the House, I’m so excited to represent my hometown and my generation in the 118th Congress! As we kick off this new year and get down to work in Washington, here’s what I’m going to be focused on: Investing in children and families. Millions of kids experience poverty in the U.S., and the fact is that childhood poverty is a policy choice. We know how to address this issue and we have data to back it up - the American Rescue Plan and the expansion of the Child Tax Credit started to lift millions of kids out of poverty. But those solutions were only temporary, and everyone with the ability to impact policy - whether that’s me in the halls of Congress or you reaching out to your elected officials up and down the ballot to advocate on their behalf - should be pushing to find and enact long-term solutions to support our kids. We need to rethink our social safety net and address the child poverty and child care crises in this country — and that will continue to be a big focus of mine in 2023. Foreign policy for the future. We are at an inflection point for the world, and to make sure the United States continues to lead, we need to rethink how we engage with the rest of the world. We need to work to prevent conflict and not just wait for a crisis to respond, we need to lead with our values, and we need to invest in what will help us solve the challenges of the future, not continue fighting the wars of the past. Innovation and emerging technologies. As our world evolves, I also want to make sure our government is evolving too – both in how it operates and in the challenges it addresses. Last year, I introduced the My Body My Data Act to create a new national standard to protect personal reproductive health data. We know our privacy laws are way behind the times, and as a digital native who uses apps for my reproductive health, I’m grateful to be able to lead in this space. We also need to make sure that new technologies are helping create the society we want to live in, not exacerbate existing inequalities. There’s plenty more of course, but hopefully that gives you an idea of some of the things I spend my time thinking about. In addition to these policy areas, I hope to use 2023 - and beyond - to focus on restoring faith and trust in government. I ran for office because I believe - very strongly - that our government has the power to improve people’s lives in ways both big and small. But the reality is that far too many people have lost trust in our institutions. Until we figure out how to rebuild that trust, we won’t be able to be as effective as we need to be – to hear from our communities and to deliver on our promises. I’m committed to doing everything I can on this front, and I hope you’ll join me. With that being said, here’s a bit more about what you can expect from my emails this year: I’m only going to email you when I have something to say. Sounds simple, but I know we all get plenty of emails that say basically nothing at all - so I’m going to avoid that here! Second, I’m telling you upfront that I will be asking for your support this year. Building up grassroots power in the form of petition signatures, survey responses, and yes, donations, is a critical part of being a successful public servant, and I will be relying on you as the cycle continues and as we get closer to re-election in 2024. Finally, I really hope that these missives add some value to your inbox. Whether it’s filling you in on what’s happening on the House floor or updating you on events or initiatives at home in San Diego, I want you to actually enjoy reading these! If all this doesn’t sound like it’s your speed, I totally get it and I welcome you to unsubscribe if you prefer. You can do so by clicking this link, and we’ll take you right off the list. This was a pretty long email, so if you’ve made it this far, I offer this pic of my family dog Winston as a reward. Winston is currently being spoiled by my mom at home in San Diego, and I love seeing him whenever I’m there. Thanks for reading. More to come soon. Sara Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States [] [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

subject: We will never accept a single cent of corporate money.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Here at JD, we believe that our elections and campaigns should be powered
by the people, not dark money groups and special interests. We’re a
grassroots movement funded by supporters like you — because we refuse to
be beholden to corporations.

We will never accept a single cent of corporate PAC money. But we’re still
the exception. We can never have a real democracy as long as corporations
and dark money groups can influence the outcome of elections.

Nine out of ten times, the candidate with more money in a race wins — and
if that’s corporate PAC money, it comes with strings attached. That’s why
our Justice Democrats ran and won without any corporate PAC money, proving
it can be done.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230121-27151&t=1001&akid=27151%2E1203867%2EqaG01_ ]Imagine elections without any corporate influence — that’s the future
we want to build. Will you chip in $3 today so we can
recruit the bold candidates who will fight to make it a reality?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230121-27151&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27151%2E1203867%2EqaG01_ ]Contribute $3

Legislation needs to put our people first, not profit — and that can’t
happen when our elected representatives are being influenced by
corporations and industries.

Allowing corporate groups to continue bankrolling elections just creates
major ethical issues when their chosen candidates actually start
legislating. Justice Democrat Summer Lee is speaking out against the clear
conflict of interest and we’re with her.

That’s exactly why JD exists: to show that we can run people-powered
campaigns and win. AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee — we’ve
proved over and over again that we don’t need to sacrifice principles to
send progressive champions to Congress.

But we need to make change on a bigger scale, and if we want to change the
way elections are funded, we need to keep expanding our progressive bloc
with every cycle. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230121-27151&t=1021&akid=27151%2E1203867%2EqaG01_ ]Can you rush $3 or more as we work
around the clock to find our next Justice Democrats to join the Squad and
fight for campaign finance reform?

Thank you,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27151%2E1203867%2EqaG01_ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27151%2E1203867%2EqaG01_ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230121-27151-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27151_1203867_qaG01_&akid=27151%2E1203867%2EqaG01_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27151%2E1203867%2EqaG01_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
