name: Trump News HQ
subject: Is your alma mater staying true to their original mission?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6l4jqac9dq461dqf09q9ub5e609pk9n0e5su60o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpj62o72clh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkams50bn2jc564ju0rmjvcnmls01oh64312sj5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpj62o72clh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zidmqg965p357nde3njb10gpjqq6stjb40necj5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cpj62o72clh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Team Joe
subject: [3 min read] Your Team Joe updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Your support is crucial to winning back the House and continuing to build a better America. Keep reading to see the progress Pres. Biden and Democrats have made this week, and learn how you can help → | | |
---
Happy Friday, Peter! We wanted to take a minute to talk about priorities: ✅ Democrats passed legislation to make the ultra-wealthy and big corporations start to pay their fair share ❌ 221 House Republicans voted this week to undo legislation to make the ultra-wealthy and big corporations start to pay their fair share in taxes, at the expense of middle-class Americans -- _and add $114 billion to the deficit_ The contrast between the parties couldn’t be clearer. The DNC is already laying the groundwork to take back the House in 2024, but we need your help. Democrats are building an economy from the bottom up and the middle out. The most recent Consumer Price Index report showed annual inflation has been declining for the past six months in a row -- and that’s not all, Peter. Take a look at what else the report showed:
📉Annual inflation fell to 6.5%, the lowest level since October 2021

🍔Food inflation is slowing
🚙The cost of goods is falling as prices for electronics and used cars come down
**President Biden is committed to lowering costs for the American people and giving middle-class families a little more breathing room, and it’s clear he’s delivering.**

If you’d like to only receive our most important emails, **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk6gVFZ1bAZYY22mWHMkylx6D41qn2gKhMpZbKNdWwx232ioycgdQRZbPBw3W11QF2PANbO1zoG7gRvKYIDbeieBKYQrqpnut8MQVZxwK0p5EhVMdCWQuuasHffPUE8LRju5I_gvlOpteocyvvF0CvE4iwMkolja6j0KjMYQoBzt-mgfuJAZjtb6U-w5q9I8f_K9bOilcN8rRKLxi3Zs4yHyLPxblmwvB8DcWoyIAt7kbBFiIcS7igTMdaO1aRHTUv7HIgd4sgBgs-plncr9ap8/3t1/EQrKjviETiKDSuFDG99dnw/h18/dUFT7VLYP4cUpjf_EHGPN5EM30eCUMb76-Ma11Qw9fw)** If you’d like to unsubscribe from all Democratic HQ emails, you can **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWalZZNA-6Dgih5xl3OksSqxkXgGa61T9SBlnf-3sR59VTYRojT4JiNO7K5pD3AglU9Z99kvDyGG0qgAUfatZRLXscAFga-Rg8KTv9rafVBQdKAJeWibf_Bc7hdUWY478LK3tRUF5oReiCPkiaaiLVSuWs_Y5xOAP602QM57TiQLWaD6RzJhvIkBUHvsg0HVQliegtDY7DNSkbzIRH_ohtoySuAA5nTHIs7eEuKPFfYEAsz8KEW2W5vPqWPVT-Z7Zt_t90OxCJZAROji6bkzLv/3t1/EQrKjviETiKDSuFDG99dnw/h19/FyfoE26opnA-ACANyZRIz6H1O9bPh-Frazutqmxup7k)**

clean_body: Your support is crucial to winning back the House and continuing to build a better America. Keep reading to see the progress Pres. Biden and Democrats have made this week, and learn how you can help → | | | Happy Friday, Peter! We wanted to take a minute to talk about priorities: ✅ Democrats passed legislation to make the ultra-wealthy and big corporations start to pay their fair share ❌ 221 House Republicans voted this week to undo legislation to make the ultra-wealthy and big corporations start to pay their fair share in taxes, at the expense of middle-class Americans -- and add $114 billion to the deficit The contrast between the parties couldn’t be clearer. The DNC is already laying the groundwork to take back the House in 2024, but we need your help. The early support of this grassroots team helped make the investments Democratic candidates need to win up and down the ballot, and now we’re counting on you to | | | Your support is crucial to winning back the House and continuing to build a better America. Keep reading to see the progress President Biden and Democrats have made this week → PRESIDENT BIDEN’S ECONOMIC PLAN IS WORKING Democrats are building an economy from the bottom up and the middle out. The most recent Consumer Price Index report showed annual inflation has been declining for the past six months in a row -- and that’s not all, Peter. Take a look at what else the report showed: 📉Annual inflation fell to 6.5%, the lowest level since October 2021 ⛽Gas is down more than $1.70 from its peak 🍔Food inflation is slowing 🚙The cost of goods is falling as prices for electronics and used cars come down President Biden is committed to lowering costs for the American people and giving middle-class families a little more breathing room, and it’s clear he’s delivering. CELEBRATING TWO YEARS OF BIDEN-HARRIS This Friday marked the two-year anniversary of President Biden and Vice President Harris’s inauguration. In 2020, we protected our House majority, flipped the Senate, and won back the White House. And in the two years since, the Biden-Harris team and congressional Democrats have worked to pass historic legislation to build our nation back better than before. | | This progress is thanks to this grassroots team. Because of your support of the DNC and their voter protection efforts, organizing, and data and technology efforts, we’ve elected Democrats at every level across the country -- so thank you, Peter! SETTING RECORDS FOR NEW SMALL BUSINESSES President Biden’s first two years in office have been the two greatest years for new small business applications on record. With the unemployment rate matching a 50-year low and the two strongest years of job creation on record, this is just the latest confirmation that the president’s economic plan is working. To celebrate the creation of over 10 million new small business applications during his presidency, President Biden ordered lunch from a local restaurant. Take a look: | | [CHECK IT OUT] OFFICIAL DEMOCRATIC STORE SWEATSHIRTS Bundle up this winter in one of our best-selling sweatshirts. In this American-made, union-printed crewneck, you’ll not only be showing off your Democratic pride, you’ll also be supporting Democratic candidates up and down the ballot nationwide! | | WE NEED YOUR EARLY SUPPORT Your early support will pay dividends for Democratic candidates down the line. The DNC is relying on grassroots contributions to keep building on our progress, especially with a Republican majority in the House. Investments right now make a huge difference in supporting our party’s work. Everything we do -- from voter protection efforts to organizing on-the-ground in communities all over the country -- is only possible because of folks just like yourself renewing their 2023 DNC membership. Talk to you next week, Team Joe | |

clean_body: It's a disgrace. | Patriot, No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election -- even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election. So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election. The Fake News Media is painting me as a villain because the establishment has directed them to crush our movement. They want to make asking questions a crime. | Every day more light is shed on the simple fact that the Arizona election was RIGGED. Americans are waking up to this undeniable truth. Unfortunately -- the fact is we've got a tight timetable. At MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, we're going to be dangerously close to running out of funds. If we lose our cash flow, we lose the ability to fight -- that's the sad reality. Best, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. Republicans are **SO BITTER** about Democrats rising up and stopping the so-called “red wave” before it even began that they’re already trying to make it more difficult than ever for us to cast our ballots and make our voices heard in what could be the most important election cycle of our lifetimes.

[Well, Peter, if they’re starting early, we sure as hell should do the same. Can you rush a donation of $10 of any amount you can to The Collective PAC right now to help us jump-start our 2024 grassroots organizing efforts?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAndzMcIrbisPir2uo0mBlAUivX9m2t_kVu5Mqg9NpTIkiUDy5VtVR95jFGw3dQgdZVuNFEovafh-oML0W2cHjgIF8YwCZj4VFUA5wVgZ-VF9t0ULpYz63cdCzev7c7-WcAwqP_w2S52WSGQyjmMuPigHz8xIfpTJlDidITL9OBvq26xM6DYG-14WOfiMtqY0j9-bbrbNG1Y-UVhSwZ7tlceOk26sGveovG1a0zoxV9WXwyEvksQtSAza9C2keOvYt_TtHfUClAGhDQUocfmZpvfvKpbgfpe2L-IJdZUeCRAitrNC7tV9bAMmuqMAODb_dubAYi2i8-EJzcJsCyA3_Ig/3t1/UQnfh00pScGvIZi_QtHBmg/h2/VSXQOBl3hn3GKKPGgQdbuS1w07i6sCr7Wo3_UZKlkGc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately.

Here at The Collective PAC, we’ve been fighting tooth and nail to mobilize Black voters, elect Black progressive champions up and down the ballot, and finally create a government that truly represents its people since 2016.

**It’s more clear than ever that the fight is far from over, Peter, and we won’t rest until we’ve emerged victorious once and for all.**

[In times like these, we can’t afford to waste a single second watching from the sidelines. By making a donation to The Collective PAC today, you’ll be getting in on the ground floor of our organizing efforts for 2024. All it takes is $10:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAndzMcIrbisPir2uo0mBlAUivX9m2t_kVu5Mqg9NpTIkiUDy5VtVR95jFGw3dQgdZVuNFEovafh-oML0W2cHjgP4c37bZ6An-BqvZRJ6YY8xfn6mQd_ASV6pep6Rz9Z4OwXf8PbV1LiwC7Y12O61kAWOv6WbUcx1EsiqxJ4Fo37O4SKXqHDMfC3fEkaAqXnPdRF26KAxQY9W5RzV-IHhjH9eo82TNQOm2scMTKTV_unaBZTaXFw5u20hAFIxThgxURO3HX7Z6rwoGqR3otfqD-wfzVqWMSDzOhVeRGsEMtqZ9M7HAQbMYoi-EHt046Bb51GZaV5SoUeGYrr6m-VtdHA/3t1/UQnfh00pScGvIZi_QtHBmg/h9/zXuW5TH5w9jKtmqFsPFnmWtpxS4msLW28y04cxB-mBk)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Looks like they’re back at it again, Peter. Republicans are SO BITTER about Democrats rising up and stopping the so-called “red wave” before it even began that they’re already trying to make it more difficult than ever for us to cast our ballots and make our voices heard in what could be the most important election cycle of our lifetimes. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Here at The Collective PAC, we’ve been fighting tooth and nail to mobilize Black voters, elect Black progressive champions up and down the ballot, and finally create a government that truly represents its people since 2016. It’s more clear than ever that the fight is far from over, Peter, and we won’t rest until we’ve emerged victorious once and for all. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: NEWS: Wage Fights, Wealth Taxes, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: BREAKING! Other NRA vs Workers | Tell Your Rep: NO NRA $$ | One
Fair Wage NY | States Push Wealth Taxes | CA Delegates Election |
Wisconsin M4A Work | Stopping Hochul’s Rightwing Judge | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1011&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

Join Congressman Ro Khanna and other special guests for our LIVE National
Organize-to-Win Call on Monday, January 30th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 CT!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1013&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

Last year, we elected John Fetterman to the US Senate and NINE new allies
to the House — for the most progressives ever in Congress.

We also fought hard for policy wins like sectoral bargaining for fast food
workers in California, getting $25 million for the NLRB to take on
union-busters, and killing Manchin’s Dirty Deal three times!

This year, we can build on this work by broadening our grassroots
organizing, electing more allies at the state and local levels, and
growing our influence in the party.

From building out progressive cities in down-ballot races to raising wages
and taxing the wealthy state by state, we have lots of exciting work
planned.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1014&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]There is so much we can accomplish this year if we work together.
Become a 2023 Our Revolution Member to maximize our impact ahead of 2024.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1015&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1016&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

ONE FAIR WAGE

BREAKING! The [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8256?t=1017&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]New York Times exposed that the National Restaurant
Association — has taken millions of dollars from low-wage workers and used
it to fund lobbying to keep their wages low.

If you tuned into our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8219?t=1018&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]2023 Kickoff Call two weeks ago, you heard One
Fair Wage President Saru Jayaraman preview this exposé of the ‘Other NRA’
forcing workers to fund their own exploitation.

This despicable scheme has stagnated the federal minimum wage at $7.25/hr
since 2009 and the federal tipped wage at $2.13/hr since 1991!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1019&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

All elected officials must reject the National Restaurant Association’s
dirty money and stand with the restaurant workers who are fighting and
working to survive.

Call your members of Congress NOW to demand they take the No NRA Money
Pledge. US Rep. Ro Khanna was the first to sign our pledge, and we need
many more to follow suit!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1020&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]CALL YOUR REPS

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1021&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

Our Revolution is partnering with One Fair Wage to push legislation to
eliminate the tipped wage in 10 states this year — and our Raise the Wage
Team is already getting to work!

Our Revolution-NYPAN will rally in Albany — starting at 11:30 am ET on
Monday — as One Fair Wage introduces a bill to end the tipped minimum wage
and raise wages for millions of workers in the state!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8217?t=1022&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1023&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

Raising the Wage is popular — and necessary! Last year restaurant workers
won the fight to make Michigan the 8th state to end the subminimum wage
for tipped workers. And, in DC, 76% voted to raise the wage to $16.75.

This year we’re working with One Fair Wage to end the subminimum wage in
NY, MD, MA, CT, RI, VT, HA, CO, PR, and CA. We’ll also be collecting
signatures this year to put the measure on the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in
2024.

Sign up to be part of our Raise the Wage Team chance to help millions of
workers in each of these 13 states win higher wages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1024&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]JOIN OUR RAISE THE WAGE TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1025&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

Our Revolution’s Federal Action Team is already prioritizing policies to
push President Biden to deliver on through the Power of the Pen.

Team members weighed in and zeroed in on the following top three issues
areas: Combat the Climate Crisis, Lower Healthcare Costs, and Expand
Worker Power.

With a Republican House, we must push the President to use his executive
authority to give paid sick leave to rail workers, ensure union rights for
federal contractors, and close tax loopholes for the wealthy — and much
more!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8220?t=1026&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]JOIN OUR FEDERAL ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1027&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

BILLIONAIRES FACE COORDINATED WEALTH TAX BILLS IN SEVEN STATES

As an excellent example of why Our Revolution works to elect progressives
down-ballot — seven states moved out in a coordinated effort Thursday to
Tax the Rich and “leave them nowhere to hide,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8257?t=1028&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]Bloomberg reported.

Democrats in California, Connecticut, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, New
York, and Washington are acting collectively on a variety of bills to
minimize the threat of them moving to a lower-tax state,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8258?t=1029&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]The
Washington Post reported.

The legislators confirmed our theory of change that state actions can be a
test case for future national policy. And, US Rep. Pramila Jayapal noted
the difference with Republicans calling for tax breaks for the wealthy.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1030&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1031&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

BUILD LOCAL POWER

Our Revolution Ohio has endorsed Tara Mosley for Mayor of Akron! Tara is a
strong progressive and the only woman in the race — but the establishment
is already trying to stop her.

She was backed by Our Revolution for re-election to her third term as an
Akron City Councilmember, and she also ran for Lt. Governor with Dennis
Kucinich.

Tara served as a Bernie Delegate in 2016 and as Ohio State Chair for his
2020 campaign. Local seats are a proving ground for progressive leaders —
remember, Bernie started off as Mayor of Burlington, VT!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1032&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]As a recurring donor to Our Revolution, you’ll power our voter
outreach strategy to elect progressives to critical down ballot seats this
year.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1033&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

While we prepare to take out Kyrsten Sinema in 2024 — unlike other groups
— we’re not skipping critical races in 2023.

The balance of power is up for grabs this year in major cities all across
America, and we plan to elect progressive city leaders in St. Louis,
Chicago, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more.

Join Our Revolution’s Elect Progressives Team to give us insight into
what’s happening in YOUR city or town, and help us make key endorsements
like Tara Mosley!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1034&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1035&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1036&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

ORGANIZING INSIDE THE PARTY

Our Revolution convened this month’s meeting of the State Democratic Party
Progressives Network, where members of our Party Transformation Team heard
from progressive women leaders working for real change within the party.

Leaders like Shasti Conrad, a former Bernie staffer and King County (WA)
Party Chair poised to be the next State Chair; Fatima Iqbal Zubair, an Our
Revolution-endorsed candidate for CA State Delegate; Iowa Party Chair
candidate Brittany Ruland; and India Walton, the 2021 Democratic nominee
for Buffalo mayor who’s fighting for NYS Party Chair Jay Jacobs to resign.

There’s a lot of work to do this year! We also have elections for Party
leaders in Arizona, Florida, Oregon, and more. Join our Team below!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1037&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

The corporate wing is using any tactic it can to push back against the
growing power of progressives.

If you’re a member of the party — delegate, precinct captain, or chair of
your local party — and you want to help us develop a progressive strategy
from the outside, we need you to work with us!

Sign up for our Party Transformation Team to connect with our broader
reform movement and help us organize the left of the party!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8227?t=1038&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]JOIN OUR PARTY TRANSFORMATION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1039&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

CA PROGRESSIVE DELEGATES ELECTION

Our Revolution is working with the CA Progressive Caucus to grow the
number of progressive delegates in the Party — and this weekend is the
last chance to vote!

Party leaders hope we don’t vote because our candidates are committed to
replacing Feinstein, electing a progressive to the US Senate, and stopping
dirty money corporations from rolling back the progress we’ve made in the
California Democratic Party.

As Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8226?t=1040&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]Politico:
“Places like California present an opportunity to grow a progressive
voting bloc in the Senate, just like we’ve worked to build on the House
side.”

Endorsed candidates include Our Revolution’s own Timothy Cotran, who is
running with a slate of progressives in AD-53! If you’re in California, go
to [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8230?t=1041&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]PDN.vote and then vote!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1042&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

Our Revolution Board Member and long-time rabble-rouser Jim Hightower’s
latest Lowdown makes a powerful case for the Democratic Party to invest in
the grassroots. Join his new [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8259?t=1043&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]Substack to read it, you won’t regret it!

Hightower argues that today’s entrenched Democratic establishment of
high-dollar donors, lobbyists, and consultants is trying to make a base in
its image — “regularly opposing The People, especially you “outsider”
democratic champions who dare challenge the plutocratic status quo.”

Millions of voters are being surrendered without a fight, labeled a lost
cause, unworthy of expending political money and effort, he writes.

“That’s not a strategy, it’s:

* a gutless abdication
* an abandonment of the progressive-minded voters who exist in even the
reddest areas
* a surrender of the public debate in those areas to GOP extremists and
screwballs
* an irresponsible failure to do something politically momentous: Build
a future Party of the People, one with the substance and guts to forge
a progressive governing majority with New Deal possibilities.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1044&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]We must take on corporate power in the party, our politics, and the
economy. Become a member of Our Revolution today to wage the fight for
democracy.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1045&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1046&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

OUR REVOLUTION WISCONSIN: M4A WORK

Our state chapter, Our Wisconsin Revolution launched its 2023
Organize-to-Win series with an in-depth and informative [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8260?t=1047&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]Healthcare
Forum Wednesday night.

“The 1% is coming for Medicare,” Our Wisconsin Revolution Executive
Director Andre Walton. “That means it’s time to get serious and organized
about Medicare For All!”

Dunn County Supervisor John Calabrese laid out how the county passed a
Medicare for All referendum in the county. And, Andre said new referendum
campaigns are planned for Marathon, Outagamie, and Sheboygan counties!

Speaking on the corporate threats to Medicare were Dr. Gillian Battino and
Dr. Laurel Mark, who is also the former Chair of Wisconsin Physicians for
a National Health Program.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8263?t=1048&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]CONNECT WITH OUR WISCONSIN REVOLUTION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1049&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

Our Revolution-NYPAN was part of a broad coalition opposing Gov. Kathy
Hochul’s judicial nominee, Hector LaSalle — and Wednesday scored a victory
when the Senate Judiciary Committee voted against the nomination.

“The last thing NY needs is another anti-union, anti-choice, Republican
chief judge,” said George Albro, Our Revolution member, and Executive
Committee Co-Chair.

NYPAN urged state senators to reject LaSalle, and 10 of them did — meaning
Hochul would’ve had to get Republican Senators on board.

The left saved Hochul when she was close to losing to a MAGA Republican,
and this is the thanks we get, her pushing for a rightwing judge. Yet,
she’s still pushing for a floor vote for LaSalle, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8262?t=1050&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]The Nation reports.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1051&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]Through progressive solidarity, we can do the work and beat back the
rightward push from corporate Democrats and Republicans. Become a member!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1052&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8255?t=1053&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ][IMG]

Join Our Revolution and One Fair Wage as we rally around the introduction
of New York legislation to End the Subminimum Wage for tipped workers. The
event kicks off at 11:30 am ET, Monday, January 23rd in Albany NY.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8217?t=1054&akid=3907%2E5885482%2ESX75qF ]RSVP HERE

take power in the party, and doing so will help us in the upcoming Senate

[ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Last year, we elected John Fetterman to the US Senate and NINE new allies to the House — for the most progressives ever in Congress. We also fought hard for policy wins like sectoral bargaining for fast food workers in California, getting $25 million for the NLRB to take on union-busters, and killing Manchin’s Dirty Deal three times! This year, we can build on this work by broadening our grassroots organizing, electing more allies at the state and local levels, and growing our influence in the party. From building out progressive cities in down-ballot races to raising wages and taxing the wealthy state by state, we have lots of exciting work planned. [ ]There is so much we can accomplish this year if we work together. Become a 2023 Our Revolution Member to maximize our impact ahead of 2024. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ONE FAIR WAGE BREAKING! The [ ]New York Times exposed that the National Restaurant Association — has taken millions of dollars from low-wage workers and used it to fund lobbying to keep their wages low. If you tuned into our [ ]2023 Kickoff Call two weeks ago, you heard One Fair Wage President Saru Jayaraman preview this exposé of the ‘Other NRA’ forcing workers to fund their own exploitation. This despicable scheme has stagnated the federal minimum wage at $7.25/hr since 2009 and the federal tipped wage at $2.13/hr since 1991! [ ][IMG] All elected officials must reject the National Restaurant Association’s dirty money and stand with the restaurant workers who are fighting and working to survive. Call your members of Congress NOW to demand they take the No NRA Money Pledge. US Rep. Ro Khanna was the first to sign our pledge, and we need many more to follow suit! [ ]CALL YOUR REPS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is partnering with One Fair Wage to push legislation to eliminate the tipped wage in 10 states this year — and our Raise the Wage Team is already getting to work! Our Revolution-NYPAN will rally in Albany — starting at 11:30 am ET on Monday — as One Fair Wage introduces a bill to end the tipped minimum wage and raise wages for millions of workers in the state! [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Raising the Wage is popular — and necessary! Last year restaurant workers won the fight to make Michigan the 8th state to end the subminimum wage for tipped workers. And, in DC, 76% voted to raise the wage to $16.75. This year we’re working with One Fair Wage to end the subminimum wage in NY, MD, MA, CT, RI, VT, HA, CO, PR, and CA. We’ll also be collecting signatures this year to put the measure on the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024. Sign up to be part of our Raise the Wage Team chance to help millions of workers in each of these 13 states win higher wages. [ ]JOIN OUR RAISE THE WAGE TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution’s Federal Action Team is already prioritizing policies to push President Biden to deliver on through the Power of the Pen. Team members weighed in and zeroed in on the following top three issues areas: Combat the Climate Crisis, Lower Healthcare Costs, and Expand Worker Power. With a Republican House, we must push the President to use his executive authority to give paid sick leave to rail workers, ensure union rights for federal contractors, and close tax loopholes for the wealthy — and much more! [ ]JOIN OUR FEDERAL ACTION TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BILLIONAIRES FACE COORDINATED WEALTH TAX BILLS IN SEVEN STATES As an excellent example of why Our Revolution works to elect progressives down-ballot — seven states moved out in a coordinated effort Thursday to Tax the Rich and “leave them nowhere to hide,” [ ]Bloomberg reported. Democrats in California, Connecticut, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, New York, and Washington are acting collectively on a variety of bills to minimize the threat of them moving to a lower-tax state,” [ ]The Washington Post reported. The legislators confirmed our theory of change that state actions can be a test case for future national policy. And, US Rep. Pramila Jayapal noted the difference with Republicans calling for tax breaks for the wealthy. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BUILD LOCAL POWER Our Revolution Ohio has endorsed Tara Mosley for Mayor of Akron! Tara is a strong progressive and the only woman in the race — but the establishment is already trying to stop her. She was backed by Our Revolution for re-election to her third term as an Akron City Councilmember, and she also ran for Lt. Governor with Dennis Kucinich. Tara served as a Bernie Delegate in 2016 and as Ohio State Chair for his 2020 campaign. Local seats are a proving ground for progressive leaders — remember, Bernie started off as Mayor of Burlington, VT! [ ]As a recurring donor to Our Revolution, you’ll power our voter outreach strategy to elect progressives to critical down ballot seats this year. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] While we prepare to take out Kyrsten Sinema in 2024 — unlike other groups — we’re not skipping critical races in 2023. The balance of power is up for grabs this year in major cities all across America, and we plan to elect progressive city leaders in St. Louis, Chicago, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. Join Our Revolution’s Elect Progressives Team to give us insight into what’s happening in YOUR city or town, and help us make key endorsements like Tara Mosley! [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ORGANIZING INSIDE THE PARTY Our Revolution convened this month’s meeting of the State Democratic Party Progressives Network, where members of our Party Transformation Team heard from progressive women leaders working for real change within the party. Leaders like Shasti Conrad, a former Bernie staffer and King County (WA) Party Chair poised to be the next State Chair; Fatima Iqbal Zubair, an Our Revolution-endorsed candidate for CA State Delegate; Iowa Party Chair candidate Brittany Ruland; and India Walton, the 2021 Democratic nominee for Buffalo mayor who’s fighting for NYS Party Chair Jay Jacobs to resign. There’s a lot of work to do this year! We also have elections for Party leaders in Arizona, Florida, Oregon, and more. Join our Team below! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The corporate wing is using any tactic it can to push back against the growing power of progressives. If you’re a member of the party — delegate, precinct captain, or chair of your local party — and you want to help us develop a progressive strategy from the outside, we need you to work with us! Sign up for our Party Transformation Team to connect with our broader reform movement and help us organize the left of the party! [ ]JOIN OUR PARTY TRANSFORMATION TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] CA PROGRESSIVE DELEGATES ELECTION Our Revolution is working with the CA Progressive Caucus to grow the number of progressive delegates in the Party — and this weekend is the last chance to vote! Party leaders hope we don’t vote because our candidates are committed to replacing Feinstein, electing a progressive to the US Senate, and stopping dirty money corporations from rolling back the progress we’ve made in the California Democratic Party. Peter, did you see this news? **Texas is planning a massive school choice bill this year, but teacher unions and opponents of school choice are already digging in their heels.** This isn't fair to Texas students already forced into failing schools, and their parents, who deserve choices regarding their education. Here at the American Federation for Children, we’re committed to improving educational outcomes and opportunities for all children by empowering students and parents through school choice. But we need your help to continue that mission.

This isn't fair to Texas students already forced into failing schools, and their parents, who deserve choices regarding their education. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: What Sherrod Brown is, to be honest, is a national treasure. We can keep him in the Senate, or allow a spoiled brat resembling Donald Trump, Rick Scott & Vance take the seat and have its progressive values do a total 180 towards autocracy.
body:
Keep this Ohio Senate seat in 2024?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6f29039-0cb5-478c-9c3e-7be3a3539b49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Sherrod Brown isn’t just a bright light in Ohio, he's our sun (and much the same for working people and progressives across the country)._** _Because the Ohio GOP controls nearly everything, defies our courts and uses gerrymandering and now an egregious voter suppression law just passed to be handed what they can't win, they have a lock on most positions of power._ **_Sherrod's defied them, winning time and again._** He's a Senator because he beat then Senator Mike DeWine in '06. **_So, here comes wealthy Republican, state Sen Matt Dolan, to try to drown him in campaign cash._** Dolan won't have Peter Thiel's money (that we know of) like J.D. Vance, which upended a 50-50 race for Tim Ryan. But Dolan's loaded, as he proved by spending ~$11 Million outta pocket to lose to Vance in the GOP Senate primaries in '22. [_WE MUST begin supporting Sherrod NOW, as Dolan begins to spend millions daddy gave him to try and steal another seat. _**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to keep the exceptional Senator Sherrod Brown where he belongs, in his Senate seat in Washington fighting for our values?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27d3b036-3680-4a39-b963-c1a96205d016/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If you're from NYC you're likely familiar with the Dolan family's ineptitude. Matt's cousin, James, CEO of Madison Square Garden sports, has presided over a tenure of total failure and sexual harassment. Matt wants the seat because he's rich. That's it. He's using the right-wing playbook of blabbing about inflation (Note: it's coming down) and calling Sherrod a partisan. LOL.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b80b956-9089-4c66-820b-4806ff16d871/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Sherrod's been outstanding on every issue we care about from abortion rights to gun safety, a living wage to climate. But, on issues like trade, he breaks with the party to fight for Ohio's working class. He ain't partisan._** **_What he is, to be honest, is a national treasure. _**_We can keep him in the Senate, or allow a spoiled brat resembling Donald Trump, Rick Scott & Vance take the seat and have its progressive values do a total 180 towards autocracy._ [_So WE MUST begin supporting Sherrod NOW, as Dolan begins to spend millions daddy gave him to try and steal another seat. _**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to keep the exceptional Senator Sherrod Brown where he belongs, in his Senate seat in Washington fighting for our values?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d7d2f73-b71c-451f-a33b-842ad154ed30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks so much for continuing to fight. Cliff

|
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf87a082e-3ae3-4d06-bfbc-b7bdf9860ffd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
The 2022 cycle is over — and the work for the next election has already begun. So I need to make myself perfectly clear: I watched Kevin McCarthy spend millions in dark money to flip my Democratic House by the thinnest of margins.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Become a citizen cosponsor of my Constitutional Amendment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| This week, I introduced a Constitutional Amendment in the House to overturn Citizens United and the irresponsible SCOTUS decisions that came before it.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1605%2E5257348%2Eo804Yh)
Derek —
After 13 years of _Citizens United_ and more than $16.7 billion in 2022 midterm election spending, we need to protect the voice of the American voter and combat dark money's corrupting influence over our elections more vigorously than ever.
This week, I introduced a Constitutional Amendment in the House to overturn _Citizens United_ and the irresponsible SCOTUS decisions that came before it.
Dark money has no place in our elections or democracy. We need to return power to people. Once and for all.
**[Derek, add your name as a citizen cosponsor of my Constitutional Amendment to overturn _Citizens United._ If we are to stop the endless deluge of sensationalized and misinformed political ads that have divided and disillusioned our country and its politics, we must take action together.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230121-citizens-united-vsp.iIPFXf&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1605%2E5257348%2Eo804Yh)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230121-citizens-united-vsp.iIPFXf&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1605%2E5257348%2Eo804Yh)
---
**The Supreme Court’s decision in the landmark _Citizens United v. FEC_ case ruled that corporations were people and money was free speech protected by the First Amendment.** They opened the door for wealthy donors and corporations to give unlimited sums of money by creating Super PACs to spend those dark and untraceable dollars. They created an environment of limitless spending and demonizing attacks, an environment that candidate Donald Trump thrived in and exploited to win the presidency.
Dark money has weakened the voices of our people – and was even part of the corrupt dealmaking on the House floor this month, when Kevin McCarthy and his opponents agreed on special interest group spending in Republican primaries in exchange for the Speaker’s gavel.
**That is not how our democracy should function. One person, one vote.**
That’s why I introduced this Constitutional Amendment along with other progressive leaders. I know it’s a tall task to accomplish. But it’s the right thing to do. Together, we can work to end the stranglehold of dark money on our democracy.
**[Derek, add your name and become a citizen cosponsor of my Constitutional Amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ and reject the corrupting influence of dark money that flooded our airwaves during the 2022 midterms.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230121-citizens-united-vsp.iIPFXf&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230121_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1605%2E5257348%2Eo804Yh)**
I will not accept a status quo where the power of wealthy donors and corporations is magnified while the strength of voices like yours is minimized.
It’s time we close this dangerous _Citizens United_ loophole and make it a requirement of ALL campaigns to ensure that individual Americans have the most say in our elections.
Thank you for your support.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1605%2E5257348%2Eo804Yh) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1605%2E5257348%2Eo804Yh)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1605%2E5257348%2Eo804Yh)

| Friend,

I am proud to announce that I'm officially on the **OVERSIGHT COMMITTEE** for the 118th Congress! For the past two years, I saw first-hand how the Democrats **FAILED** to hold the Biden administration accountable for America's crumbling economy, wide-open southern border, soaring crime rates, and botched withdrawal from Afghanistan.

**Enough is enough. It's time to get to work.**

[**I want to hear directly from you: What should the Oversight Committee investigate first? >>**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d183919c3a&e=1050d051da)

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Hitting our first deadline of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Democracy isn’t a part time job. This work is ongoing if we’re going to build an Indiana that delivers good jobs for workers, a great education for our children, and a better way of life for our families. We know there are a majority of Hoosiers who believe in this vision as well. But we need to provide long-term investments in order to build the movement necessary to win elections and deliver results for Hoosiers. **Our first deadline of 2023 is coming up in a few days, and we can’t afford to fall behind this early in the year.** [**Chip in right now and help us hit our deadline before midnight on Sunday. [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=382c686a058c4ee6b75520cc01f057e8&_e=2WnkrubGby3kCs52Oj8CPxljHrfx7VESOGn0UZpXPn2_fd6jFxuyALqOorgYzapnS4QGALbL2sfMxQbzqPQUOWidPlzPzkkH3qtzi64YJTw9oVwhUPUAE1mavOMboR3guyAsgEyuEejxl3TPqi7LrAIPC7G3l_3IL5eDmnZ1h4eHJoV5BtaIb4r-0hEnJk0b-Ywlghux9jNQLihfQa8zTOXFtDZSXwWkb-xoTHAM1tzAC8_wDLQexTbYMUrLwJv3CDBJeVfQPFihZrMf1YRJi6iE5AQBo7Dyf_4xslj0ec5UKPe9TFpJO0QG9EDsl6w3fpvSHUQsn8Vrt9ga_KtB2A%3D%3D)
---
**On Governor Hogan’s final full day office, a new poll reaffirms the historic levels of support for his leadership among every single demographic in Maryland.** **According to [Gonzales Polling](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=382c686a058c4ee6b75520cc01f057e8&_e=2WnkrubGby3kCs52Oj8CP_kD9p6vO-92nH4lsnhm0e45PpUB72QZH_FBZuTZ-DeZBTxI_MV1AxRqqvz4gyZLZTC65sL0zzfD6EWHzEMX0TwuLf0TWRsIbb3_DVVlGIJQIZFudwzvdWhxhYS5MF9uZ2icXJzrpHF_4-6LBURlTlXvA1mCVbQ5lIGOdGJbAnJmZ9P5UV2k4TpjSo3lCYNlfFQDVsB9ccnWGO6nFhFXaf8SQNgXXhvYgy-Q6U0-XkNaTfUjfbhsYLifCxtasHwadruFkQWbkOt6Qwtqv1cvbpDzt1HW0jrM_EJzqZK7hZS815mLdjv4gIlq0XRzEwTkBulu_3KYkhAIDah4ieF8q_rcciXjbogK2CBsm6eYM6xLMqBJpklVeJL-w5wZPJuRvVVJz67o3BkhhCMqeWDeG5eLEAq-w5WRONP_y2QyJmek8tr5vHU1L4Jt9Q6hqSZX4eA04O2ZUHwh_fx9PVKajlgQRcUVIJqiLu3PGoVfw844DwTC1IvudblX70GfLUqxadN0B6Cgw8Z47D8uVZoN1Yo_W0vutr8A8tCwylTJHYsOwQv5S8BiZXZZRM5m4cnkFhthbf_N2ElSm8g2WrjxpXTN6hBwDD0vFQYA9J8MVMpV7VTzjGSPgtREE2w7NDuR4e52ZlVTao3F9cUlUbg99AsbsqB9U_SnTx5FQJilI_RkEVb4CWMMlI-WRlJGEhr4R4kR4yHhkC4_Kdj6ASw36A7jttSB8AV3kSgtmnkGx6u5wv6EpQhbFRDLJ7u9hSeBQ3drRG7SBEZvyL0_W8vhZL69uB3o_PDJyM30hspmHxV5gi8jgr3b5UBwnbSuYmol1Vyxnu-5XofJCjVrkmp4VwT7lc35CMYxrML65nBeL6nSKgatrsT0qGYvSEk1xS7zFyUSFg3X4iUwB0m55XGaOruWfXQw4ZghjytQmA0jeD_lEdoMGL8LxhxDalD5z2pbhw%3D%3D), Governor Hogan will leave office with an eye-popping 77% approval rating, including an 81% among African-Americans and historic 74% average approval over the last eight years. According to Gonzales, “Never in our three plus decades of rating Maryland governors had any approached this level.”** **Governor Hogan’s overwhelming support from across the political spectrum shows that leaders can still bring people together in this divisive time when they focus on delivering common sense solutions on the issues that matter.**
---

clean_body: | | | | | "Promise" "Governor Hogan's Farewell Address" On Governor Hogan’s final full day office, a new poll reaffirms the historic levels of support for his leadership among every single demographic in Maryland. According to , Governor Hogan will leave office with an eye-popping 77% approval rating, including an 81% among African-Americans and historic 74% average approval over the last eight years. According to Gonzales, “Never in our three plus decades of rating Maryland governors had any approached this level.” Governor Hogan’s overwhelming support from across the political spectrum shows that leaders can still bring people together in this divisive time when they focus on delivering common sense solutions on the issues that matter. As he concludes his time as Maryland’s most popular Governor, Governor Hogan wrote an highlighting how Maryland has been able to “achieve real prosperity in our hyperpolarized times” and key lessons learned from his time in office. Governor Hogan writes, “Maryland has seen one of the greatest economic turnarounds in the U.S., thanks to our cutting taxes by nearly $4.7 billion and turning a $5.1 billion structural budget deficit into a record $5.5 billion in reserves. The coalition supporting our effort grew remarkably, with nearly 70% of every demographic—including Republicans, Democrats and independents—approving of the job we’ve done. It is still possible to lead and bring people together in this hyperpolarized environment, and my experience in Maryland offers key lessons.” In Governor Hogan’s final weeks in office, he has discussed with local and regional media outlets his concerns about the current state of politics and how his successes in Maryland have shown how to bring people together to deliver common sense results. Here’s what they’re saying as Governor Hogan prepares to leave office this week: ‘We have come a long way together’: Maryland Gov. Hogan says farewell speech Hogan: Remember me as a ‘regular guy who gave it his all’ “‘Serving you has been the honor of a lifetime,’ Hogan said in a video address, filmed in the State House’s Old Senate Chamber. ‘Together, we truly have changed Maryland for the better.’” “I inherited a $5 billion deficit and turned it into a $5 billion surplus,’ Governor Hogan said. ‘We have more businesses open and more people working than ever in the history of the state. We cut taxes eight years in a row by $4.7 billion, we cut tolls, taxes and fees, and the economy is completely turned around.” “Hogan, a Republican who considers himself a moderate conservative, touted his administration’s accomplishments, credited residents for sticking together through great and challenging times.” “He ended his speech with a plea for Americans to come together and not be so divided by their politics.” “As he has in the past, Hogan expressed concern over the tone of the political discourse at the national level, but said Maryland ‘achieved the impossible’ when its Republican governor and a legislature dominated by Democrats figured out a way to co-exist.” Below are Governor Hogan’s exit interviews: "Governor Larry Hogan Joins CNN's "The Lead With Jake Tapper"" >> <<< | | AN UPDATE FROM TWITTER | | | There has not been a single day—good or bad—when I was not grateful for the privilege to serve as your governor. Serving you has been the honor of a lifetime. Thank you, Maryland! — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | Thank you, Maryland! It has truly been the honor of a lifetime serving as your Governor. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | I can’t begin to say thank you enough to my wife, The First Lady, Yumi! Over the last eight years she has done so much and been the best First Lady for Maryland. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for serving on this journey with me. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

| 2023 Session Update Week 2

| 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda
---
| The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates.
We begin week three Monday and thankfully through continuous negotiations, changes, and debate all of my bills are still alive!
Here is list of legislation brought to me by constituents, and sponsored by me, to improve Virginia.
Bills:
[HB 1436](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJLVtOtfXEQjWeeOeVmPIOvGxJqy0cGmVlpNjSS5-3pu3v0VOG689k8XRq9yi_9tH7Gjo9-4s5lJioGDg8eml9GmEnE21yQHe4Ue5-mlar5x_jaXokht99A8LBfLvCVk_BAedA38q5wJ1zakhXk392_w=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Removes age the 55 requirement for retired military tax deduction. [HB 1454](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJMKn2GYElM7I17eAsaHz3HzShiokBYvcx9mFLeU8y8R_BjmBUSH4BxGyKBrdC5kjekOxzeZ6ENuzeOOerIzKgGyLhjoloH7lsWBBFoV3H3CmFKNLEKO9P2Ql5yeqoszd6J_Sw49D8gFGvQ8GezkaCAQ=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Simplifies Home School Parent Requirements. [HB 1488](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJMKn2GYElM7IT85ceWOZFKw7-g2D8qoAr7ZRuL8Cl91--b3lz1xzL7HfBwyUnA4UbJFnvxAQJ0UCUffMa0bMPX8kn1J6gvzIN9Tr9bV_bXhwBRRP5FvBnHBPkTLRUY3pM-nmefehD6Fg4kR2-BV-l_Q=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Bans tax payer dollars for abortion. [HB 1507](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJMKn2GYElM7I8qNBL8BJ7azeEDyRti6BMN8KG4V5xL6n079znQOjBHe2oRxPwzcDYdeKQfkyAdnEHnrd68NxYvScnZA7xO_yZZ3GMr2ILiJ0XF5a6GKZtDfNLT9-rmLwiA5ne_5sPp9lUsWh8p4fCns=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Strengthens Parental Rights in Virginia. [HB 1693](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJNktPH3CB1k8tCl5U2qA1H6OQNcKue3RKgt-7uECS4kcbFhs2VddBCUS2DVR-XhHYj-KAYFoMD__JDWYUJmKyYIiz0etbczflHKdxf8C3wOfCArhheIPdhcWi0qxyj9X5lB9h6wOLs568vPPAGRprrs=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Improves election integrity, by banning drop boxes in Virginia. This bill passed sub-committee this week! [HB 1889](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJNktPH3CB1k8lZ_tJ_VFCc1QBor2sS5rbRDda9gqP1vNlUgO--kaJJmZcCCH-fv28WlN5YFc3ppWkOK8fFYbhfMlQIzFw3jrQO5C_OLSun_6Eu1VFDxIznQd9-OfOpICzdRU7a-RA_hWlgWfU8gLhJg=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Public institutions of higher education, and certain other public educational institutions; certain immunization requirements prohibited. [HB 1891](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJNktPH3CB1k8IGj1lKRyseSCMabtt3NiHCp1kTmMearOKOE9sDB7Cew8Xn-CI6yxQ51jeX6UQ5_0noZxN7s5CrpX6vlzBLQupyqChmLlDNaoE3akYI9SEJmQLfWYZjKED4R4njP88ljwP-1I17KAU_4=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) A groundbreaking treatment to help with brain injury, addiction, and autism, by establishing a Trans-cranial Magnetic Stimulation pilot program in Virginia. [HB 1898](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJNktPH3CB1k8WIgdaXjdYoMkqj1Ov6441IxclfZhH1cMBPna6vAWo4Ubi4PNtG5SR7DT5MfS1MdFyrue0ign5pXtOIJb55DFF7JwOh_Jn0jMKUBffb0Qj3n-KiPsJ7z811xpKpXk8tKEgDXC5T1sGf4=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) An anti-BDS bill that helps fight anti-Semitism in Virginia. [HB 1922](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJNktPH3CB1k82GKgZGkWyhckRr_I_MOGOgB6f8gHugxupwo-pnIFa8rI1rDw9m74GlhvfIFovmW0NVrKBwwVZ97xcgBFuNCGVP3S5L-LtfZEHLm5vXWgnbytcB7rAhzB2urTIQZZgC5KcRbt1qbayw0=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Increases the penalty for those who distribute poisonous Delta-8 products to children. [HJ 475](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJMKn2GYElM7IypB2EKEweyEetEPUUirDG3dp3zXxvRAMf_Wl0Vfocx365E8cZkYpAk4AwzcrrDgHR9SuxqttgwjtG7nTCURv4DPUOJQZi2tdLlsq-ZH31GIzw8tYfdcTNNPdtuJ4OK85thUe7eVS2ng=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) McGuire Introduces Resolution that makes the fourth Wednesday in April, "Career and Technical Education Signing Day". [HB 2459](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJFdzN-PdQWfPgWoii3GKYEdviOaizryOb9VX9pXaIMR0tTEPgiS3qEgUr3RPQdzkTCO46HMTysCYtGoEzvhA3K-xLCiD-w1zo3gINnVWyAZrfMBLiHFmpZvEveKjBe1wgaonu9nVYd3daufOzqUcKUo=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Waiver of sovereign immunity; If you get shot in a "Gun-Free Zone", you can sue the government. [HB 2421](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJFdzN-PdQWfPpQV91KktfTUJWxdJyXMIkw0AyYIITAtKan-UtSzrkxhRGr6Gg-f57tI2yYvwcY0wISHXTHrt430ho1XkYWPJ3Q3GlQzxLvbdn_U4QCGZtFB4w1TR-kjSjlEyQo4UC-hzW4KpAjpA7zM=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) Firearm, stun weapon, or other weapon on school property; clarifies the limits and prohibition on possession.
[Click this link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJNktPH3CB1k83rGvCvy8AlkXoWgAGNcvU0tLM1oXMIjjR0L2zU1BSK8QIY-YL52Hd0IPCaE_fzlZsKcKILoIhkl7TRZCLMt59eCu4T28J8YckmQ6RiehH8FNHazftkfvTxoXfnB0V1tDp7jy4XUjVHY=&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) for updates and other legislation we support.

| Retired Military Tax Cut, HB 1346, Success!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJFdzN-PdQWfPOUlqBr877gl4csb485J7Z0hqK5luhTSAjR54rgINPd5ZCotwJ61pETSbwcew6vm4TUXY9xfwUXAV2A8DorVizBucvk1OtGMq0X3WrUaL3PrETFzI4lfgng==&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==)
---
| In 2021 Governor-Elect Glenn Youngkin named me, "Virginia Landing Team Chair" of the Secretary of Defense and Veterans Affairs (Over all things military in Virginia), where my team and I formulated short term, medium term, and long-term goals to make Virginia more Veteran friendly. After a 30-year effort in the General Assembly with no result, we achieved one of those major goals by successfully passing my bill, HB1188, in 2022, which reduced taxes on veterans' retirement pay by $40,000. But the Democrat controlled State Senate added an age 55 requirement to that bill. This year my bill, HB 1346, which will eliminate the age 55 requirement, just passed finance subcommittee 8-0. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJFdzN-PdQWfPlOvxoEm9PCfg_3IM03IC8yEJ50z88lOULXZ9t-MmB878pLDatJazJ_VRDe-z3WzL4_bBzBixO7NStyejlBDxZQ==&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) for video!
---
| Election Integrity Bill to Ban Boxes
---
|
---
|
---
| Success! My bill, HB 1693, to repeal, or eliminate drop boxes in Virginia, just passed Privileges and Elections Full Committee 11-8. We were told we needed lock boxes in 2020 during the pandemic, because of the lock downs. The lock downs are over, so it is past time to get rid of them. Eliminating voter drop boxes in Virginia will save money, and is a step in the right direction towards restoring voter integrity, and restoring voter confidence in our elections. #hd56 #sd10 #virginia #voterintegrity
---
| Volunteers Wanted
---
|
---

| Election Integrity Bill: HB1377, the first bill this session in Privileges and Elections, was patroned by Delegate Karen Greenhall. A voter integrity bill, HB 1377 requires registrars to update voter roles within seven days of someone's death. It passed 19-2. I voted "yes". #hd56 #sd10 #virginia

| My Opponent's Record
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJPWdYWKpJ3rK7K6hkui8a81sowK24R873WLyshU_dIRXf5c_aJCXY9GRWnFs9okPzv8rvzRywI__0acHR71ah0I1XKG1gjIm-w==&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==)
---
| You've got to be a convincing salesman, in order to get a political party nomination back and forth between both parties. The last time my opponent, Duane Adams of Louisa County, ran for state office in Virginia's Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat in Hanover County, against beloved Conservative Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove. In fact, he flip-flopped back and forth by running for state office, first as a Republican, and then three times for state office as a Democrat. Now, he is running against me, to be your Republican State Senator.

[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IWrzS5BelLdSTb8AlvJDvK0OvGwVeqOu3aD5ZIjccYDI_G9sJvNKJPWdYWKpJ3rK7K6hkui8a81sowK24R873WLyshU_dIRXf5c_aJCXY9GRWnFs9okPzv8rvzRywI__0acHR71ah0I1XKG1gjIm-w==&c=h16D2TQEwxsgHGBPfPugdSAKQCFdN6wc20xxtC8QT0rYxMtMvtIncg==&ch=2gGb2QrLbcgDBh4G3XRNamoGBSYB91dPCpDcIfBh1t_3upBonCJOkg==) to read a letter with the facts sent to us from fellow Conservative Republican VA State Senator (retired) Dick Black:

* Fact: President Ronald Reagan never hid the fact that he once voted Democrat before becoming a Republican and he never ever ran for election anywhere in the United States as a Democrat.

| My Final Session in the House of Delegates
---
|
---
| This week, I was issued my last House of Delegates license plate. In 2018 when I was sworn in, we started with # 91 and have now worked our way down to # 57. God willing, we will replace it again next year with a State Senate license plate! The lower the number on the plate of a representative, the longer that representative has served the state of Virginia.
---
| I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | **Date/ Location Decided State Senate District 10 Convention Please Mark Your Calendar Saturday May 6, 2023 Buckingham County High School Sign up online to support John McGuire www.john4va.com | | | | | Reminder: I cannot accept donations until I get out of session February 25. | | | | 2023 Session Update Week 2 | | 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda | The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates. We begin week three Monday and thankfully through continuous negotiations, changes, and debate all of my bills are still alive! Here is list of legislation brought to me by constituents, and sponsored by me, to improve Virginia. Bills: == Removes age the 55 requirement for retired military tax deduction. == Simplifies Home School Parent Requirements. == Bans tax payer dollars for abortion. == Strengthens Parental Rights in Virginia. == Improves election integrity, by banning drop boxes in Virginia. This bill passed sub-committee this week! == Public institutions of higher education, and certain other public educational institutions; certain immunization requirements prohibited. == A groundbreaking treatment to help with brain injury, addiction, and autism, by establishing a Trans-cranial Magnetic Stimulation pilot program in Virginia. == An anti-BDS bill that helps fight anti-Semitism in Virginia. == Increases the penalty for those who distribute poisonous Delta-8 products to children. == McGuire Introduces Resolution that makes the fourth Wednesday in April, "Career and Technical Education Signing Day". == Waiver of sovereign immunity; If you get shot in a "Gun-Free Zone", you can sue the government. == Firearm, stun weapon, or other weapon on school property; clarifies the limits and prohibition on possession. == for updates and other legislation we support. | "Compete to Win" | | I hope you will join us for Governor Youngkin's "Compete to Win" event on Monday, Jan 23, 2023, 4:45 PM EST at the Weinstein JCC, 5403 Monument Avenue Richmond, VA 23226. Reserve your spot ==. | Retired Military Tax Cut, HB 1346, Success! | == | In 2021 Governor-Elect Glenn Youngkin named me, "Virginia Landing Team Chair" of the Secretary of Defense and Veterans Affairs (Over all things military in Virginia), where my team and I formulated short term, medium term, and long-term goals to make Virginia more Veteran friendly. After a 30-year effort in the General Assembly with no result, we achieved one of those major goals by successfully passing my bill, HB1188, in 2022, which reduced taxes on veterans' retirement pay by $40,000. But the Democrat controlled State Senate added an age 55 requirement to that bill. This year my bill, HB 1346, which will eliminate the age 55 requirement, just passed finance subcommittee 8-0. == for video! | Election Integrity Bill to Ban Boxes | | | Success! My bill, HB 1693, to repeal, or eliminate drop boxes in Virginia, just passed Privileges and Elections Full Committee 11-8. We were told we needed lock boxes in 2020 during the pandemic, because of the lock downs. The lock downs are over, so it is past time to get rid of them. Eliminating voter drop boxes in Virginia will save money, and is a step in the right direction towards restoring voter integrity, and restoring voter confidence in our elections. #hd56 #sd10 #virginia #voterintegrity | Volunteers Wanted | | | Volunteers Wanted! Our team of staff and volunteers is growing. Thank you for helping us improve Virginia. If you want to volunteer on my campaign for State Senate, please email john@mcguireforvirginia.com. Please put "volunteer" in the subject line. | Sandy Rios Interview Link! | == | Sandy Rios, President of Governmental Affairs for American Family Radio, just started a Podcast, and I was blessed to be one of her first interviews. More on this later! == | VCDL Lobby Day | | | | | | | | It was an honor to speak about our support and defense of our 2nd Amendment rights, with Senator Amanda Chase, VCDL President Phil VanCleave, and others at VCDL Lobby Day. It was great to see and talk with folks from all over the Commonwealth! | Martin Luther King Day | | Martin Luther King Jr. believed in protecting our God-given rights, so I thought it was fitting to have VCDL Lobby Day on his birthday (Monday), where we also commemorated the life and work of Dr. King, who was a Baptist minister, and prominent leader, in the American civil rights movement. #virginia #hd56 #sd10 | 50th Annual March for Life, Washington D.C. | | Life is a miracle. It begins at conception, and it must be protected. Today, pro-life supporters, standing up for life, gathered in Washington D.C. for the 50th March for Life. Learn more ==. | Young Republicans Visit the General Assembly | | We were joined in the Gallery by the "High School Republican Federation of Virginia", representing students all over the Commonwealth! They serve as the premier GOP organization to engage future voters! It was great catching up with my friend, Jessie Blakely, the "Young Republican Federation of Virginia" Chairman, or "High School Republican Federation of Virginia" Senior Advisor. Students looking to get involved with HSRFV can sign up ==. A student from their district will follow up! | First Vote of Session: "Voter Integrity" | | Election Integrity Bill: HB1377, the first bill this session in Privileges and Elections, was patroned by Delegate Karen Greenhall. A voter integrity bill, HB 1377 requires registrars to update voter roles within seven days of someone's death. It passed 19-2. I voted "yes". #hd56 #sd10 #virginia | 17 Virginia Schools Hide Achievement | | Washington Post Opinion: Fairfax schools violated students' civil rights, plain and simple: At this writing, 17 high schools in this single ecosystem have acknowledged that they failed to tell young people, and their families, of hard-earned successes. There is no hiding of the fastest kid on the track team, or the best soloist in the band. But, excellence in academics was covered up -- no matter how much work students put into their studies... == | Annie Adamson of American Jake | | My wife, Tracy, and I ran into our friend, Annie, president of "American Jake", at church. "American Jake" is an outdoor hunting and fishing program for teens. | VCDL Lobby Day Dinner | | I ran into these two patriots, "Wild Bill" Pierson, and Philip Van Cleave, president of VCDL, at the VCDL Lobby Day Dinner. Thank you, for all you do to support our 2nd Amendment rights! | | U.S. Marine Ed Purcell of Louisa | | Ed Purcell, a U.S. Marine of Louisa County, will run another Marine Corps Marathon in 2023. You motivate us, Sir. Semper Fi, and Oorah, Marine! | Medical Freedom Rally | | | | | | | I stopped by the Bell Tower to say, "Hello", to fellow conservatives at the Medical Freedom Rally. "Science that cannot be questioned is not science." | Jeff Stoneman for Hanover Supervisor Kickoff | | | | | | I stopped by the "Jeff Stoneman for Supervisor" Campaign Kickoff in Hanover County, where we made many new friends. I look forward to meeting your friends around the district. | ESA Passes House Sub Committee | | | Education Success Accounts (ESA), a bill to have tax payer dollars follow the child and give parents school choice, is making its way through the General Assembly. I'm a proud sponsor of this effort to improve education in Virginia! | Goochland Sheriff Visits General Assembly | | | | ---|--- | Thank you, Goochland Sheriff Stephen Creasey, and deputies, for stopping by my office at the General Assembly. I had the honor of introducing Sheriffs from all over Virginia on the floor. == | Caucus Reception at the Executive Mansion | | It was honor to attend the Republican Caucus Reception at the Executive Mansion with fellow Republican Delegates. We are working together as a team, with Governor Youngkin, to improve Virginia! | Pharmacy Lobby Day | | Thank you, to all the pharmacists who stopped by to see us on Pharmacy Lobby Day. | Firefighter Visit | | Several firefighters with Virginia Professional Firefighters stopped by to say, "Hello", and discuss their concerns. | Tribal Nations Legislative Reception | | | | It was an honor to attend the "Inaugural Tribal Nations Legislative Reception" at the Richmond library. We met Indian chiefs from all over the world, and many other wonderful people. | | | | My Opponent's Record | == | You've got to be a convincing salesman, in order to get a political party nomination back and forth between both parties. The last time my opponent, Duane Adams of Louisa County, ran for state office in Virginia's Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat in Hanover County, against beloved Conservative Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove. In fact, he flip-flopped back and forth by running for state office, first as a Republican, and then three times for state office as a Democrat. Now, he is running against me, to be your Republican State Senator. == to read a letter with the facts sent to us from fellow Conservative Republican VA State Senator (retired) Dick Black: Fact: President Ronald Reagan never hid the fact that he once voted Democrat before becoming a Republican and he never ever ran for election anywhere in the United States as a Democrat. | Senate District 10 Update: | We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham H.S. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. Please ==, and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. By signing up now, we can provide you with details as they come in. | == | My Final Session in the House of Delegates | | This week, I was issued my last House of Delegates license plate. In 2018 when I was sworn in, we started with # 91 and have now worked our way down to # 57. God willing, we will replace it again next year with a State Senate license plate! The lower the number on the plate of a representative, the longer that representative has served the state of Virginia. | I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you. | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 NFIB 100 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: Week 1 2023 == End of December == Mid December == End of November == Mid November == End of October == Mid October == September == End of August == Mid August == End of July == == == == Mid June == May == April == March == Week 9 == Week 8. == Week 7 == Week 6. == Week 5. == Week 4. == Week 3. == Week 2. == Week 1 == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Friend, I’m Claudia Tenney—I’m a small business owner, proud Marine mom, and conservative Congresswoman from New York. I said what we were all thinking.
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=927a14d77a&e=fdefed58de)
---
I wish I was surprised, but we know this is just how Washington operates. If you support the **big-government** , **pro-spending** , and **anti-liberty agenda** , **you get a pass**.
But if you try to disrupt any of that, **you’re now a target. **
---
[**CLEAN HOUSE IN WASHINGTON: CHIP IN >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a1677410bb&e=fdefed58de)
---
**_FIRST_** , it was the IRS under Obama that illegally used its position to target conservative organizations, **_THEN_** , we saw the entire system try to take down and obstruct President Trump at every turn. **_NOW,_** we have the DOJ weaponized against parents and the IRS planning to go after the American people. The left has corrupted _nearly every_ facet of government. It’s time for conservatives to clean house and drain the swamp **before it’s too late.** _**[Friend, can I count on your support to help me lead this fight in Congress by rushing a critical donation by January 31st?](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=afa1389197&e=fdefed58de)**_

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, I’m Claudia Tenney—I’m a small business owner, proud Marine mom, and conservative Congresswoman from New York. I said what we were all thinking. | | I wish I was surprised, but we know this is just how Washington operates. If you support the big-government , pro-spending , and anti-liberty agenda , you get a pass. But if you try to disrupt any of that, you’re now a target. FIRST , it was the IRS under Obama that illegally used its position to target conservative organizations, THEN , we saw the entire system try to take down and obstruct President Trump at every turn. NOW, we have the DOJ weaponized against parents and the IRS planning to go after the American people. The left has corrupted nearly every facet of government. It’s time for conservatives to clean house and drain the swamp before it’s too late. Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | {{ physicalAddress }} | | This email was sent to {{email}} | | {{unsubscribeUrl}} | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United.
