_Here are a few reasons why I’m asking for your support._
— The GOP has gotten close to winning each of my previous three races, so my campaign expects them to double down on their resources in the coming election. We need to start building our grassroots movement for 2024 immediately.
— I’m fighting to stop the GOP House Majority’s far-right agenda and ensure that our fundamental rights are protected, but I can’t do this without your help.
— Our campaign is fundraising from the ground up after Election Day. Every dollar we raise will help us push back against the radical Republicans who will soon announce their run against me.
We’ve got our work cut out for us and I’m counting on your support.
[**Can you chip in to help power my campaign and push back against the GOP’s radical legislation in Congress? body:
Are you with me?
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkc1u3SAQhZ_G3tnix8bxwoukV8kiTaTu2hXCMJdLY8AB-1ru0xdcq5UqITScGYaPMzBg1jWUYtL0pRoEE1dQpRkIIhRhgnHfEoRrRPAVjy1r-q6nD_1YNAisMFMt8CZC8N7W0tvyNrCOtukSMNXIHkED7UjxA5ZStCNIQOU03JZljgV9LMhzWhHkGqDejAugcpOkCaf20Wgdczxy5R33lm-BSx0r6V3kY-AnISros7B-dUtBLxQVhIXcMRink7CEFZK0LpZbUGa1STvATzH6NUhIopMTF3aezHU_UzIdhdEuJf88VB1ImUYsJiNNu52NzH0FP13giU4HiDEHEcI9ld4h4foPCELDP-rzEe8WONATQCW_kzfxC_S3ZALjbjIqJf4Tb0Yl8y776z1-7R5pGQY1b2aaTGRdmoo-ppJncf5mKLqngpDjGiGH7eTzx2bD-tO-vlT397fqk73bNifJl7Qv-wx_K88m9ekZKbrLb7dgtus)

| Friend,
As a dedicated conservative, I’ve always remained committed to putting the best interests of the American people first.
And that’s why I’m leading the fight to hold bureaucrats accountable and demand moderates and Democrats do too.
We’ve made our demands clear and have already accomplished so much because of your support...but now we need to ramp up our efforts.
**So I’m taking on the IRS, calling for lower taxes for all Americans, and fighting to preserve innocent life.**
I’m working as hard as I can, **[but I need your help to make sure Congress hears our message and gets these things done.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkU1v3CAQhn8Nvtniw4vXBx_SbpLDJpEq9dJeEF_2khhwwF7L_77gWq0UCaHhnWF4eEd3iDY1IQjXbaE6TnmvVWE6DDGBCCPUnjBEFcSoR-JE67ZpybkVoIbacjNWHK08BO9tJb0tbt2Zir7ljTzLdJPoWmMIhRAnIRtCYX8uxu42z1ME5AHgp7SilkvQ1Wpc0Co3SRp3ahNmGGKOBVPeMW_ZGpgcYim9i0wEdhBCQJ649YubAbkQCDANuWMwbkjCHBadpGW2zGplFpu0HfwQo1-C1El0cmTcTqPptyMl05GbwaXk34fKHSnT8NlkpHGzk5G5L2eHCyzRDUHHmIOowz2V3nXC9R868EH_pz4e8W7WO3oCKH8ul9_Xxx99TCZQ5kajUuKLeDMqmXfZrvf40jyQInRqWs04mkibNJVhn0qexfGbDjTfAMb7NYx32_Hnr9WG5d1en8v722v5Sd_sKSfx97TP26T_VR5NqsMzDJrLH7-3ttI)** | | | | [DEMAND ACTION](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkU1v3CAQhn8NvtniY9fEBx-S7iaHtL5GOSHMh5fGgAP2uv73BcdKpUoIDe8LMw8zqkU1PRGC8KkpZMtrrpUsTIshJhBhhJozhqiCGGnUn-tTQxvy0PTgBJXlZqw4WnkI3ttKeFvcWijPD1o1UjaUaqJhn0JEuBYaqabWtBjb2zxPEZBHgJ_TikosQVWrcUHJnCRp3MmtN8MQc9wz6R3zlq2BiSGWwrvI-sAOQgjIM7d-cTMgFwIBrkPOGIwbkjCHRSVpmS2zSprFJm0HP8TolyBUEp0YGbfTaPR2WCIduRlcMr8KlTtSpuGzyUjjZicjcl7Oji6wRDcEFWMOogr3dPWuEq7_UIEP6h_1UcS7We3oCaDs_rxd63jtrl2ymRuNTMZ_4s3I1LzL9nqPP-kjKUIrp9WMo4k1TVMZ9qnkWRy_aQF9AhjvzzDe244_31cblt_29aW8d7_Kz7qz52ziH2mft0l93zySVEfPMKCXv4M9tr8)
---
**The IRS is a bloated bureaucracy that wastes billions of dollars every year while stifling economic growth and violating the privacy of American citizens.**

We need to put an end to this and give hard working Americans the freedom to keep more of their own money.

At the same time, we must also work to protect the lives of the unborn. Every human life is precious and should be protected under law.

**We cannot stand idly by while Democrats make it easier to take innocent lives.**

That's why I am asking for your support. With your donation, we can fight to defund the IRS, lower our income taxes, and defend the rights of the unborn with our new Republican Majority.

**[So please, help me put pressure on GOP moderates and Democrats to demand they put Americans first and tackle the real issues.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkcuOpSAQhp8GdxoBlePCxek-6U76lsxyZkMQkEO3gA1e4tsPOGYmmYSQ4i-o-vhLdrAhFcYQVW0mOtawQYpMd6hEuIQIwrZGJSxKBAfY103VkhZf2h5UpTRMjwWDG_PeOVNwZ7J7x4TAqCHtpa2Gy2XgrK1IWZGaDLKSNSTZ2N3neQoAXwF6iitIvnhZbNp6KVKRqDEr9l4rFVLcU-EsdYZunnIVcu5soL2nJ2EJ8BMzbrEzwDdcAtT4VNFrq6Iw-0VGaZkNNVLoxUTtAD_F4BbPZRQtHykz06iH_UzxeGRa2Zj80yg_kBINm3VCGnczaZ7qMnq6QCOd8jKEFATp13h1lRHXfUnPlPxHfTZxdpYHegTIH9kv9YNdX9boTUPtqEVM_CfetYjm3fbXNbyRK858J6ZNj6MODYlTUcdU0izO33SAPACEjmcIHbaj75-b8cuneX3O14_3_Lv5MHVKose4z_sk_948ixSnZwiQ22-45LX4)**

Thank you for your support,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

body:

**I know we can turn this around, but only if grassroots supporters like you step up right away. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Lee's State of Disarray
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

Bill Lee was sworn in as Governor for a second term today, which is terrible news for Tennesseans. Under his poor leadership, Tennessee is now "leading" the nations in all the worst ways.

Our Democratic leadership is going to push back every step of the way, but the fact is that we have got to build a war chest to flip the legislature and we've got to start planning how we're going to vote in a Democratic Governor in 2026.

Here are just some of the ways we've regressed under Bill Lee:

❌ Financial insecurity for families
❌ Poor education outcomes
❌ Uninsured children and workers
❌ Maternal & infant mortality
❌ Low wage jobs
❌ Affordable housing shortages
❌ Attacks on LGBTQ people

Organizing to elect Democrats in Tennessee is not an easy task, but we're committed to pushing as hard as we can to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Chip in now to help us fight back → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

$5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

It's clear that Bill Lee is failing Tennesseans. Even his biggest claim to fame, Tennessee's finances, is a lie — we're one of the most federally-dependent states in the nation, and on top of that, we are sitting on a multi-billion dollar "rainy-day" fund while keeping millions of Tennesseans in poverty.

The only way for things to change is to elect Democrats across the state. Can you donate $10 right now to help us prepare to go hard for our Democratic candidates in 2024 and 2026? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Thank you as always,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party.Carol V. Abney, Treasurer.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This was my view when I was stationed in Iraq:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.
| Hi, it’s Lucas Kunce.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [split a donation of any amount between my campaign and Voter Protection Project.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38734?t=6&akid=6088%2E878179%2EZjHJv2) **But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. ** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38734?t=7&akid=6088%2E878179%2EZjHJv2) It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.

It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.

Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.

For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.

**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**

When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.

Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.

So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?

I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.

Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.

These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**

I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.

**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please split a donation of $7 or anything at all between my grassroots campaign and Voter Protection Project today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38734?t=8&akid=6088%2E878179%2EZjHJv2)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38735?t=9&akid=6088%2E878179%2EZjHJv2)

clean_body: A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. | Hi, it’s Lucas Kunce. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us. Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty. For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely. Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country. When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there. Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer. So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger? I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits. Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war. These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it. I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. clean_body: Come be one of the first to check out our new campaign office on Saturday, January 28th! | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. | | Dear Friend, We are excited to get the keys to our new office! There will be yard signs, t-shirts, music, and you can be one of the first to check out our new campaign office and join us on Saturday, January 28th! The details are below for our Office Opening: After we open the office up, we are going to get right to work with a neighborhood block walk in Third Ward! We are going to be talking to our neighbors about the issues that matters most to them and we would love to have you join. If you are interested in joining you can sign up by going to this ** or clicking on the graphic below. Thank you, Team Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Thank you for the birthday wishes, friend!
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
I want to thank everyone who signed my birthday card. It was so great to see the notes and well wishes. As I celebrated my birthday yesterday, I looked back at some of the incredible moments I’ve experienced. I wanted to share just a few of them with you and let you know how thankful I am that you have been with me along the way. When my parents immigrated to America, they understood the promise that America has to offer. They instilled in my brothers, my sister, and me that even on our worst day, we are blessed to live in America. As a child, I watched the American Dream unfold before me. My parents came from India with $8 in their pocket. I watched my mom create a small business in our living room and expand it to great heights. When I was 13, I started doing the books at my mom's store. After graduating with an accounting degree and working in the corporate world, I came back to the family store and was proud to watch my mom’s business grow even more. When I ran my first campaign at 32, I was up against the longest-serving member of the South Carolina legislature. He had been in office for nearly my entire life. I was the underdog. It took a team of incredible grassroots volunteers and supporters to help me pull off a victory. And, when I won, I immediately got to work. I spent my time in the state legislature creating government transparency, championing fiscal responsibility, and fighting for South Carolina’s veterans. When I was 38, I was honored to take the oath of office as the first female governor of South Carolina. It’s a moment I will always cherish. I had the privilege of fighting every day for the people of my state, whether it was signing a voter ID requirement into law, slashing the unemployment rate in half, reducing the small business tax rate, or delivering the largest transportation funding bill in two decades without raising taxes on South Carolinians. Just after my 45th birthday, I was sworn in as U.S. ambassador to the UN. I was grateful to serve our country and stand for America on the global stage. Starting on day one, I made sure countries knew there was a new America at the UN—one that would have the backs of our allies and stand up for ourselves. I was proud to push for the U.S. to move its Israeli embassy to Jerusalem, advocate for an end to the Iran nuclear deal, and drive negotiations to achieve the first major reform of the UN’s peace and security apparatus in decades. When I left the United Nations, I made a promise to always stand for America. Since then, I’ve been fighting to promote conservative solutions and rallying behind freedom-loving Americans who understand the hope our country has to offer. I’m blessed to live in America. None of these incredible experiences could have become a reality anywhere else. As Republicans and as Americans, it’s up to us to renew that hope. Our children and grandchildren are counting on us. And together, I know we will come through for them.
Thank you for being by my side and for supporting my mission to stand for America. Your support has been invaluable, and I’m grateful for all of the birthday wishes. My very best,

---

**Peter, tomorrow is the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_.**

Sadly, instead of celebrating the right to abortion and reproductive autonomy, tomorrow is a reminder that women and people who can get pregnant in the U.S. have **_fewer rights today_** than they did during the era of _Roe_.

And why? Because of a small fringe minority who want to strip Americans of their reproductive rights.

The truth is most Americans agree: Abortion decisions should be made between a woman and her doctor. Period.

**With tomorrow’s 50th anniversary of _Roe_ , NOW is the time to boost momentum for abortion rights.** [**Will you sign my petition joining me in recommitting to the fight for abortion rights? I need 10,000 Democrats to sign on and make our voices heard. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57620832/388546279/433239690?refcode=MTFC_20230121_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjI2YTBkYy1kMjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SN8e8O9PILZRSTXtpaRjQWRAuLlbKkj4Dj_TPn6QLMs=&emci=a43ac2c2-f998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=2f26a0dc-d299-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602) | [SIGN ON NOW TO RECOMMIT TO THE FIGHT FOR ABORTION RIGHTS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57620833/388546280/433239690?refcode=MTFC_20230121_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjI2YTBkYy1kMjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SN8e8O9PILZRSTXtpaRjQWRAuLlbKkj4Dj_TPn6QLMs=&emci=a43ac2c2-f998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=2f26a0dc-d299-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)

subject: Big Pharma vs. patients. Wall Street vs. workers. The NRA vs. gun safety.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Since the Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United decision, special-interest groups have dumped massive amounts into elections so they can buy a seat at the decision-making table while reducing the voting power of Americans across the country.
Too often, this is how that influence plays out:
Lining the pockets of Big Pharma and insurance companies instead of lowering costs
Protecting corporations and Wall Street instead of working people
Catering to the gun lobby instead of addressing the rise of gun violence
There are only a few hundred spots left on our petition calling for an end to Citizens United and we noticed yours isn’t on there yet. Will you add your name before the end of the day? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/uHePGogUBkq0Bsxkx6OFCw2]
Thank you,
Team Sherrod

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: First, then, now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Any amount you can give will help us build out the campaign infrastructure we need to send Katie to the U.S. Senate.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T)
Derek,
As we round out week two of Katie’s Senate campaign, we want to give you a quick update:
**FIRST:** Katie launched her campaign for the U.S. Senate. She’s running to represent working people--_not_ corporate PACs or special interest lobbyists.
**THEN:** Despite Katie being only one of twelve Members of Congress who doesn’t accept federal lobbyist or corporate PAC money, our campaign was still able to raise over $1 million on day one, thanks to grassroots supporters like you chipping in what they could.
**NOW:** The days to become a Founding Donor of our campaign are dwindling and we want you on our team! Our average donation is just $36--**but any amount you can give today will solidify you as a Founding Donor.**
**[Please consider stepping up and showing your support for Katie Porter by becoming a Founding Donor today. By making a contribution at the beginning of this campaign, you’re helping build our movement from the ground up.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15819?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F&t=4&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T)**
**[Become a Founding Donor ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15819?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F&t=5&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T)**
Because of California’s unique primary system—two Democrats could be running against each other during the general election—building support early on in this campaign is crucial to our success.
Katie is also one of just a dozen Members of Congress who doesn’t accept money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so our campaign is financially at a disadvantage compared to other campaigns who do accept these large donations.
**[So, Derek, will you join us and make a Founding Donation today? Any amount you can give will help us build out the campaign infrastructure we need to send Katie to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15819?amount=5&refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F&t=6&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15820?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15821?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F-el&t=8&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15822?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F-el&t=9&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15823?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F-el&t=10&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15824?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F-el&t=11&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15819?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F&t=12&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T)
---
Thanks for your support!
Onward,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF21_2_FTN_2023021_V1_F&t=13&refcode2=16238_3422442_Gjen-T&akid=16238%2E3422442%2EGjen-T)**

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Senator Schiff?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Fellow American,

**BREAKING NEWS:** Schiff is expected to announce he’s running for Senate in California, where he has a good shot of winning.

Adam Schiff is one of the most CORRUPT members of Congress. He doctored a text message and presented it as evidence against Meadows in front of The Select Committee! He championed the endless sham effort to impeach the former President, AND he politicized U.S. intelligence in Afghanistan, putting our troops at risk.

| [ **« The last thing America needs is Adam Schiff in the Senate Majority! »**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7e800ce4fc44650a312f18761303b1d&_e=WPL965J1r8j-pRHtWLzrvy5sn86xhLq2Y6IxyvebFMmbdBNtuzG-bIFCDQ158UN7_lV6PgmU9oOQ1K-LOpc0mvdGDcLl1dAD8u3GJKYlYNmefHvDmTXGvvf4SixTxUOGmpeaxeu3BC8Dfef0ZSMwcQoQLMZct0KMFUA95gnyhAIMT8JNyzZ4oh52z070FLX2ZdMpSomhkrFcf9m3LG6gZiFdBdeClKtizZuZjNvi5fXcKlNubprR3GJuYYBIQzmsUbGZc-Swrt6b-BTOQ_StCnmw1jKxY0qCk9acCTn7dsuVZpcCvWVATSuAmdDJp5Ma35GzhhYX8Pk-9iPY0oy3zUIj1k95VnBuFLFlttR3JW0JV-KXvjM0zd9H6ovOnpEZlOvBBEYvEKwkVX8uXPGcBRGtgRaXsLaMzPTqO93ivNVIaPbrw1O5dA0GXDqDLqfw)

body:
Fellow American,

**BREAKING NEWS:** Schiff is expected to announce he’s running for Senate in California, where he has a good shot of winning.

Adam Schiff is one of the most CORRUPT members of Congress. He doctored a text message and presented it as evidence against Meadows in front of The Select Committee! Hi, did you see Jennifer's message from Thursday about our issues survey?

We've had a really valuable variety of responses so far, and we want to hear from as many people as possible. [**If you have a minute, can you take our survey today? We're hoping to get 250 more submissions before the week ends.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57621969/388550205/776812473?ms=EM_PET_230121SURV_N_SV_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230121SURV_N_SV_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdjN2ViOC1lNTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxR-BhAyk5PCobjl5n6eKocIqq0rLP7G1zCMiIB3AL0=&emci=259ff9e1-6399-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a37c7eb8-e599-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thanks so much,

Team Wexton

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> Friend, thank you so much for your steadfast support last election cycle — and throughout the early chaotic days of this new Congress.
>
> The Republican dysfunction and extremism that have been on display recently are only going to increase. We need to be countering them with a powerful message, and I want to make sure I'm prioritizing the issues that matter to _the people_.
>
> There will be major legislative battles ahead on everything from government funding to the future of Social Security and Medicare. I promise to fight for our values at every turn, and I'll be able to do it best if I hear from supporters like you.
>
> [**So please, will you take our short survey and tell us what issues you want me to prioritize in the face of the new Republican House majority? Your input is essential as we prepare for the year ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57621970/388550206/776812473?ms=EM_PET_230121SURV_N_SV_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230121SURV_N_SV_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdjN2ViOC1lNTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxR-BhAyk5PCobjl5n6eKocIqq0rLP7G1zCMiIB3AL0=&emci=259ff9e1-6399-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a37c7eb8-e599-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Voice ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57621971/388550207/776812473?ms=EM_PET_230121SURV_N_SV_FULL_6_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230121SURV_N_SV_FULL_6_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdjN2ViOC1lNTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxR-BhAyk5PCobjl5n6eKocIqq0rLP7G1zCMiIB3AL0=&emci=259ff9e1-6399-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a37c7eb8-e599-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) I'm looking forward to reading your responses!
>
> Jennifer
| **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia.
